description: The blazar TXS 0506+056, the first source associated with a high-energy neutrino, long puzzled scientists: the speeds of individual blobs in the jet measured by VLBI observations seemed too low to generate particles of such extreme energies. A team led by Y.Y. Kovalev, using 15 years of VLBA data, d
abstract: Supermassive black holes generate jets that accelerate particles, but the conditions for high-energy neutrino production remain unclear. The blazar TXS 0506+056, first associated with a neutrino, appeared to have a jet that was too slow based on radio data. Long-term VLBI monitoring uncovered a disturbance with an apparent speed of 21±1 c, hidden behind slow, bright features. This suggests a layered jet: an ultra-relativistic spine (Γ>20) inside a slower sheath. The disturbance in the spine illuminates the sheath with a delay, explaining the offset between neutrino and radio flares. A similar pattern in a second event indicates a recurring mechanism. These findings challenge the standard interpretation of VLBI jet speeds and establish a testable framework linking structured jets to the sources of the most energetic neutrinos in the Universe.
threads: Десятилетиями TXS 0506+056 считали тихоходом: его джет едва обгонял свет. Но внутри, как молния-лидер, нёсся невидимый спин в 21 раз быстрее. Только через 3 года после нейтринной вспышки радио вспыхнуло. Похоже, многие ядра галактик прячут сверхскоростные потоки — и могут быть куда мощнее, чем казалось.

title: Cosmology without likelihoods: How set-based neural networks are transforming galaxy cluster analysis
oneliner: A new simulation-based inference (SBI) approach uses set-based neural networks to estimate cosmological parameters from X-ray catalogs of galaxy clusters, matching the precision of traditional methods.
description: Extracting cosmological information from large cluster surveys requires a reliable statistical link between observables and model parameters. Traditional methods hinge on calculating the likelihood function, capping model complexity and discarding data. This work advances simulation-based inference
abstract: Data from the eROSITA X-ray survey provide access to unprecedentedly large catalogs of galaxy clusters. To extract cosmological information from these samples, a simulation-based inference (SBI) framework was developed, anchored in the realistic simulations of the eRASS1 program. Synthetic catalogs are passed through the survey's selection function, replicating the statistics of real data. A central element of the method is a set-based graph neural network (GNN on sets), which encodes the complete information for each cluster, paired with a masked autoregressive flow for flexible posterior distribution estimation. This approach eliminates the information loss that occurs when compressing data into histograms. On mock samples equivalent to 3,259 clusters, constraints of 11.5% on Ωm and 4.4% on σ8 were achieved. The accuracy is comparable to traditional MCMC analysis performed on substantially larger samples. The method easily scales to more complex models, paving the way for future analyses of next-generation X-ray surveys.
threads: Скопления галактик — маяки эволюции Вселенной, но каждое светит в рентгене по-своему. Вместо того чтобы раскладывать данные в гистограммы, новая нейросеть-дирижёр слушает полную симфонию из тысяч голосов и напрямую восстанавливает космические параметры — без единой записи. Возможно, так мы наконец услышим тихий голос тёмной материи.

title: Collider Probes of Dark Energy Microphysics
oneliner: Resonance measurements of new particles at the Large Hadron Collider can shed light on the nature of dark energy, including its sound speed.
description: The physical nature of dark energy remains one of the greatest mysteries in modern science. Although cosmological observations precisely determine its equation of state, the microphysics is inaccessible to traditional methods. The work proposes a fundamentally new approach: using collider measuremen
abstract: The nature of dark energy is unknown. Although observations constrain the equation of state w, many models reproduce the same expansion history. The key distinguishing feature — the speed of sound of perturbations — has so far remained unconstrained. A method of collider measurements of BSM mediator resonances is proposed. An effective field theory is constructed: a dynamical scalar dark energy field is coupled through derivative interactions to a pseudoscalar mediator in the 2HDM+a model. This induces invisible decays and alters the mediator's propagation in the dark energy background, distorting its resonance properties (widths, decay channels, kinematics) at the LHC. The distortions are sensitive to the speed of sound of fluctuations, enabling the distinction of models indistinguishable by cosmological data. Colliders provide direct access to the microphysics of dark energy, linking the micro world with cosmology.
threads: Тёмная энергия не молчит — она поёт на частоте, недоступной уху. БАК превращает протонные столкновения в граммофон, улавливающий эту мелодию. Резонанс в 365 ГэВ звучит как камертон: чем тише голос тёмной энергии, тем громче отклик частицы. Скоро мы, возможно, услышим силу, разрывающую космос.

title: Optical Feedback vs Parametric Instability in LIGO
oneliner: For the first time, scientists suppressed parametric instability in a full-scale gravitational-wave detector using optical feedback, reducing the gain from 2 to less than 0.02.
description: Scaling laser power in gravitational-wave detectors to the megawatt level hits a wall of parametric instability – an uncontrollable optomechanical resonance. A new approach using optical feedback ensures destructive interference of the parasitic optical mode. An experiment at Advanced LIGO in Living
abstract: Upping the circulating power in gravitational-wave detectors to megawatt levels is crucial for future sensitivity enhancements, yet optomechanical parametric instabilities stand in the way. Existing suppression methods are predicted to become ineffective at megawatt powers. Optical feedback offers an independent solution. This work demonstrates, for the first time, optical feedback control in a full-scale detector: an unstable mode at 10.428 kHz was suppressed, with the parametric gain reduced from R=2 to R<0.02. The result confirms the method's effectiveness for kilometer-scale interferometric detectors and paves the way for megawatt-level operation.
threads: В гигантском ухе, слушающем космос, 40-килограммовые зеркала начинают петь под натиском фотонов — этот резонанс грозил заглушить гравитационное эхо далёких катаклизмов. Физики ответили световым «шумоподавлением»: контур оптической обратной связи, словно антисвет, обрушил паразитные колебания в сто раз. Шепот далёких галактик стал слышнее. Теперь мегаваттные детекторы перестали быть опасной мечтой — шаг к тому, чтобы услышать эхо самого Большого взрыва.

title: Non-Newtonian two-dimensional electron fluid: the role of local Joule heating in nonlinear magnetoresistance
oneliner: Local heating turns a two-dimensional electron gas into a non-Newtonian fluid whose viscosity depends on the velocity gradient, explaining anomalous differential magnetoresistance in ultraclean GaAs quantum wells.
description: The study predicts a mechanism for non-Newtonian behavior of a two-dimensional (2D) electron fluid driven by local Joule heating. In the proposed model, the electron shear viscosity becomes a nonmonotonic function of the velocity gradient, turning 2D electrons into an unusual non-Newtonian fluid—dil
abstract: A mechanism for non-Newtonian behavior of a two-dimensional electron fluid, driven by local Joule heating, is proposed. The shear viscosity of electrons depends non-monotonically on the velocity gradient: depending on the flow regime, the fluid becomes dilatant or pseudoplastic. Hydrodynamic equations for velocity and temperature profiles are solved in a geometry close to Poiseuille flow. It is shown that the nonlinearity arising from local heating explains the nontrivial differential magnetoresistance in ultrapure GaAs quantum wells at high currents. Therefore, a two-dimensional non-Newtonian electron fluid is realized in such systems.
threads: В сверхчистом полупроводнике электронная жидкость оказалась капризнее, чем мы думали. Медленное течение её густит, быстрое — разжижает, а магнитное поле переключает между этими состояниями, словно тумблер. Секрет — в собственном тепле, которое она выделяет. Так мы учимся управлять квантовой материей, словно невидимым соусом, меняя лишь ток и поле. Быть может, это приведёт к электронике, где потоки заряда станут послушными, но живыми — как хорошо выдержанный кетчуп.

title: Quantum Enhancement of Information-Mediated Energy Transfer
oneliner: Collective quantum effects make it possible to amplify information flow in open quantum systems, creating a powerful and efficient Maxwell’s demon and enabling ultrafast charging of quantum batteries.
description: Scientists have developed a quantum mechanism that collectively amplifies information flow in non-equilibrium systems. Using a thermodynamic uncertainty relation and degenerate quantum states, they showed how coherence can dramatically boost the power of heat engines without increasing dissipation.
abstract: For interacting open quantum systems, a thermodynamic uncertainty relation is derived, linking information flow to entropy production in nonequilibrium steady states. A quantum engine is constructed where N-fold degenerate ground and excited states are collectively coupled to thermal reservoirs. Collective transitions linearly enhance heat currents and information flow with N, while entropy production remains constant—realizing an autonomous quantum Maxwell demon that harnesses collective amplification of information flow to pump heat against a temperature gradient. Away from the steady state, collective interactions amplify the unitary component of quantum information flow, leading to a quadratic increase in the charging power of free-energy quantum batteries. The results demonstrate scalable advantages of quantum coherence and collective effects in quantum engines.
threads: Когда квантовые частицы образуют когерентный ансамбль, их активность возрастает в N² раз, а хаос почти не увеличивается. Благодаря этому демон Максвелла перекачивает тепло от холодного к горячему практически даром, а квантовая батарея заряжается за время, обратное квадрату числа кубитов. Это похоже на оркестр, где каждый голос не складывается, а умножает мощь. Подобные системы сулят энергоэффективные квантовые процессоры и микроскопические машины, питаемые потоками информации

title: Entropic Signature of Complexity: Non-extensive Analysis of Protein Lengths from Archaea to Humans
oneliner: Tsallis statistical mechanics reveals a continuous rise in proteome organizational complexity along the evolutionary ladder, from compact bacterial to heavy-tailed human distributions.
description: This study analyzed protein length distributions for 22 reference proteomes – spanning archaea, bacteria, and humans – within the framework of Tsallis non-extensive statistical mechanics. Maximum-likelihood fitting of a truncated discrete q-exponential distribution with bootstrapped 95% confidence i
threads: В 1988 году физик Константино Цаллис обобщил энтропию. Теперь его индекс q загорается на эволюционном древе: от 0,745 у бактерии до 1,147 у человека, как невидимый камертон, чья нота повышается с усложнением жизни. Это не абстрактная математика — q измеряет, насколько белки «слышат» друг друга в клеточном оркестре. Возможно, однажды мы начнём измерять «энтропийный возраст» биосферы, и каждый организм получит свой тон на шкале организации.

title: Hybrid Neural Network Reduces Measurement Count for Identifying Topological Phases
oneliner: A shallow quantum circuit and a classical perceptron jointly learn to distinguish quantum phases of matter, slashing data requirements by an order of magnitude.
description: Modern quantum computers churn out intricate states, and characterizing them demands a staggering number of measurements. Topological phases are particularly tricky—they lack local order parameters. Enter a hybrid neural network: a shallow parameterized quantum circuit reshapes states, while a class
abstract: As quantum computers mature, direct methods for characterizing output states require an impractically large number of measurements. A hybrid quantum-classical neural network is proposed: a shallow parameterized quantum circuit performs a non-local transformation of the measurement basis, after which the measurements are fed into a classical neural network. Both parts are jointly trained to maximize the statistical distance between data distributions obtained from different quantum states. Experiments on the surface code demonstrated the ability to distinguish its topological phase, its symmetry-enriched phase, and random product states. The hybrid model reduces the complexity in terms of the number of measurements needed for training and application by about an order of magnitude compared to a classical neural network trained on randomized Pauli measurements. The shallow depth of the quantum circuit makes the approach ready for implementation on existing devices, paving the way for efficient characterization of complex quantum states.
threads: Квантовый компьютер рождает состояние из 25 запутанных кубитов — для классического взгляда это хаотичная россыпь битов. Но гибридная нейросеть находит в этом шуме скрытую гармонию: квантовая схема поворачивает базис, словно настраивая инструмент, и уже через десяток снимков распознаёт топологический «стиль» фазы. Там, где раньше требовались сотни измерений, теперь хватает считанных. Такой подход сулит скорую эру компактных квантовых детективов, разоблачающих природу материи б

title: Collective Modes of Chiral Superfluid Helium-3 under Rapid Cooling
oneliner: Rapidly cooling a film of superfluid ³He-A generates a rich spectrum of collective excitations, including the Higgs mode and the Nambu–Goldstone mode, unveiling the dynamics of symmetry breaking and the role of topological defects.
description: This work investigates the nonequilibrium dynamics of the order parameter in the chiral superfluid A-phase of helium-3 during rapid cooling through a second-order phase transition. Using stochastic Ginzburg–Landau theory, numerical simulations show that a thermal quench excites bosonic collective mo
abstract: Simulations based on time-dependent Ginzburg-Landau theory revealed that rapid cooling through a second-order transition into the superfluid A-phase of helium-3 excites collective modes of chiral domains and topological defects (vortices, walls) according to the Kibble-Zurek mechanism. Using white Gaussian noise, an inhomogeneous condensate was obtained. For thermal states, the spectral power density of bosonic modes sharply peaks at a frequency equal to the mode mass and decays as 1/ω; sensitivity to Langevin damping is demonstrated. After a temperature quench, the evolution of the order parameter was tracked. Scaling analysis revealed that the dynamic exponent z smoothly changes from 1 to 2 with increasing damping, while the correlation length exponent remains ν≈1/2 regardless of damping.
threads: Удар по квантовому барабану гелия-3 рождает аккорд из хиггсовской и киральных мод — обертонов с чёткими порогами. Эти моды помнят механизм Киббла–Зурека — тот же, что после Большого взрыва рассеял зародыши галактик. Слушая гелий, мы настраиваемся на космический камертон и учимся читать историю Вселенной на языке квантовых струн.

title: Traces of Mind: What We Miss in the Search for Aliens
oneliner: A scientist proposes looking not only for life or technology, but simply for any structures left behind by a thinking being.
description: Between searching for life and technology, there is a gap: how to notice intelligence without machines? Noosignatures — any ordered traces of a thinking being — fill this void. From a paw print to a signal without a key: a new method expands the chances of finding alien intelligence even where life
abstract: Astrobiology often overlooks the origin and evolution of intelligence. Enter noosemiotics—the study of noosignatures: structured traces left by conscious activity on any medium, whether physical (tools, engravings, architecture) or signal-based (coded transmissions, complex animal communication). Noosignatures sit between biosignatures (marks of life) and technosignatures (marks of technology), identified as products of intelligence regardless of whether we can extract meaning. The proposal includes an empirical metrics research program, using material culture as the main proving ground to refine detection methods.
threads: Отпечаток лапы на глине — это не сама жизнь и не колесо, но ясно: здесь было существо, способное мыслить. Точно так же и в космосе: следы разума могут прятаться между следами жизни и техники. Новый подход обещает найти то, что мы упускали.

title: Multi-view Self-distillation of Light Curves with Astrophysical Informedness
oneliner: A method for representing irregular astronomical time series is proposed, combining C-RoPE time encoding, measurement uncertainty handling, and LeJEPA self-distillation across three domain projections.
description: The paper addresses the problem of learning robust representations of light curves—brightness sequences of celestial objects. Using the Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA), the authors introduce three physically motivated projections: the original series, the periodogram, and the phase-fo
abstract: An approach is proposed for learning representations of irregular astronomical time series (light curves) based on JEPA architecture with semantic preservation, uncertainty-aware tokenization, and multi-view self-distillation. The model is trained with LeJEPA regularization on the LEAVES dataset and tested on the StarEmbed benchmark. On StarEmbed, it outperforms handcrafted features on 15 of 16 metrics. Linear probing with few examples yields macro-F1 of 42.56 ± 7.21 (1 sample/class) and 63.58 ± 1.20 (100 samples). Beyond variable star classification, the representations are useful for finding similar objects, parameter estimation, and detecting photometric zero-point drift. In cross-domain adaptation on 12 PYRREGULAR datasets, the method matches or exceeds SOTA on 5 datasets (vs no more than 3 for previous leaders). The results confirm that multi-view self-distillation with domain-specific considerations is effective, and for time series, inductive biases are critical rather than a universal architecture.
threads: У каждой звезды свой пульс. Астрономы записывают его как кривую блеска — но миллиарды записей уже не разобрать вручную. Новый метод учит ИИ слышать сразу в трёх музыкальных регистрах: мелодия во времени, гармония частот, ударный ритм вспышек. Так рождается универсальный слух для космической симфонии — шаг к тому, чтобы машина сама открывала экзопланеты и сверхновые.

title: How a Neural Network with a Dual Graph Predicts Crystal Magnetism
oneliner: Inspired by quantum exchange, the new mCGCNN approach teaches AI to accurately determine a material’s magnetic properties from its structure.
description: The magnetic properties of crystals—magnetization and ordering type (ferro- or antiferromagnetic)—hinge on the subtleties of exchange interactions between atoms, which conventional graph neural networks overlook. This work introduces mCGCNN: a dual-graph architecture where a separate magnetic subgra
abstract: Magnetic order in crystals is determined by sublattices of magnetic ions and exchange pathways through ligands, but standard graph neural networks do not account for this specificity. We propose mCGCNN, which augments the structural graph with a magnetic subgraph that performs angle-dependent message passing based on exchange pathway descriptors motivated by the Goodenough–Kanamori–Anderson rules. Cross-connections and separate pooling over magnetic sublattices prevent dilution of exchange interactions. On spin-polarized DFT calculations from the Materials Project, mCGCNN reduces the mean absolute error of total magnetic moment from 2.54 to 2.02 μB and raises R² from 0.644 to 0.776, outperforming an enhanced CGCNN baseline. The same magnetic representation, pretrained on regression, improves classification of ferro- and antiferromagnets. Incorporating exchange geometry directly into the network architecture provides a physically grounded tool for predicting properties of magnetic materials.
threads: Магнитные моменты в кристалле — словно балетная труппа: их синхронность задаётся углом связи с лигандом-партнёром. Нейросеть mCGCNN подслушала эту геометрию и улучшила предсказание магнитных свойств на 20%, а классификацию ферро-/антиферромагнетиков — до 75%. Путь к дизайну материалов для спинтроники и квантовых компьютеров начинается с понимания атомной хореографии.

title: Hunting Magnetic Eruptions: What Neural Networks Reveal About Black Hole Horizons
oneliner: Machine learning analysis of simulations uncovers observational signatures of magnetic flux eruptions in supermassive black holes.
description: In the accretion disks of supermassive black holes in the magnetically arrested disk (MAD) regime, transient cavities arise—flux eruption events (FEE)—triggered by magnetic reconnection. Using a convolutional neural network and interpretable models, key observable signatures of such events, accessib
abstract: In simulated accretion disks with powerful magnetic fields, FEE events occur—plasma ejections during magnetic reconnection. To search for observable signatures, machine learning was used: a convolutional neural network identified FEEs in the simulation, and interpretable models (random forest, logistic regression) based on this labeling determined key features. During FEEs, millimeter-wave images become diffuse, linear polarization increases, total flux drops, but these changes are weak against natural variability. Notably, the rotation speed of Q-U polarization loops decreases, which contradicts the hypothesis of a common origin for FEEs, loops, and flares. A random forest using standard statistics achieves only ~80% accuracy with class weights, indicating subtle structures captured by the neural network. Thus, selection by image size and polarization fraction can filter candidates, but reliable confirmation requires high-resolution images.
threads: Чёрные дыры дышат. Их магнитное поле то скручивается, то взрывается эрупциями, искажая аккреционный диск. Нейросеть-стетоскоп уловила ритм: тень разбухает, поляризация вспыхивает, излучение падает. Телескоп горизонта событий почти готов это заметить. Что дальше? Возможно, в этих вздохах — ключ к загадке исчезновения информации. Каждый выдох выбрасывает не только плазму, но и вопрос: что остаётся от реальности, упавшей за горизонт?

title: Vortices in the Quantum World
oneliner: In a quantum fluid, probability zeros are whirlpools that govern the flow of energy.
description: Scientists have reformulated the Schrödinger equation, representing particles as a flowing medium. Points where the probability of finding a particle is zero become vortices. Their integer count naturally yields precise energy levels, explains the eternal jitter even of a particle at rest, and links
abstract: For the Schrödinger equation in complex space, a continuity equation is formulated. The complex momentum (normalization of the complex current to the density) serves as a quantum extension of the classical kinematic momentum. The flow of the phase gradient is incompressible and irrotational; the zeros of the wave function give simple poles of the momentum and manifest as irrotational vortices, while critical points create rotational motion of the kinematic momentum, similar to rigid-body rotation. The integer nature of the poles naturally leads to discrete excitations and exact quantization, in the semiclassical limit coinciding with the Bohr–Sommerfeld rule (exactly for the harmonic oscillator). Kinetic energy is the sum of mean and fluctuations; zero-point oscillations of bound states arise from fluctuations and appear as rotations at infinity. Zeros and poles are emergent, which resonates with the quantum entanglement of standing waves.
threads: Нули квантовых волн похожи на невидимые воронки в реке вероятностей. Они оказались ключом к точному описанию энергии частиц. Теперь даже «дрожание» покоящегося электрона можно рассчитать напрямую, а старые приближённые формулы уходят в прошлое.

title: How a Quantum Computer Evaluates Financial Risks
oneliner: Hybrid quantum and classical computing accelerates loss estimation for complex financial contracts.
description: The method speeds up the assessment of maximum losses on financial instruments using a quantum computer. A classical algorithm makes a rough calculation, while the quantum one refines rare catastrophic scenarios. This hybrid reduces computational load and gives an error of just 1–8%. In the future,
abstract: PFE estimation for path-dependent derivatives like TARF is complicated by nested Monte Carlo simulations. A hybrid quantum-classical scheme with Iterative Quantum Amplitude Estimation (IQAE) on a simplified risk model is proposed. The nonlinear payoff of a TARF is encoded into a quantum circuit in two steps: a percentile is computed classically, which sets the condition for the quantum estimation. Discretization of the FX process and a linearized additive approximation are applied. Implementation via Classiq and tests on NVIDIA CUDA-Q and Amazon Braket SV1 showed a relative error of 1–8% at 97.5% and 99% confidence. Discretization and the monotonicity assumption introduce bias, but the approach serves as a viable testbed for quantum acceleration. Scaling estimate: ~300 logical qubits for a full 52-week analysis, with reduced sampling for tail risks at the cost of increased circuit depth.
threads: Неожиданный факт: квантовый компьютер может оценить, сколько потеряет банк по экзотическому контракту через год, в сотни раз быстрее. Учёные построили гибридную схему: классический компьютер делает набросок, а квантовый уточняет редкие катастрофические сценарии. Ошибка — всего 1–8%. Пока нужны симуляторы, но через несколько лет 300 кубитов справятся с такой недельной задачей моментально.

title: Classical Coherence and Biological Aging: A New Physical Perspective on Life and Death
oneliner: A multicellular organism can be described as a classically coherent system, and aging as a gradual loss of this coherence, leading to the collapse of identity.
description: The paper proposes a rigorous classical formulation of the idea that cells in a multicellular organism form a coherent system, where a shared identity is maintained by a single genetic code. Using compact Dirac notation for classical states, the authors introduce a 'Biological Hamiltonian' and an op
abstract: A rigorous classical formalism is proposed to describe a multicellular organism as a holistic system with a single state vector in an abstract DNA-code space. Using Dirac bra-ket notation, applied purely classically, an analog of the center-of-mass coordinate is constructed, encoding organismal identity, and it is shown that the shared genetic code corresponds to a coherent phase in this space. The structure is mapped onto DNA sequence space by introducing a classical biological Hamiltonian, where generalized coordinates represent DNA codes and their distribution across cells. A time-dependent maintenance operator is defined with code-correcting and code-disrupting terms, weighted by parameters A(t) and B(t), reflecting the balance between restorative dynamics and code damage from the environment. Aging is described as a slow drift of the control parameters: as A(t) decreases and B(t) increases, the identity state loses stability, and the organism transitions from reliable code coherence to stochastic variability. Death in this picture is a transition at which the global identity state can no longer be maintained.
threads: Триллионы клеток вашего организма ежедневно накапливают миллиарды мутаций, но вы остаётесь собой — потому что они действуют как единый текст. Представьте книгу, которую переписывают примерно 37 триллионов переписчиков: пока большинство придерживается оригинала, смысл не теряется. С возрастом этот оркестр пишущих рассыпается — опечатки выходят из-под контроля, и рукопись превращается в бессмыслицу. Понимание этой кодовой когерентности может дать ключ к замедлению старения, пре

title: Quantum-Classical Crossover in Spin Supercurrents: Coherence Collapse at S=1/2
oneliner: A study of spin transport in heterostructures reveals that quantum fluctuations can completely destroy the superfluid spin current across an interface for systems with minimal spin 1/2.
description: This work investigates interfacial spin transport in a three-layer normal metal/ferromagnetic insulator/normal metal structure. Using a self-consistent harmonic approximation and microscopic linear response theory, the spin-mixing conductance is calculated for all spin regimes. It is shown to decomp
abstract: The thermodynamics of interfacial spin transport in a three-layer heterostructure normal metal/ferromagnetic insulator/normal metal (NM/FMI/NM) has been studied. The central magnetic layer is described by the anisotropic quantum XXZ model. Using the self-consistent harmonic approximation (SCHA) and a microscopic linear response formalism, the spin-mixing conductance g↑↓ was computed for all spin regimes. It is shown that g↑↓ decomposes into a coherent condensed component (g_cond), stemming from the macroscopic phase of a spin superfluid, and an incoherent fluctuation contribution (g_fluct) mediated by stochastic thermal magnons. In the extreme quantum limit S = 1/2, g_cond drops sharply and vanishes at a finite coherence temperature T_coh. In contrast, g_fluct disappears at T = 0, exhibits a characteristic T² dependence at low temperatures, and is systematically suppressed as ~1/S with increasing macroscopic magnetization.
threads: Один спин-флип — и сверхток обращается в нуль. Так квантовая декогеренция действует в миниатюрных «хорах» со спином ½: фальшивая нота рубит гармонию на корню. Для больших ансамблей эта угроза исчезает. Укрощая анизотропию, мы учимся строить бездиссипативные линии передачи — возможно, ключ к квантовым компьютерам без омических потерь.

title: Three-faced superconductivity: How magnetic fields spawn new quantum phases in uranium ditelluride
oneliner: Scientists in extreme magnetic fields up to 42 T discovered that the superconductor UTe2 exhibits three distinct superconducting phases, with two of them induced by the field itself.
description: In the heavy-fermion superconductor UTe2 at ambient pressure, three superconducting states exist, two of which emerge under the action of a magnetic field. An experiment measuring magnetoresistance in static fields up to 42 T and temperatures down to 0.35 K showed that the SC3 phase appears only abo
abstract: The heavy-fermion superconductor UTe2 at ambient pressure exhibits three superconducting phases, two of which are induced by a magnetic field. The goal of this work was to determine whether the SC3 phase is confined to the spin-polarized state above the metamagnetic transition (~34 T) or develops at lower fields. Magnetoresistance measurements were performed on a high-quality single crystal of UTe2 in static fields up to 42 T in the (bc) plane at temperatures down to 0.35 K. It was found that at 0.35 K, the SC3 phase is first detected when the field is tilted 20° away from the b-axis. At larger angles, a resistance maximum (indicating the onset of SC3) is observed below Hm, while zero resistance is achieved only above Hm over the entire angular range. A refined field–angle phase diagram is constructed. Moreover, it is shown that at 21°, SC3 is already suppressed at 1 K, whereas at 24° it persists down to ~1 K. Near the c-axis, Shubnikov–de Haas oscillations were detected; their frequencies agree with previous data. The field dependence of the fundamental frequency and effective mass is discussed.
threads: Обычно магнитное поле убивает сверхпроводимость. Но в кристалле уранового дителлурида оно, словно садовник, взращивает три разных сверхпроводящих цветка. Один из них распускается только в штормовой области выше 34 тесла. Это похоже на настройку радио: меняя угол поля, можно переключаться между состояниями. Когда-нибудь так смогут управлять квантовыми материалами на заказ.

title: Optically switchable superradiance of surface acoustic wave phonons in diamond
oneliner: Scientists have proposed a method for optical control of a superradiant phase transition for surface acoustic wave phonons in diamond using an ensemble of NV centers.
description: The study demonstrates how laser excitation of an NV center ensemble in diamond enhances the effective spin-phonon coupling, triggering a superradiant phase transition of surface acoustic waves in the weak coupling regime. The proposed scheme enables a fast quantum switch for on-chip phonon control,
abstract: The interaction of surface acoustic waves (SAWs) with the spins of NV centers in diamond holds promise for quantum phononic manipulations on a chip. Ensembles of NV centers coupled to a common SAW mode can exhibit superradiance and collective control, yet a tunable superradiant phase transition has been difficult to achieve. It is shown that optical pumping of NV center transitions enhances the effective spin-phonon coupling, inducing a superradiant phase transition of SAW phonons in the weak coupling regime. It is demonstrated that above a critical threshold, the pump power rapidly switches on phonon superradiance—a dynamic effect that persists in ensembles with a finite number of NV centers. The results offer a controllable pathway to coherent control of NV center spins via phonons in solid-state quantum devices.
threads: Фонон ползёт по алмазу в 100 000 раз медленнее света — достаточно, чтобы им управлять. Слабый лазерный импульс превращает разрозненные спины в слаженный хор, вызывая сверхизлучение. Это как включить рубильник макроскопической квантовой фазы. Возможно, скоро квантовые компьютеры будут обмениваться запутанностью не светом, а звуком.

title: Dineutron Clusters: From Halo Nuclei to the Tetraneutron
oneliner: Modern experiments confirm the existence of the dineutron — a spatially compact neutron pair — in exotic nuclei, paving the way to understanding nuclear superfluidity at the BCS–BEC crossover.
description: In recent years, significant progress has been made in the study of dineutron clusters — tightly paired neutron states emerging in low-density regions of neutron-rich nuclei. Experiments on Coulomb breakup, charge radius measurements, and quasi-free proton scattering have revealed dineutron correlat
threads: Два нейтрона в свободном полёте разлетаются, словно незнакомцы в толпе. Но на поверхности атомного ядра, где плотность в тысячу раз ниже ядерной, они вдруг сцепляются в квантовое танго, обходя запрет Паули за счёт суперпозиции. Этот динейтрон — ключ к сверхтекучести нейтронных звёзд и, возможно, к новым формам материи.

title: ASKAP J1745-5051: A 15,000 K White Dwarf and Sub-stellar Donor in a Radio Transient
oneliner: Broadband spectral analysis proves that the long-period radio transient ASKAP J1745-5051 is a magnetic cataclysmic variable with a hot white dwarf and a brown dwarf donor.
description: In a recent study, astronomers reconstructed the spectral energy distribution (SED) of the mysterious long-period radio transient ASKAP J1745-5051, which is also identified as an X-ray magnetic cataclysmic variable. Using data from far-ultraviolet to near-infrared wavelengths and carefully excluding
abstract: Analysis of the broadband SED (far-UV to near-IR) of the LPT source ASKAP J1745-5051, which is also a magnetic cataclysmic variable with a period of ~1.3 h, revealed two components: a white dwarf with a temperature of 15,000 K, dominating in the UV-optical range, and a substellar donor (M≈0.05 M☉, T≈1800 K), noticeable in the Ks band. The difference from previous results is due to reddening correction, exclusion of contaminated photometric points, addition of VISTA/VHS data with PSF photometry, and the use of synthetic spectra based on atmospheric models instead of blackbodies. The substellar nature of the donor indicates evolution past the “period minimum” (the system is a “period bouncer”). A distance of d≈320 pc was obtained, only ~4 times farther than the nearest confirmed mCV. Since the radio beam likely illuminates only a small fraction of the sky, such objects could constitute a significant portion of the magnetic cataclysmic variable population, linking LPTs to the dearth of “period bouncers.”
threads: В 320 парсеках от нас, в сердце Млечного Пути, умирающая пара: белый карлик и коричневый карлик в смертельном пируэте, круг за 1,37 часа. Их радиолуч — узкий, как лезвие, — скользит по небу, и мы ловим лишь случайную вспышку. Это открытие сшивает два класса космических загадок и говорит: галактика полна невидимых маяков, которые ждут, когда их наконец заметят.

title: Neural network parameter estimation of galactic binaries for the LISA space observatory
oneliner: A method based on neural network flows estimates parameters of close white-dwarf binaries—the future main gravitational-wave sources for LISA—thousands of times faster than MCMC.
description: The future space observatory LISA, sensitive to millihertz gravitational waves, will detect tens of thousands of galactic binaries, mostly pairs of white dwarfs. Traditional Bayesian methods like MCMC scale poorly when simultaneously analyzing thousands of overlapping signals. The authors applied si
abstract: The LISA space antenna will register gravitational waves in the millihertz band, where signals from galactic binary systems dominate. Their analysis is complicated by strong overlap in both time and frequency domains, and standard Bayesian inference methods (MCMC) suffer from high dimensionality and a complex likelihood landscape. A simulation-based inference approach has been proposed: a conditional normalizing flow serves as a neural network estimator of the posterior distribution, trained on simulated data without computing the likelihood. After training, the model generates thousands of posterior samples per second. The method was demonstrated first for a single source in a narrow frequency band, then in wider ranges, and also for the case of two overlapping signals as a proof of concept. The results show the potential of likelihood-free inference as a scalable alternative to MCMC for LISA data analysis.
threads: Когда LISA включит свои «уши», она утонет в какофонии миллионов гравитационных голосов. Выделить в этом хоре отдельный голос белого карлика — задача не для человека. Нейросеть-дирижёр за секунды распутывает партии, приближая нас к расшифровке симфонии Галактики.

title: Machine Learning Modeling: How Defects Are Born in Diamond
oneliner: The formation of dislocation loops in diamond turned out to be a first-order phase transition, driven by the rearrangement of chemical bonds rather than stress relaxation.
description: Scientists used machine learning potentials to trace for the first time how single interstitial carbon atoms merge into extended defects—dislocation loops and planar structures—in nitrogen-free diamond. It turned out that this process is a sharp first-order phase transition, which was described with
abstract: It has been established that the formation of dislocation loops in diamond is a first-order phase transition. A Ginzburg–Landau model is proposed, with loop area as the order parameter; coefficients are derived from quantum-accurate simulations using machine learning. Atomistic modeling at nanometer and nanosecond scales revealed that interstitial carbon atoms aggregate via diffusion recombination and lattice exchange, forming linear defect structures that trigger a ½⟨110⟩ prismatic dislocation loop and two planar platelet-type defects. The transition kinetics follow Kramers theory. The transition is unequivocally first-order: about 98% of the driving force arises from the reorganization of chemical bond energy, not elastic relaxation. This mechanism, utilizing exclusively intrinsic carbon interstitials, presents a nitrogen-free pathway that complements classical nitrogen-mediated processes in type Ia diamonds, and serves as a transferable model for radiation-induced dislocation loops.
threads: В алмазной решётке блуждающие атомы углерода внезапно сплетаются в вихревую петлю — фазовый переход первого рода, питаемый чистой химией связей. Словно ураган в бриллианте, он высвобождает энергию сотен электрон-вольт. Однажды квантовые инженеры оседлают такие штормы, превращая дефекты в совершенные кубиты.

title: The Birth of Dislocations from Flattened Spheres: A New Theory of Plasticity
oneliner: Physicists have proposed a universal theory of plastic deformation where the elementary carrier is a shear transformation of a squashed spheroid, and dislocations emerge as collective excitations.
description: The traditional dislocation theory, reigning for almost a century, describes plasticity in crystals but falls short for grain boundaries, glasses, and nanocrystals, where there is no periodic lattice. The authors propose an alternative—the oblate spheroid excitation theory (OSET), based on Eshelby i
threads: Пластичность кристалла — танец дефектов. Без решётки танец рассыпается в хаос. Но физики отыскали элементарный шаг пластической деформации — сдвиговый сфероид, чья энергия искривляет пространство напряжений, как массивная звезда метрику. Цепь сфероидов превращается в дислокацию, подобно куперовским парам в сверхпроводнике. Это объясняет пластичность стёкол и обратный эффект Холла—Петча. Программируемая материя перестаёт быть фантастикой.

title: Magnetic Configurations of an Altermagnet: An Atomic-Scale View
oneliner: Spin-resolved scanning tunneling microscopy directly reveals, for the first time, the coexistence of two magnetic configurations in a promising altermagnetic material.
description: In the material KV2Se2O, a candidate for d-wave altermagnets, it had long been a mystery which magnetic structure—C-type (altermagnetic) or G-type (antiferromagnetic)—is responsible for the observed momentum-space splitting of electronic states. Using spin-polarized scanning tunneling microscopy and
abstract: Altermagnetism is a new class of magnetic order with momentum-dependent spin splitting and zero net magnetization. In the candidate d-wave altermagnet KV2Se2O, the origin of this splitting has remained controversial. Using spin-polarized scanning tunneling microscopy and quasiparticle interference in a magnetic field, a checkerboard-like antiparallel spin texture was revealed at the atomic level within the V2O layers, along with its interlayer ordering at unit-cell step edges. Two magnetic configurations were found—C-type and G-type—which in a monolayer produce similar spin splitting but correspond to d-wave altermagnetic and conventional antiferromagnetic order, respectively. This points to a complex magnetic landscape of nearly degenerate states. The results establish a direct link between spin splitting in momentum space and the real-space magnetic structure, laying the foundation for identifying the microscopic origin of altermagnetism.
threads: Магнетизм оказался двуличным: в одном кристалле, словно в перетасованной колоде, прячутся сразу две магнитные личности. Заглянув на соседний слой, физики увидели, как шахматный узор спинов то повторяется, то переворачивается — и эти две игры идут одновременно. Вся разница умещается в каплю энергии величиной 1 мэВ — в двадцать раз меньше комнатного тепла. А ведь именно из таких почти невесомых капризов рождается будущая спинтроника: управляя этой каплей, мы сможем переключать

title: Stable Ballistic Cyclers in the Three-Body Problem: Stability Across Two Orders of Mass
oneliner: For the first time, continuous families of stable prograde cyclers — periodic orbits linking two massive bodies — have been found.
description: Researchers from Virginia Tech have reported the discovery of the first continuous families of stable ballistic prograde cycler orbits in the restricted circular three-body problem. Using a geometric method based on the intersection of invariant manifold tubes, they constructed symmetric cyclers and
abstract: We present the first continuous families of stable, ballistic, direct cycler orbits in the restricted circular three-body problem: periodic trajectories that alternately undergo temporary capture and orbit each massive body. Families of symmetric cyclers are constructed from intersections of stable and unstable manifold tubes of the Lyapunov orbit near L1. Stable examples are demonstrated over a mass ratio range spanning more than two orders of magnitude: from the Sun-Jupiter regime to equal masses. Linear stability splits into planar and out-of-plane components. In each family, the branch with planar stability is born simultaneously with a hyperbolic one via a saddle-center bifurcation of the Poincaré map at the maximum Jacobi constant, while out-of-plane instability arises only in isolated parametric resonances. All computed families contain a subfamily that is linearly stable to planar and out-of-plane perturbations. These stable cyclers persist in the full three-body problem provided the third body's mass is sufficiently small. It is conjectured that saddle-center birth is universal for cycler families, pointing to their generic nature in three-body dynamics.
threads: Оказывается, в хаосе трёх тел скрыт регулярный путь — орбиты-циклеры, позволяющие планете бесконечно курсировать между звёздами. Целые семейства таких устойчивых маршрутов только что открыты. Представьте: планета, что вечно переезжает от одной звезды к другой, не рискуя упасть или улететь. Возможно, именно так устроены некоторые миры в двойных системах. Мы на пороге открытия галактической паутины, сотканной гравитацией.

title: Machine Learning Unveils Heterogeneous Heisenberg Chains in Nanographene
oneliner: A machine learning method deciphers site-specific exchange interactions from scanning tunneling spectroscopy, revealing hidden inhomogeneities in quantum spin chains.
description: Low-dimensional quantum magnets often assume uniform interactions, but real materials have variations. Researchers applied a local neural network to scanning tunneling spectroscopy data of nanographene spin chains, extracting site-specific exchange couplings. The method resolved discrepancies betwee
abstract: Retrieving exchange interactions in low-dimensional spin systems from experimental data is a key challenge in the physics of quantum materials. Traditionally, coupling constants are assumed to be spatially homogeneous, even though structural inhomogeneities can cause local variations. To overcome this limitation, a local, length-independent machine learning method was developed that extracts spatially modulated exchange parameters from inelastic tunneling spectroscopy maps. The method was applied to nanographene spin chains: both nearly homogeneous and inhomogeneous coupling regimes were identified. The reconstructed Hamiltonians quantitatively reproduce the measured spectra and correctly reflect the scaling of the energy gap with system size. The proposed approach provides a general strategy for linking local spectroscopic data to effective many-body models.
threads: Квантовый спиновый димер — всего два атома — хранит тайну неравного рукопожатия. Нейросеть, словно дирижёр, по отзвукам спин-спиновых касаний вычисляет, кто и как поздоровался. Вскоре автономные лаборатории начнут картировать квантовые материалы с точностью, о которой мы раньше только мечтали, открывая инженерию связей атомного масштаба.

title: Physics Helping AI: Transient Classification in the LSST Era
oneliner: Introducing PIE-ADA, a method that uses physical laws to generate synthetic training data and classify rare astronomical explosions with high accuracy.
description: Modern sky surveys like LSST will produce 10 million transient alerts every night, demanding automatic classification. PIE-ADA is a LightGBM ensemble system that uses physics-motivated transformations to augment data for rare classes. Extracting 271 features from photometric light curves, it achieve
abstract: The data stream of the upcoming LSST survey (~10 million transients per night) demands automated classification, made difficult by a severely imbalanced class distribution (rare types below 1%). PIE-ADA was developed, generating physically realistic synthetic light curves for underrepresented classes. Four augmentations are applied: correlated noise, cosmological time dilation, wavelength-dependent dust extinction, and observation phase shift; physical constraints prevent unrealistic samples. From six photometric bands, 271 features are extracted (statistical, temporal, peak, color, frequency). On the PLAsTiCC dataset (7848 objects, expanded to 8148 across 14 classes) with stratified 5-fold cross-validation, LightGBM, random forest, Extra Trees, and a neural network were tested. LightGBM achieved a weighted log loss of 0.5763 (±0.0083) and an accuracy of 80.33%, surpassing baseline models by 24–49% in log loss. The full pipeline runs in under 37 minutes, and classifying a single object takes less than 0.05 seconds, making the method suitable for real-time LSST alert processing.
threads: Каждую ночь телескопы ловят миллионы вспышек — это оркестр Вселенной, где партия килоновых едва слышна. Физики научили ИИ сочинять вариации на тему, чтобы расслышать редкие мелодии. Так аугментация данных, подчиняясь законам космоса, превращает горстку примеров в уверенное распознавание. Завтра эти алгоритмы, возможно, первыми заметят гравитационно-волновую симфонию слияний нейтронных звезд.

title: Breathing of Quantum Droplets: A New Look at Ultracold Dipolar Gases
oneliner: An analytical method based on the sum rule accurately describes collective excitations in quantum droplets — an exotic state of matter where quantum fluctuations prevent collapse.
description: Researchers from China have developed an elegant analytical approach to describing the “breathing” modes of quantum droplets — self-bound clusters of ultracold atoms stabilized by quantum fluctuations. Combining a variational method with the sum-rule technique, they derived explicit formulas for the
abstract: The ground states and collective breathing modes of three-dimensional dipolar Bose gases in anisotropic harmonic traps are investigated, with quantum fluctuations accounted for. A Gaussian variational ansatz and non-perturbative sum-rule analysis yield explicit analytical expressions for axial and radial mode frequencies, validated by numerical simulations of the extended Gross-Pitaevskii equation. Predictions match experiments for 166Er and 162Dy with flying colors. Phase diagrams versus s-wave scattering length, atom number, and trap aspect ratio reveal first-order discontinuous transitions and smooth crossovers between a dilute Bose-condensed phase and a dense quantum-droplet phase. Quantum-fluctuation-driven incompressibility sharply hikes breathing-mode frequencies in the droplet regime. In quasi-2D and quasi-1D geometries, the system undergoes a phase transition and crossover under varying scattering length, marked by an abrupt peak-density shift and a continuous cloud-size change.
threads: Квантовые капли — сгустки атомов в сто миллионов раз разреженнее воды — удерживаются от коллапса лишь непрерывным дрожанием вакуума. Эти объекты, словно живые, сохраняют форму и пульсируют: расширяются и сжимаются в собственном ритме. Измеряя частоту этого пульса, физики картографируют экзотические фазы материи. Возможно, квантовые капли станут основой сверхчувствительных сенсоров или ячеек квантовых компьютеров, балансирующих на грани коллапса.

title: The Neutrino Echo of All Supernovae: KamLAND Sets Record Limits Using Neural Networks
oneliner: The KamLAND collaboration used a deep neural network to search for the diffuse supernova neutrino background and set some of the most stringent limits on its flux.
description: In the search for the diffuse supernova neutrino background (DSNB)—the integrated emission from all massive star explosions in the history of the Universe—the KamLAND collaboration analyzed the full 22-year dataset. By applying a new event classification method based on the deep neural network KamNe
abstract: A search for the diffuse supernova neutrino background (DSNB) is presented using the KamLAND detector, targeting electron antineutrinos via inverse beta decay in the 8.3–30.8 MeV range. The liquid scintillator exposure was 9.02 kt·yr for 8.3–9.3 MeV and 9.42 kt·yr for 9.3–30.8 MeV. After applying a deep neural network for classification, 7 candidate events were recorded, consistent with an expected background of 16.2 ± 9.4 events. Spectral analysis showed no significant excess from DSNB. 90% upper limits on the DSNB flux were set at 38–43 cm⁻² s⁻¹ (model-dependent), along with model-independent limits on the electron antineutrino flux — among the tightest at energies below 13.3 MeV. The effectiveness of neural network classification for suppressing neutron backgrounds in liquid scintillator detectors was demonstrated.
threads: Вселенная на самом деле не молчит — она звенит нейтринным эхом каждой погасшей звезды. KamLAND 22 года вёл радиопередачу, и нейросеть-акустик различила лишь семь дрожащих теней на грани слышимости. Это не провал — это самая чистая тишина, в которой вот-вот проявится голос первых солнц. Когда заработают JUNO и THEIA, мы не просто уловим фон — мы услышим колыбельную материи, спетую на языке слабых взаимодействий. И уравнение состояния ядерной материи перестанет быть абстракцией

title: Supernova in a Globular Cluster: How M92 Preserved the Traces of an Explosion
oneliner: High-precision spectral analysis of stars in M92 revealed that the second generation is enriched with supernova iron, unraveling the mystery of cluster formation.
description: Globular clusters were long thought to be chemically uniform in heavy elements, but a new study of M92 using differential high-resolution spectral analysis uncovered a clear difference in iron content between two stellar populations. Second-generation stars, enriched in sodium, showed systematically
abstract: Globular clusters exhibit unique light-element abundance patterns that cannot be explained by standard enrichment mechanisms: first-population stars are sodium-poor, while second-population stars are sodium-rich and found only in clusters. A differential line-by-line analysis of stars in M92 within a narrow range of effective temperatures revealed that the second population (with elevated sodium) has a higher iron level than the first. The populations are clearly separated in Na, Al, and Fe content. This iron enhancement indicates that M92 retained at least some of the supernova ejecta, all of which exploded after the first population had finished forming. The result sets a lower bound on the time delay between star formation episodes and challenges the long-held view that globular clusters are incapable of chemical evolution driven by supernovae.
threads: Шаровое скопление M92 — лес возрастом 12 миллиардов лет. Его звёзды, словно деревья, сохранили химические кольца: через 3 миллиона лет после первой популяции взорвались сверхновые, удобрив второе поколение железом. Та же техника, применённая к далёким системам через телескоп Уэбба, позволит прочесть историю ранней Вселенной.

title: Shock waves during collapse into a black hole: a new look at the growth of supermassive objects
oneliner: Relativistic shock waves arising from gravitational collapse of isothermal gas can release up to 10% of rest energy and regulate accretion onto the forming black hole.
description: Observations by the James Webb Space Telescope have revealed many supermassive black holes in the early Universe, whose growth is difficult to explain with classical models. In a new study, exact solutions of general relativity equations are found for shock waves accompanying the collapse of a singu
abstract: Self-similar solutions with shock waves in general relativity were constructed for the collapse of a singular isothermal sphere into a black hole, extending the Cai & Shu (2005) approach to discontinuous flows. General relativistic jump conditions for an isothermal fluid were derived, linking inner collapsing flows to an outer shell that can be static, expanding, or collapsing; shock wave speeds reach ~0.4c, and the set of possible outer types narrows as the sound speed increases. A coordinate matching method across the zero-velocity surface uniquely connects the Schwarzschild and comoving self-similar descriptions. The central accretion rate, determined solely by the inner collapse, is suppressed by a factor of 5–7 compared to the expansion-wave solution, and the energy released at the shock front reaches ~10% of the enclosed rest mass — nearly twice the radiative efficiency of Schwarzschild accretion (5.7%).
threads: Уже через 500 миллионов лет после Большого взрыва существуют чёрные дыры в миллиард солнц — в разы быстрее, чем допускали старые модели. Ключ — ударная волна, работающая как космический фонтан: она вышвыривает газ, замедляя аккрецию в 5–7 раз, и преобразует до 10% массы в излучение (сравните с 0.7% у термояда). Такие взрывы могли зажечь первые квазары и объяснить красные точки JWST.

title: Infrared Pulsations of a Magnetar: JWST Unveils the Mystery of 4U 0142+61
oneliner: A new observation by the James Webb Space Telescope has detected periodic infrared emission from the magnetar 4U 0142+61, confirming its magnetospheric nature.
description: Magnetars are neutron stars with record-breaking magnetic fields, and their emission across different wavelengths has long been a puzzle. In 2024, JWST observations of magnetar 4U 0142+61 in fast-imaging mode revealed for the first time infrared pulsations synchronized with the star’s rotation. Comp
abstract: Results from observations of the magnetar 4U 0142+61 with the JWST's NIRCam camera on August 18, 2024, are presented. Time-resolved observations (33 minutes, 2.5 s cadence) using the F410M filter (effective wavelength 4.08 μm) allowed measurement of a flux density fν = 22.9 ± 0.6 μJy. Pulsations were detected at a frequency of 115.059 ± 0.035 mHz, consistent with the magnetar's rotation period at the observation epoch. The pulse profile contains one peak per period (possibly an artifact of low time resolution), with a lower limit on the pulsed fraction of about 10%. Comparison with NICER and NuSTAR X-ray profiles shows that the infrared peak aligns with the hard X-ray peak, indicating a magnetospheric origin for the pulsed infrared emission.
threads: Магнетары звучат как исполинские арфы: их магнитные поля вибрируют, рождая излучение. «Джеймс Уэбб» впервые уловил инфракрасный тон магнетара 4U 0142+61, совпадающий с рентгеновским ритмом. Это не отголосок аккреционного диска, а собственный голос магнитосферы. Скоро мы запишем полную симфонию — и, возможно, научимся предсказывать звёздотрясения.

title: Hawking Acoustic Radiation in Microlev Accretion: Tunneling Through the Sound Horizon
oneliner: Spherical accretion onto a black hole creates an acoustic black hole, where phonons tunnel through the horizon, amplified by spacetime curvature.
description: This work explores analogue Hawking radiation in Michel accretion within Schwarzschild spacetime. Linearized perturbations of a steady transonic flow are described by a wave equation with an acoustic black hole metric. High-frequency acoustic waves do not destabilize the flow but can tunnel through
abstract: In the Michel accretion model, the transition from subsonic to supersonic flow occurs at a saddle point of the dynamical system. Introducing Eulerian perturbations into the stationary flow reveals the metric of an acoustic black hole. Outward-traveling acoustic waves are trapped by the sound horizon but can tunnel through it with an exponential drop in amplitude. It is established that high-frequency modes do not compromise the stability of the accretion flow. It is shown that spacetime curvature enhances both the Hawking temperature and the frequency of emitted phonons. The results are significant for analogue gravity and studies of quantum effects near real black holes.
threads: В аккрецирующем газе у чёрной дыры скорость может превысить скорость звука. Это создаёт невидимый барьер — акустический горизонт — откуда обычный звук не возвращается. Но квантовая механика пробивает эту стену: фононы, кванты звука, туннелируют наружу, словно шёпот призраков из-за края бездны. Кривизна пространства-времени ещё и усиливает этот шёпот. Возможно, однажды мы услышим, о чём молчат чёрные дыры — и услышим первые ноты теории всего.

title: How to See the Invisible: Latent Atlases of Multiscale Fields
oneliner: The ScaleAware-JEPA method links machine learning with the physical hierarchy of scales to find structures in complex environments without supervision.
description: In nature, many structures—from plasma to galaxies—are organized across many scales, but we often don't know which variables matter. ScaleAware-JEPA is a new approach that uses scale decomposition and a predictive architecture to build latent coordinates of a field. Applications to magnetohydrodynam
abstract: For analyzing continuous physical fields whose structures are organized into a multi-scale hierarchy without known coordinates in advance, standard self-supervised methods with a fixed context size are poorly suited. We propose ScaleAware-JEPA, which forms dense latent coordinates without labels. The constrained diffusion decomposition (CDD) procedure breaks the field into scale components, defining the masking geometry; the JEPA architecture then predicts the hidden structure using a context window tied to the diffusion scale. Experiments on magnetohydrodynamic turbulence, interstellar molecular gas, and night-time city illumination structure show that the learned geometry reproduces coherent morphology and creates detailed structural atlases without segmentation rules. Scale-aware prediction enables exploring complex physical patterns before they are formally defined.
threads: Вселенная оркеструет масштабом, но нам слышен лишь гул. ScaleAware-JEPA расслаивает симфонию поля на голоса — от ярости турбулентности до мерцания галактик. Поразительно: нейросеть без физики разглядела магнитные структуры в обычной плотности, будто партитура зазвучала сама. Впереди — 3D-фильмы эволюции и физически осмысленные атласы неведомого.

title: Ferron Hall Effect: Transverse Accumulation of Polarization in Ferroelectrics
oneliner: A new Hall effect for electric polarization has been theoretically predicted, arising in ferroelectrics under the combined action of a temperature gradient and a magnetic field.
description: The Hall effect family has a new member: the ferron Hall effect. Scientists have theoretically shown that in ferroelectric materials like barium titanate, a longitudinal temperature gradient combined with a magnetic field gives rise to a transverse shift in electric polarization. The driving force c
abstract: The phonon Hall effect consists of the emergence of a transverse heat flow under a longitudinal temperature gradient in a magnetic field. It was theoretically shown that when the deflected lattice excitations carry an electric dipole moment, their transverse motion leads to the accumulation of electric polarization in ferroelectrics. This mechanism is called the ferron Hall effect because the polarization carriers are ferrones. The effect is illustrated using atomistic lattice dynamics with parameters derived from density functional theory, on the example of the classic ferroelectric BaTiO₃. The results identify ferrones as the electric analogue of magnons in transverse transport and open a path to thermomagnetic control of ferroic order.
threads: Тепло не просто греет — оно переносит электрические диполи, и магнитное поле может изогнуть этот поток. Представьте реку, несущую крошечные стрелки поляризации: подует магнитный ветер, и стрелки соберутся на берегах. Так рождается ферронный эффект Холла — мост между теплом, магнетизмом и электричеством в одном кристалле. Это шаг к компьютерам, где информация течёт без тока, а тепло становится союзником.

title: Squealer: Auditory Feedback for Investigating Model-Data Mismatch
oneliner: An interactive method combining visualization and sound to explore why a model poorly describes data.
description: The article introduces 'Squealer,' a method that uses visual and sound feedback to probe how well a model fits data. You can 'drag' the fitted curve by placing pseudo-points, and the computer responds with a sound whose volume and unpleasantness grow as the fit gets worse. The method is demonstrated
abstract: An interactive method for evaluating model fit quality with visual and auditory feedback has been developed. Starting from the best-fit curve, the user can manually move it; the computer generates a sound whose volume and unpleasantness increase monotonically with the discrepancy between the curve and the data. The method is demonstrated on four examples: a two-parameter model for golf putting data, a four-parameter model for dilution assays, fitting to cosmological data sensitive to Big Bang model parameters, and non-parametric regression using Gaussian processes for temperature measurements. This approach allows engaging auditory perception for a more complete understanding of the model error structure.
threads: Модели данных можно услышать. Вы тянете кривую к точке, а компьютер взвизгивает, если ему больно. Это Сквилер (Squealer) — инструмент, превращающий сопротивление модели в звук. Вы физически ощущаете, где данные отказываются подчиняться. Уже сейчас астрофизики слушают реликтовое излучение, чтобы понять, почему Вселенная расширяется не так, как мы думали. Возможно, скоро мы будем не просто смотреть на графики, а слушать симфонию данных.

title: Branching Worlds of Inflation: Stochastic Trees Distinguish Two Types of Primordial Black Holes
oneliner: A new method based on stochastic trees computes the compaction function and reveals an unexpected dominance of exotic type II black holes in quantum regimes of inflation.
description: In the early Universe, quantum fluctuations of the inflaton field could grow to scales sufficient for gravitational collapse into primordial black holes. To describe this process beyond perturbation theory, the authors applied the stochastic inflation formalism on branching trees. The key tool was t
abstract: It is shown how to compute the compression function within the framework of stochastic inflation by solving the dynamics of a random field on stochastic binary trees. In this setup, the compression function is related to the ratio of volumes exiting from adjacent branches of a given node. This approach also determines whether the areal radius of the perturbation grows monotonically with the radial coordinate, allowing one to distinguish between type I and type II fluctuations. As an application, the formation of primordial black holes is investigated in a single-field model with a constant potential slope, using realizations of stochastic trees generated by the FOREST code. In the classical regime, where quantum diffusion is suppressed, the black hole mass function is narrow, and type II fluctuations are strongly suppressed compared to type I. In the quantum and near-critical (close to eternal inflation) regimes, the mass distribution spans several orders of magnitude, the overall abundance of black holes is enhanced, and type II fluctuations outnumber type I. In these cases, cloud-in-cloud effects are important, requiring a better understanding of the evolution and collapse of type II perturbations for reliable predictions.
threads: В младенчестве Вселенной чёрные дыры рождались не по единому сценарию. Расчёты на ветвящихся деревьях показали: в эпохи квантовой нестабильности доминировали экзотические объекты II типа — с горловиной вместо горизонта. Как в семье, где младший брат неожиданно становится наследником, квантовые флуктуации переворачивают иерархию. Это может объяснить природу тёмной материи и переписать наши представления о гравитационных волнах.

title: Entanglement That Can't Be Broken: Photons in Invulnerable Quantum Communication
oneliner: For the first time, scientists have created quantum entanglement that doesn't depend on the observation method.
description: A quantum entanglement has been created that doesn't depend on the observation method: the link between photons stays strong no matter how you split the light. This was achieved thanks to an ingenious optical setup and precise measurements. The result paves the way for ultra-reliable quantum network
abstract: For the first time, mode-basis-independent entanglement has been experimentally demonstrated. Unlike ordinary entanglement that is tied to a specific choice of participants, this state preserves quantum correlations under arbitrary orthogonal mode transformations. Generation was achieved using a fully tunable interferometer with time-division multiplexing and measurement-induced nonlinearities, yielding heralded two-photon states in two modes that are entangled for any orthonormal basis. Certification was carried out using quantum state tomography specially adapted for this task; the achieved fidelities confirm the presence of basis-independent entanglement. This type of entanglement represents a robust and operationally advantageous form of quantum correlation, particularly crucial for quantum communications in noisy environments and when untrusted parties are involved.
threads: Обычно квантовая запутанность хрупка: стоит изменить точку отсчёта — и она исчезает. Физики впервые создали «вечную» связь между фотонами, которая не рвётся ни при каких преобразованиях. Это шаг к сверхзащищённой квантовой связи, способной работать даже в шумных и недоверенных каналах.

title: Andreev transport at the boundary between quark-gluon plasma and color superconductor
oneliner: A theoretical study of non-equilibrium transport across the interface of two exotic phases of matter reveals microscopic mechanisms crucial for neutron star dynamics.
description: Deep inside massive neutron stars, a phase of hot quark-gluon plasma can coexist with exotic color superconductivity. Researchers developed a field model based on the Schwinger-Keldysh formalism to describe the non-equilibrium current across their boundary. Special attention is given to Andreev refl
abstract: This study tackles nonequilibrium Andreev reflection at the interface between quark-gluon plasma (QGP) and a two-color superconducting phase (2SC). Using Schwinger-Keldysh formalism and a relativistic tunneling model, they calculated the momentum-resolved current driven by the chemical potential mismatch between the phases. The reflection appears in the fourth order of the tunneling constant: a quark from the QGP turns into a reflected hole while a Cooper pair is injected into the 2SC condensate. It turns out the reflection is amplified when the voltage bias nears the superconducting gap and gets quenched at higher voltages—just like in ordinary superconductors. This approach paves a field-theoretic path to describing strongly correlated transport across dense-matter interfaces, key for nonequilibrium dynamics in compact stars.
threads: В сердце нейтронной звезды кварки подчиняются диким законам. Плазма и цветной сверхпроводник разделены границей, где частицы исчезают, оставляя после себя дырку и пару. Как в зеркальном лабиринте, каждый меняет роль. Этот танец диктует тепло, магнитные поля и даже звёздные землетрясения. Мы учимся читать партитуру космоса.

title: Permanent Chaos: How Disorder Emerges in Static Quantum Systems
oneliner: Even in completely static quantum systems, physicists have found hidden chaos, once thought to be the domain of an ever-changing world.
description: In frozen quantum objects like crystals, chaotic disorder has been discovered. Previously, it was only seen in systems continuously shaken by external forces. Scientists used a clever trick — a quantum clock mechanism — to 'awaken' chaos in stillness. This discovery links the microworld with black h
abstract: Quantum chaos is associated with the emergence of random matrix statistics. The spectral form factor (SFF) shows a universal linear ramp. The result by Bertini, Kos, and Prosen (BKP) proved the existence of a ramp for dual-unitary qudit circuits. Building on BKP and a variant of the Feynman–Kitaev clock construction, a ramp is obtained for static geometrically local Hamiltonians: the Floquet quasienergy spectrum of a dual-unitary circuit is embedded into the energy spectrum of a static Hamiltonian, and its associated SFF inherits the BKP ramp in a symmetry sector. This is the first proof of a ramp in a static, geometrically local many-body system with finite local Hilbert space dimension.
threads: Оказывается, даже неподвижный квантовый кристалл может вести себя хаотичнее бурлящего котла. Физики нашли способ вшить «часы-тикер» в статичную систему, чтобы та сама генерировала признак хаоса — спектральную рампу. Шаг к разгадке того, как тепло распространяется в изоляторах.

title: "Red Dots" as Super-Eddington Engines: Lessons from Great Eruptions and Supernovae
oneliner: Mysterious JWST "Red Dots" resemble outbursts of massive stars, hinting at hidden intermediate-mass black holes.
description: By comparing JWST's "Little Red Dots" (LRDs) to phenomena like the Great Eruption of η Carinae and Type IIn supernovae, scientists propose a scenario where the central engine is an intermediate-mass black hole or a supermassive star shrouded in dense gas. The engine's radiation is reprocessed in a p
abstract: A possible scenario for the entire life cycle of JWST's little red dots (LRDs) is explained, based on the analogy with η Carinae's Great Eruption and Type IIn supernovae. The dense circumstellar gas shell, created by outflows from the central source, forms a pseudo-photosphere, making the continuous spectrum nearly blackbody-like. Observed line profiles are explained by electron scattering and absorption in a clumpy wind medium. A key implication: estimates of 'overmassive black holes' may be an artifact of interpreting wind physics as a virialized broad-line region. The escape velocity argument gives a constraint M < 10⁵ M☉ for typical LRDs. The lack of variability and low surface gravity confirm an intermediate mass (10³–10⁶ M☉) and super-Eddington luminosity (Lbol/Ledd ≳ 5) for the source, which could be a supermassive star or an intermediate-mass black hole. Dust formation in the shell likely triggers the transition to a classical active galactic nucleus.
threads: Красные точки в ранней Вселенной оказались не монстрами, а грандиозными коконами. Там будущие сверхмассивные чёрные дыры проходят стадию неистового роста, скрытые плотной газовой оболочкой. Как гусеница в коконе, они перестраивают своё вещество. Пройдут сотни миллионов лет — и кокон спадёт, явив ослепительные квазары. Возможно, именно так запускался механизм рождения первых галактик.

title: Gravitational Acceleration of Dark Matter by Black Holes at the Center of the Milky Way
oneliner: Stellar-mass black holes near Sagittarius A* can accelerate dark matter particles to speeds that allow their detection in detectors.
description: Using numerical simulations, astrophysicists have shown that stellar-mass black holes orbiting the supermassive black hole at the center of our Galaxy can gravitationally accelerate dark matter to speeds of around 25,000 km/s. This mechanism, independent of the microscopic properties of the particle
abstract: We present an extension of the analysis of gravitational acceleration of dark matter (DM) to the nuclear star cluster of the Milky Way, where stellar-mass black holes orbit near the supermassive black hole Sagittarius A*. Numerical simulations show that due to the high DM density and the large number of black holes in the deep gravitational potential, particles can reach speeds up to ~25,000 km/s. This region is found to be the dominant source of gravitationally accelerated DM in the Galaxy. Even under conservative assumptions about the DM profile in the inner Galaxy, the flux of accelerated particles makes large-volume detectors competitive with low-threshold experiments in the sub-GeV mass range, regardless of the specific DM particle model. The gravitational nature of the acceleration also opens up the possibility of detecting heavy inelastic DM scenarios, typically inaccessible to traditional search methods.
threads: В сердце Млечного Пути кружится рой из тысяч чёрных дыр. Их гравитационные пращи швыряют тёмную материю с четвертью скорости света. Земные детекторы уже слушают этот космический шёпот. Мы на пороге открытия невидимой Вселенной.

title: Theta Eridani: A Stellar Transient Witnessed by the Ancients
oneliner: Modern astrophysics explains the mystery of a star that was ten times brighter two thousand years ago and has now become an ordinary third-magnitude star.
description: In the ancient catalogs of Hipparchus, Ptolemy, and al-Sufi, the star Acamar (Theta Eridani) was listed among the brightest luminaries of the night sky, yet by 1600 its brilliance had dropped to a modest 2.9m. New interferometric, spectroscopic, and photometric data have established that the system
threads: Две тысячи лет назад Акамар сиял вдесятеро ярче — звёздная пара в «лихорадке» перетекания вещества превращала гравитационную энергию в свет. Этот космический двигатель пылал тысячу лет. Сегодня такие медленные транзиенты ищут в данных телескопов, и, возможно, мы откроем множество звёзд, переживших подобные катаклизмы. Ночное небо окажется не таким уж спокойным.

title: The Hunt for the First Stars: How JWST and Machine Learning Search for Population III
oneliner: A new method of spatial analysis of JWST data enables the unprecedented isolation of signatures of metal-free stars against the background of later galaxies.
description: Astronomers have developed an approach combining physical modeling and simulation-based Bayesian inference to prove that the first stars in the universe (so-called Population III stars) can be reliably identified only through pixel-by-pixel analysis. Experiments on synthetic data simulating real JWS
abstract: An end-to-end method has been developed to assess the detectability of the first metal-free stars (Population III) in images similar to JWST data. It combines physically motivated direct modeling based on Yggdrasil models with Bayesian inference (simulation-based inference). The analysis covers various initial mass function options, nebular properties, and Lyman-alpha transmission, accounting for noise and JADES survey filters. It is shown that unresolved analysis is severely limited by contamination from the host galaxy, while spatially resolved pixel-by-pixel model comparison significantly improves recoverability: for young massive clumps in nearly quenched galaxies at large projected distances from the center, the successful detection fraction reaches ~90%. Old and central clumps are hardly detected. Application to a candidate from the literature demonstrates spatial differentiation: the blue compact companion is better described by Population III models, while the main galaxy by standard (Population I/II).
