threads: Первые звёзды взорвались, засеяв Вселенную элементами жизни, но их самих никто не видел. Их свет — шёпот, заглушённый рокотом галактик-потомков. Новый метод, как чуткое ухо, выхватывает этот шёпот из каждого пикселя JWST, и первые кандидаты уже найдены. Возможно, мы на пороге открытия эпохи, когда Вселенная впервые заговорила голосом тяжёлых элементов.

title: Quantum Biology: Life as a Coherent State of a Chromosome
oneliner: A new physical approach defines the lifetime of a bacterium through the quantum coherence of its genetic code.
description: Scientists have proposed a formalism based on quantum field theory — Fock space — to quantitatively describe the biological identity and death of a single-celled organism. The identity of a bacterium is identified with the pure state of its chromosomal DNA, and the loss of identity with the decohere
abstract: Life is defined as a dynamic tendency to preserve identity. For a single-celled organism, identity is contained in chromosomal DNA, so a bacterium is alive as long as it actively maintains its chromosomal configuration and is capable of replication. In the study, the biological identity of a bacterium is equated with the coherence of its DNA code in an abstract state space. Within the Fock space formalism, bacteria with given codes are interpreted as occupied fermionic modes; replication, repair, and death are modeled by creation and annihilation operators. Lifespan is defined as the integral coherence time of the autocorrelation function of code occupancy. In a minimal Markov model, it turns out to be the inverse of the decay rate of the corresponding identity mode.
threads: Смерть клетки — это не мгновенный обрыв, а затухающее эхо генетической ноты. Хромосома — струна, вибрирующая в резонансе с жизнью. Декогеренция вплетает помехи, превращая мелодию в неразличимый шум. Возможно, однажды мы научимся подстраивать эту струну, продлевая симфонию старения до бесконечной коды.

title: Global Storm AI: How STRATA Rewrites Atmospheric Modeling Rules
oneliner: The new AI model STRATA, for the first time, emulates atmospheric convection across the entire planet at 4.9 km resolution, achieving 50× energy efficiency.
description: Global modeling of clouds and storms at kilometer resolution has for decades been chained to exascale supercomputers. Enter STRATA (Storm-resolving Tile-based autoRegressive Atmosphere Transformer Architecture). It changes the game by training on a mosaic of local data patches, then unfolds a global
abstract: Global models with explicit convection-resolving, like SCREAM, require ~1 MWh per day, limiting long-term simulations. STRATA is an autoregressive neural-network emulator trained on 17 days of SCREAM data with 4.9 km grid spacing (~25 million cells) and a 10-minute time step. The method relies on the locality of the atmosphere over short intervals: the model trains on spatial tiles, and the global forecast is built by overlapping stitching. The architecture includes 3D attention, stereographic RoPE for grid invariance, and an artifact-suppressing decoder. Kilometer-scale emulation requires an order of magnitude more FLOPs per grid point than coarse AI weather models, in line with the higher information density of convection. STRATA produces stable 24-hour global forecasts with realistic dynamics, though large-scale errors grow. Energy efficiency: 48 model days per MWh (50× better than SCREAM); throughput: 741 model days per day on 512 H100 GPUs. Code and data are open-source.
threads: STRATA научилась предсказывать глобальные штормы, изучив всего 17 дней данных — как если бы художник, увидев пару плиток, расписал весь купол собора. Каждый фрагмент погоды локально уникален, словно кусочек смальты, но сложенные вместе они создают единую картину атмосферы. Энергоэффективность модели открывает путь к ансамблевым расчётам климата на столетия вперёд, приближая нас к машинному предвидению из фантастики.

title: Running Under Tension: Primordial Black Holes, Spectral Running, and the Hubble Tension
oneliner: Data from Planck, ACT, and SPT show that accounting for the Hubble tension only worsens the problem of ultra-slow-roll inflation models for producing primordial black holes.
description: A new study analyzes how possible new physics before recombination, motivated by the Hubble tension, affects the spectral running parameter α_s and, consequently, the viability of models for primordial black hole formation from an ultra-slow-roll (USR) phase during inflation. Scientists used a combi
abstract: Single-field ultra-slow-roll (USR) inflation models — a mechanism for forming primordial black holes — predict a negative running of the spectral index (alpha_s<0), which grows with the black hole mass. This conflicts with hints of a positive running from ACT CMB data. Parameters extracted from the CMB are sensitive to the pre-recombination expansion history, where new physics motivated by the Hubble tension may act. Using axion-like early dark energy (EDE) as an example, we investigate the impact of such physics on alpha_s and the viability of USR models with data from Planck, ACT, SPT, and DESI DR2. Updated constraints on alpha_s and the running of running beta_s are obtained. In most data combinations, adding EDE increases alpha_s: fixing the acoustic scale theta_s, EDE raises the ratio of diffusion to acoustic scales theta_d/theta_s, and the shift in alpha_s compensates for the extra damping by boosting power on small scales. Thus, acknowledging the Hubble tension as a real problem sharpens the challenges for USR models. Overall, selecting inflation models based on n_s and alpha_s parameters is premature without understanding the pre-recombination history.
threads: Первичные чёрные дыры должны были рождаться из квантовых рябей, усиленных инфляцией. Но чтобы получить их в нужном количестве, нужен резкий бег спектра — а данные требуют обратного. Хаббловское напряжение, как сдвинутая и наклонённая дорожка, только усугубляет диссонанс. Инфляция напоминает бегуна, который разгоняется, а трасса становится всё зыбче. Возможно, тёмная материя окажется не чёрными дырами, а чем-то ещё более причудливым.

title: Carbon Nucleus—A Bundle of Three Helium Blocks
oneliner: Experiments prove: the carbon nucleus is not a uniform ball, but three tightly bound helium nuclei.
description: It was once thought the carbon nucleus was a uniform ball. Revisiting old experiments revealed three distinct helium blocks inside. Without this cluster model, the data didn’t add up. This discovery changes our understanding of carbon’s birth in stars and its importance for life.
abstract: The ground state of 12C has traditionally been described by a mean field, but recent theories have pointed to prominent α-cluster formation. In this work, data from the 12C(p,pα)8Be reaction were analyzed using the distorted wave impulse approximation with α-particle preformation amplitudes from an unconstrained 3α-cluster model and harmonic oscillator-based models. Results: the cluster model reproduces the measured cross sections, whereas the oscillator models underestimate them by more than an order of magnitude. Thus, contrary to conventional expectations, the data confirm an almost fully formed three-α-cluster structure in the ground state of carbon-12. This fundamentally changes the understanding of the structure of a nucleus that is key to nucleosynthesis.
threads: Долгое время ядро углерода рисовали однородным шаром. Но эксперименты против: внутри три самостоятельных гелиевых ядра, сцепленных вместе. Это открытие не просто меняет картинку — оно помогает понять, как рождаются элементы в недрах звёзд.

title: The Inevitable Fate of the de Sitter Universe: From Scale Invariance to Dark Energy
oneliner: Any stable scale-invariant theory of gravity predicts a non-zero cosmological constant, unless the quartic coupling is eliminated.
description: A new study shows that a broad class of scale-invariant scalar-tensor theories of gravity inevitably leads to a de Sitter solution with a residual cosmological constant. The only exception is a vanishing quartic self-coupling of the scalar field, but this condition is unstable under quantum correcti
abstract: Flat cosmological solutions are studied within a general scale-invariant scalar-tensor theory of gravity. It is proven that any stable configuration with non-degenerate gravitational dynamics possesses a non-zero cosmological constant. The exception occurs when the quartic self-interaction of the scalar field vanishes. Since this condition is not protected from radiative corrections, a residual cosmological constant emerges as a robust prediction of such theories. The result points to the possibility that dark energy is a natural consequence of an early scale-invariant phase in the universe's evolution.
threads: Вселенная обязана ускоряться — это не тайна, а наследство её младенчества, где царила масштабная симметрия. Подобно идеально гладкому листу, не знающему «больше» или «меньше», мир был лишён масштаба, пока квантовые дрожания не сложили его в неустранимую складку. Теперь мы живём внутри этой складки — неизбежной космологической постоянной. Вопрос не в том, почему энергия так мала, а в том, как природа зафиксировала безразмерные константы — и не можем ли мы их изменить?

title: Polaron with Oscillating Coupling: How Quantum Fluctuations Awaken Active Motion
oneliner: Periodic switching of the sign of the impurity's interaction with a quantum liquid turns it into a self-propelled 'acton'.
description: In the search for quantum active matter, scientists turned to polarons — quasiparticles in ultracold gases. By modeling an impurity in a bosonic bath with a periodically oscillating interaction, they showed that at high modulation frequency the effective friction becomes negative, triggering self-mo
abstract: The dynamics of a polaron (impurity particle) in a quantum gas with a periodically time-varying sign of coupling to the medium is studied. By eliminating the degrees of freedom of the environment, an effective drag force proportional to velocity is derived. It is found that above a critical modulation frequency, the friction coefficient becomes negative at low velocities, leading to self-sustained motion. In the classical limit, the transition regime is described as a function of modulation frequency and the chemical potential of the environment. First-order quantum corrections indicate the stability of the effect, though it can be suppressed by sufficiently precise measurements of the impurity's coordinate.
threads: Квантовая частица обретает способность двигаться сама, если её связь со средой ритмично переключается между притяжением и отталкиванием. Это похоже на раскачивание качелей: когда частота толчков высока, система входит в резонанс и разгоняется. Так рождается актон — квантовый аналог живой клетки. В перспективе такие самоходные «атомы» могут стать основой наномоторов при сверхнизких температурах, стирая грань между живым и неживым.

title: Nonlinear growth of gravitational waves from cosmological phase transitions under the influence of the Universe's expansion
oneliner: Taking cosmic expansion into account in three-dimensional hydrodynamic simulations of early Universe phase transitions revealed a nonlinear, almost exponential growth of gravitational wave energy, leading to an amplification of their spectrum by tens to hundreds of times.
description: For the first time, three-dimensional hydrodynamic modeling of first-order cosmological phase transitions in an expanding Universe has been performed, taking into account the growing transition strength. Contrary to previous semi-analytical predictions, the simulations show that expansion does not s
abstract: The first three-dimensional hydrodynamic simulation of cosmological first-order phase transitions in an expanding background has been performed. The simulations consistently account for the changing transition intensity throughout the nucleation process of slow transitions. It was found that beyond reducing the average distance between bubbles by effectively boosting the nucleation rate, cosmic expansion causes a nonlinear increase in the gravitational wave energy fraction. This leads to amplification of gravitational wave spectra by a factor of 10–100. The amplification is more pronounced for initially weak transitions than for moderately strong ones. The results demonstrate the complexity and importance of accurately modeling slow phase transitions with the expansion of the Universe taken into account.
threads: Расширение Вселенной не гасит гравитационные волны от древних фазовых переходов, а, наоборот, усиливает их в сотни раз. Представьте себе тимпан: одиночный удар порождает мощный резонанс. Космос работает так же — он превращает слабый звуковой отзвук рождения новой фазы в грохот, который могут услышать детекторы вроде LISA. Возможно, мы стоим на пороге открытия следов неизвестной физики, скрытых в этом космическом эхе.

title: Astra-CLR: How Contrastive Learning Deciphers Multi-Year Light Curves
oneliner: The self-supervised Astra-CLR framework transforms raw photometry from millions of stars into compact vectors that distinguish variability types without a single spectroscopic label.
description: Astra-CLR is a new approach to analyzing photometric time series, trained on ∼2.1 million unlabeled light curves from the ZTF survey. Using multi-scale contrastive representations and attention mechanisms, the model independently extracts physical patterns, distinguishing 12 broad classes of variabl
abstract: To automate the analysis of millions of multi-channel light curves in projects like ZTF, Astra-CLR was developed — a self-supervised model based on the Transformer architecture with an attention mechanism. Pre-trained on ~2.1 million unlabeled ZTF records, it uses partial sequences to generate asymmetric multi-scale representations (comparing short and long segments), forcing the network to adopt a 'from particular to general' strategy. A late fusion architecture of multiple representations was proposed, effectively handling long curves with differing filter cadences. When classifying 12 variability classes using logistic regression on the derived features, an accuracy of ~0.70 was achieved, and partial fine-tuning of the upper layers raised it to ~0.77. Astra-CLR is the first public multi-channel transformer model trained exclusively on real ZTF data, and a foundation for end-to-end pipelines that account for color evolution and the unevenness of astronomical observations.
threads: Миллионы звёзд каждую ночь отправляют нам световые сигналы — дрожащие, мигающие, пульсирующие. Астрономы называют это кривыми блеска, но по сути это зашифрованный код, который мы только учимся читать. Astra-CLR — самообучающийся алгоритм, который вслушивается в эти ритмы без ключа, сам находя скрытый порядок. Как криптоаналитик, перехватывающий чужую переписку, он выискивает паттерны, чтобы потом безошибочно отличить биение цефеиды от хаоса сверхновой. Возможно, тот же подход

title: Universal Scaling of Many-Body Quantum Tunneling
oneliner: An experiment with cold atoms confirmed for the first time a universal power-law scaling for critical tunneling, dependent on interaction and temperature.
description: Physicists from Peking University and the University of Geneva used a quantum simulator based on a Bose-Einstein condensate in optical lattices to study how many-body interactions renormalize quantum tunneling. They found that in the weakly interacting regime, the critical tunneling strength grows p
abstract: Quantum tunneling—a cornerstone phenomenon key to superconductivity technologies—was probed using a cold-atom quantum simulator with an adjustable hexagonal-triangular lattice. Here, barrier height, temperature, and atomic interactions could be independently dialed in. The study zeroed in on how many-body effects reshape tunneling. In the weak-interaction regime, the critical tunneling coefficient varied quadratically with temperature across different conditions, a stark contrast to the linear single-particle case. Beyond the mean-field level, the power exponent dropped, aligning with quantum field theory predictions. These findings uncover a universal many-body renormalization of tunneling, directly relevant for correlated quantum materials and devices.
threads: Квантовое туннелирование для частиц-одиночек — как проход через вращающуюся дверь, но с толпой приходит новый порядок. Сотня частиц у арки: их взаимодействие и температура задают критическую проходимость по степенному закону — будто коллектив переписывает физику преграды. Измеренный на холодных атомах, этот универсальный скейлинг открывает путь к настройке туннелирования в сверхпроводниках и квантовых процессорах.

title: Testing Gravity's Quantum Nature with Spin
oneliner: Physicists have devised a way to capture gravity's quantum essence through the twisting of space by a rotating mass.
description: Scientists have calculated how a massive rotating sphere can make a passing particle be in two places at once—a hallmark of quantum gravity. The effect, predicted by Einstein, is like a spoon dragging through honey. A tabletop experiment using this frame-dragging will show for the first time that gr
abstract: Previously, gravitationally induced entanglement has been proposed as a way to test the nonclassicality of gravity in tabletop experiments, but was limited to the Newtonian regime. This work investigates entanglement generated by the frame-dragging effect. It calculates the entanglement phase between the rotational degrees of freedom of a massive source and the trajectories of a test particle in an interferometer. Two approaches are used: Schrödinger evolution with a quantized Lense–Thirring Hamiltonian in the large angular momentum limit, and an on-shell action calculation of linear quantum gravity in the stationary phase approximation. Both methods yield the same phase, matching the proper time difference between the interferometer arms. The path integral further shows how gravitational retardation modifies the phase, making the description explicitly local and relativistically causal. Under standard assumptions about locality and mediators, the detected entanglement would indicate the nonclassical nature of the gravitational interaction.
threads: Вращение массы увлекает пространство, как ложка — сироп. Физики придумали, как этим поймать квантовую гравитацию: частица, пролетая мимо двумя путями, запутывается от вращения. Если это увидят, то подтвердят, что гравитация квантовая. Открывается путь к пониманию мироздания.

title: Positronium and Quantum Hide-and-Seek: How to 'Push' a Photon to Uncover the Mystery
oneliner: Scientists have found a way to prove that positronium decay creates perfectly entangled photons — through a clever experiment of 'pushing' light against electrons.
description: When an electron and a positron merge, they briefly form positronium — a tiny paired system. Its annihilation produces two photons in a state of quantum entanglement: like two coins that always land on opposite sides. A new experiment using Compton scattering will measure photon polarization and pro
abstract: An electron and a positron can form a metastable bound state—positronium—which annihilates with the emission of photons. For para-positronium (singlet state, spin 0), it is theoretically predicted that the two annihilation photons are in a maximally entangled Bell state. It is shown that polarization-dependent Compton scattering provides a method for experimentally verifying this entanglement. The theoretical approach is based on the formalism of two-photon density matrices and combines concepts from relativistic quantum electrodynamics and quantum information theory. The results confirm the fundamental quantum-informational nature of particle decay and may be used to test the foundations of quantum mechanics.
threads: Электрон и позитрон, встретившись, на мгновение образуют крошечный атом — позитроний. Его аннигиляция рождает два фотона в странном состоянии: как две монетки, всегда выпадающие разными сторонами. Ученые придумали, как проверить эту квантовую запутанность, «толкая» фотоны об электроны — и это может открыть дверь к новым технологиям.

title: Nonlinear Diffusion and Compression Rim in Biopolymer Condensates with Sources
oneliner: Scientists uncovered the mechanism behind the compressed layer at the boundary of growing biopolymer droplets and applied it to nucleolus dynamics.
description: Nonlinear diffusion of biopolymer droplets continuously fed by a source is investigated. Combining Flory-Huggins thermodynamics with two-fluid viscoelasticity, the authors predicted and numerically confirmed the emergence of a universal compression rim at the diffusion front. Analysis of experimenta
abstract: Many subcellular condensates continuously synthesize biopolymers. Using Flory–Huggins thermodynamics and a two-fluid viscoelastic model, the diffusion of polymer-producing droplets was investigated, revealing a universal compressive rim at their diffusion front. Analytical scaling relations, supplemented by numerical simulations and experimental data, show that the model accurately describes the structural organization and dynamics of the nucleolus. The work reveals the key role of polymer diffusion in non-equilibrium transport and proposes a physical mechanism for the formation of membrane-less organelles.
threads: На фронте растущей биополимерной капли молекулы ведут себя парадоксально — они сжимаются, словно толпа при штурме. Энтропия, которую мы привыкли считать разрушителем порядка, здесь строит упругий барьер. Этот компрессионный обод найден в ядрышке клетки и теперь может стать инструментом чтения её здоровья — от стресса до рака. Энтропийный поршень работает без единой подвижной детали.

title: Chiral Swimmers and Topological Edge Currents: A New Approach to Robustness in Active Matter
oneliner: Researchers built a model of active particles with chirality switching, generating robust edge currents and spontaneous separation into topologically distinct phases.
description: The work investigates the dynamics of chiral active Brownian particles capable of switching rotation direction upon interacting with obstacles or each other. The authors show that such chirality switching leads to the emergence of robust edge currents, independent of boundary geometry or the presenc
abstract: We investigated robust functioning in active matter far from thermal equilibrium. A microscopic model of two-dimensional active chiral swimmers with random chirality switching is proposed. A single particle exhibits edge currents insensitive to boundary shape and defects. In an interacting ensemble, chirality switching drives phase separation distinct from mobility-induced separation, accompanied by edge flows along interfaces. Using hydrodynamic reduction, we derived an effective theory that qualitatively captures the observed phenomena. Topological analysis of the linearized equations reveals that the edge currents are genuine topological edge modes, and the phase separation represents coexistence of two topologically distinct domains. These results provide guidelines for designing robust edge currents in active matter systems.
threads: Частица, что переключает вращение от касания стенки, превращается в вечного пловца, скользящего по границе, как фигурист, закрутивший обратный пируэт от борта. Соберите тысячи таких — и они сами разделятся на области, танцующие вальс в разные стороны, а между ними проляжет топологическая река, которую не остановить. Мы стоим на пороге мира, где микророботы сами сплетут транспортные сети без единого сбоя.

title: Giant Perpendicular Edelstein Polarization in Altermagnets via Two-Color Pumping
oneliner: By combining Rashba spin-orbit coupling and two-color Floquet pumping, physicists have for the first time achieved giant perpendicular spin and orbital polarization in symmetry-forbidden d-wave altermagnets.
description: The work theoretically demonstrates that two-color laser excitation (ω–2ω) in altermagnets with Rashba coupling dynamically breaks the C₂z symmetry that forbids the perpendicular Edelstein effect. This gives rise to a giant perpendicular spin (and dominant orbital) polarization of 0.5–1.5 Bohr magne
abstract: In non-standard magnets with higher harmonics, such as d-wave altermagnets, spin-group symmetries forbid non-relativistic Edelstein polarizations, though p-wave magnets can generate them. This work shows that combining Rashba spin-orbit coupling with bichromatic Floquet pumping (two frequencies) activates giant perpendicular Edelstein polarizations (PEP) in 2D altermagnets and broader classes of unusual spin-polarized magnets—something monochromatic driving cannot achieve. By dynamically breaking second-order rotational symmetry, the two-frequency field (including bilinear, bicircular, and linear-circular configurations) creates a stray-field-free Zeeman field in the plane, inducing PEP with a dominant orbital contribution (0.5–1.5 μB). The response magnitude is governed by universal selection rules linked to the system's magnetic parity and the harmonics of the second beam. The resulting PEP provides a powerful mechanism for perpendicular recording in magnetic memory.
threads: В альтермагнетиках ток не может создать поперечную намагниченность — запрет симметрии, как дирижёр, запрещающий нотам звучать. Но физики нашли обходной путь: двухцветный лазерный аккорд на частотах ω и 2ω временно отменяет вето, рождая гигантскую поляризацию. Орбитальный момент доминирует, а поле внутри материала сравнимо с полем нейтронной звезды. Так мы приближаемся к памяти, где информация пишется не магнитами, а светом.

title: A Unified View of Dark Matter and Cosmology: Diffusion Models in Gravitational Lensing
oneliner: The new JADE method combines reconstruction of gravitational lensing maps with Bayesian inference of cosmological parameters without a differentiable simulator.
description: Using diffusion models and a transformer architecture, the authors developed the JADE approach, which simultaneously recovers convergence maps (mass distribution) and determines cosmological parameters from weak lensing data. The method is trained on simulations and does not require an analytical mo
abstract: A method is proposed for joint inference of cosmological parameters and convergence maps from weak lensing data using implicit inference based on diffusion models. Training on simulations does not require a differentiable forward model for MCMC sampling. The transformer neural network processes pixel data and cosmological parameters as a single token sequence, enabling a single network to generate posterior samples of maps and parameters conditioned on a noisy shear field. On simulated log-normal fields in wCDM cosmology, the model recovers maps and parameters consistent with traditional MCMC, with MIRA calibration 0.635±0.017 (optimum 0.667). The recovered fields correctly reproduce two-point statistics and non-Gaussian distribution. This method paves the way for field-level analysis on more realistic, non-differentiable simulators.
threads: Каждая далёкая галактика — это свидетель на космическом месте преступления. Гравитация тёмной материи искажает её облик, словно кривое зеркало. JADE — алгоритм, который допрашивает миллиарды таких свидетелей и воссоздаёт портрет невидимого. Этот подход приближает эпоху, когда карта невидимой Вселенной станет такой же подробной, как карта звёзд.

title: Multifractal Scaling of Hi-C Maps: From Contact Probability to the Mass Exponent
oneliner: The mass exponent τ(q) follows directly from the power law of contact probability P(s)∼s^{−γ}, linking multifractality to polymer physics.
description: We show that multifractal behavior in Hi-C contact maps is a direct consequence of the power-law dependence of contact probability P(s) on genomic distance. The mass exponent τ(q) is derived analytically, revealing two asymptotic regimes: a slope of 2 for small q and a slope of 2−γ or 1 for large q,
abstract: Genome organization displays multifractal scaling, yet its origin lacked a direct physical explanation. This work derives that the multifractality of Hi-C maps follows directly from the power-law contact probability P(s) ∝ s^{-γ} — an empirically measured quantity. From P(s) with a single exponent γ, the mass exponent τ(q) is analytically obtained, describing the scaling of the q-th moment of contact density with window size l. This reflects a geometric competition between intra- and inter-segment contacts. The slope of τ(q) at large q equals 2−γ (for γ<1) or 1 (for γ≥1). The behavior is robust to noise and observed across organisms, suggesting universality. The analysis is also extended to a double power-law P(s). These results establish a direct link between multifractality and polymer contact statistics, with the large-q slope of τ(q) mapping onto the known polymer contact exponent.
threads: Мультифрактальность в упаковке ДНК оказалась иллюзией сложности — на самом деле она вытекает из простого степенного закона, словно обертоны из основного тона. Hi-C карты, подобно партитуре, хранят эхо единственной мелодии — вероятности контакта. Этот универсальный язык полимеров теперь можно использовать для анализа любых степенных сетей — от космической паутины до социальных связей. Возможно, простота правит даже в самых запутанных системах.

title: Can life travel between stars on icy comets?
oneliner: A new study tests whether microbes can survive an interstellar journey inside icy objects like comet 3I/ATLAS.
description: Data from JWST and SPHEREx on comet 3I/ATLAS revealed that natural spread of life in ice is possible if microbes periodically thaw. But intentional sending of life by another civilization is nearly impossible — the impact would be too hot. The work proposes a method to search for life on such wander
abstract: The possibility of natural and directed panspermia via interstellar objects was investigated using 3I/ATLAS as a case study. Data from SPHEREx (CO₂, H₂O, CO, dust, C–H band) and JWST/MIRI (first direct detection of CH₄ in an interstellar object, unusual CO₂:H₂O and CH₄:H₂O ratios) were analyzed, distinguishing between passive flight and active perihelion stages. Natural panspermia is plausible: microbes can survive in icy films with low metabolic activity; yet to account for the detected methane signals via frozen biomass, a staggering ~10¹⁴–10¹⁵ kg would be needed, while active methanogenic archaea in warm liquid water could slash that number by orders of magnitude. Directed panspermia is unfeasible: an impact at 60 km/s releases 1.8×10⁹ J/kg, destroying any biological capsule. Such objects should be viewed as test cases for diagnosing panspermia, not as evidence of life.
threads: JWST впервые нашёл метан в межзвёздной комете. Это может быть следом жизни, замороженной во льдах. Но если кто-то специально отправит такую капсулу, удар о планету разогреет её в сотни раз сильнее тротила — и начинка не выживет.

title: Wandering black holes and accretion in solitonic cores of fuzzy dark matter
oneliner: Numerical simulations show that enhanced accretion in fuzzy dark matter cores is not stable due to black hole wandering and limited gas supply.
description: Observations of quasars at high redshifts require explanation for the rapid growth of supermassive black holes in the early Universe. Fuzzy dark matter models with solitonic cores have proposed a mechanism to boost Bondi accretion via a deep central potential. However, new numerical simulations acco
abstract: Simulations within the Schrödinger–Poisson framework, including isothermal gas and a moving black hole that grows via conservative mass sink, investigate how soliton cores of fuzzy dark matter influence Bondi accretion. For low-mass seed black holes (<10⁶ M⊙), the wandering and oscillations of the soliton lead only to bursty accretion without steady enhancement. Intermediate-mass black holes (~10⁷ M⊙) achieve the longest-lasting growth: amplification up to ~100 times for cs=60 km/s, but with hot gas the rate drops to background levels. At masses around ~10⁸ M⊙, black holes rapidly exhaust gas near the sink, transitioning to a starved regime. The key finding: deepening the potential well alone does not guarantee feeding—enhanced growth requires dynamically keeping the black hole within the dense gas. Relying solely on soliton amplification to form supermassive black holes in the early Universe appears insufficient.
threads: Нечёткая тёмная материя манила: вот он, топливный шприц для сверхмассивных дыр. Но симуляции обнажили правду: солитонные ядра — скользкие призраки, выталкивающие странников. Лишь идеально взвешенные семена удерживают равновесие. Этот танец на грани видимого однажды выдадут гравитационные волны — быть может, в их дрожи звучит голос тёмного вещества.

title: Dust of Precious Metals: How Kilonovae Conceal and Reveal Secrets
oneliner: The late infrared glow of kilonovae is explained by the formation of refractory dust from heavy elements synthesized during neutron star mergers.
description: Observations of kilonovae AT2017gfo and AT2023vfi revealed intense infrared emission that cannot be explained by atomic transitions alone. An international team of researchers showed that dust grains from refractory elements like tungsten and osmium form efficiently in the ejecta of merging neutron
abstract: Kilonovae, arising from neutron star mergers, produce heavy elements via the r-process and exhibit late-time infrared emission at temperatures below 1000 K, which cannot be explained by atomic transitions. Using the events AT2017gfo (GW170817) and AT2023vfi (GRB 230307A) as examples, it has been shown that conditions in kilonova ejecta allow dust formation from refractory r-process elements—zirconium, tungsten, and osmium. Kinetic calculations based on chemical reaction rate coefficients for tungsten as a representative element demonstrate efficient dust condensation, especially in slow-moving ejecta, contradicting earlier work based on classical nucleation theory. Radiation-hydrodynamic simulations including dust successfully reproduce the observed infrared emission. The formation and abundance of dust from r-process elements strongly depend on the ejecta mass, composition, and velocity. Infrared emission from such dust opens a new diagnostic method for heavy element synthesis in neutron star mergers.
threads: Слияния нейтронных звёзд не просто рождают золото — они засевают космос металлической пылью. Каждая пылинка — крохотный факел, светящийся в инфракрасном свете как живое доказательство r-процесса. Уловив это свечение, мы не только взвесим запасы платины и урана во Вселенной, но и, возможно, раскроем тайну: откуда на Земле взялось столько драгоценных металлов, чтобы украсить ими наши пальцы и шеи.

title: Stardust from Neutron Stars: How Kilonovae Unveil the Secrets of Heavy Elements
oneliner: Heavy elements born in neutron star mergers condense into dust, producing infrared emission that explains observations by the James Webb Space Telescope.
description: Astrophysicists have shown that in the ejecta of a kilonova — the optical afterglow of a neutron star merger — dust grains form from refractory elements (tungsten, osmium). These grains produce near-blackbody emission in the infrared, perfectly matching data obtained by the JWST telescope for the ki
abstract: Neutron star mergers are the main source of r-process elements, producing kilonovae — optical and infrared transients powered by radioactive heating. Observations of kilonovae AT2017gfo (associated with GW170817) and AT2023vfi (associated with GRB 230307A) have allowed measuring the mass of ejected r-process material and identifying heavy elements. However, late observations reveal strong infrared emission with temperatures below 1000 K, which is difficult to explain by atomic processes alone. This work demonstrates that conditions in kilonova ejecta are favorable for the formation of dust grains from refractory r-process elements, including Zr, W, and Os. Using kinetic calculations with reaction rate coefficients for tungsten, it is shown that dust formation is efficient, especially in slow ejecta, contrary to a previous study based on classical nucleation theory. Radiation transfer modeling that includes dust naturally explains the observed late infrared emission. The formation and abundance of r-process dust depend strongly on the mass, composition, and expansion velocity of the ejecta.
threads: Столкновение двух нейтронных звезд: за миг — Эвересты золота и платины. А после — из дыма пожара рождается металлическая пыль, светящаяся в инфракрасном. JWST поймал этот свет, и теперь мы можем взвешивать далёкие килоновые по их пылевому излучению. Золото вашего кольца, возможно, когда-то было частью такого облака.

title: FRB 20250613A: Key to the Mysteries of Fast Radio Bursts and Plasma Physics
oneliner: A new repeating fast radio burst exhibits exotic properties pointing to a neutron star in a binary system with a massive star.
description: The paper presents a comprehensive analysis of FRB 20250613A, a repeating fast radio burst localized in a low-metallicity dwarf galaxy. Observations with the ASKAP, MeerKAT, and Parkes telescopes reveal significant scattering variations on timescales of minutes to hours, changes in rotation measure,
abstract: FRB20250613A is a repeating fast radio burst discovered in a dwarf galaxy with low metallicity. Observations with ASKAP, MeerKAT, and Parkes revealed that burst dispersion varies sharply over minutes to hours, while polarization changes over days, including rotation measure jumps of ~300 rad/m². This indicates a turbulent magnetoionized environment. In multicomponent signals, a preferred peak separation of 6.8±0.8 ms is found, likely reflecting an intrinsic emission mechanism. For individual bursts, propagation effects differ on millisecond timescales — this behavior is naturally explained by nonlinear plasma effects from the intense FRB radiation, rather than a changing line of sight. All data are consistent with the hypothesis that the source is embedded in the dense stellar wind of a Be star companion, typical for such low-mass galaxies.
threads: Представьте космического гитариста, который играет так яростно, что его усилитель взрывается, превращая звук в грохочущий хаос — и этот хаос становится новым инструментом. Нейтронная звезда в далёкой галактике именно так обращается с плазмой: её импульсы-ноты настолько неистовы, что перегружают среду, и та начинает петь сама. Мы впервые улавливаем, как излучение меняет свойства пространства на лету — ключ к новой физике всплесков. Возможно, когда-нибудь мы научимся слушать эт

title: FRB 20250613A: Millisecond Scattering Variations and the Mystery of Fast Radio Bursts
oneliner: The repeating fast radio burst FRB 20250613A exhibits abrupt scattering changes on millisecond timescales, pointing to extreme conditions near a neutron star.
description: FRB 20250613A is a new repeating fast radio burst localized in a dwarf galaxy at redshift z=0.0987. Using three radio telescopes (ASKAP, MeerKAT, Parkes), dozens of bursts were recorded, showing significant variations in scattering time (from 0.14 to 7.2 ms) and rotation measure (~300 rad/m²). Polar
abstract: We present an analysis of the repeating fast radio burst FRB 20250613A, localized in a low-metallicity dwarf galaxy at z=0.0987. Based on observations from ASKAP, MeerKAT, and Parkes, we studied scattering, polarization, and rotation measure. We detected minute-to-hour variability in scattering, daily spectral depolarization, and rotation measure shifts of ~300 rad/m² over days to months, indicating turbulent magnetized plasma. Multi-component bursts show a preferred interval of ~6.8±0.8 ms, likely intrinsic to the emission mechanism. Some events exhibit millisecond-scale parameter variations, explainable by nonlinear effects in plasma excited by the burst's strong field. These properties match the model of a source embedded in the dense wind of a Be-type companion star, typical for low-mass galaxies.
threads: Нейтронная звезда вращается 147 раз в секунду, но её радиолуч пробивается сквозь плазменный ветер, меняющийся быстрее, чем вы моргаете. Одни вспышки тонут в тумане, другие — сверхмощные — выжигают себе дорогу. Когда-нибудь танец этого луча станет нашим компасом в поиске скрытой материи Вселенной.

title: Spin Secrets of Low-Mass Black Holes: a Transition at 15 Solar Masses
oneliner: Analysis of gravitational-wave events reveals that the effective spin distribution of binary black holes changes sharply at around 15 solar masses, hinting at distinct formation channels.
description: Using the GWTC-5.0 catalog of 259 mergers, scientists applied hierarchical Bayesian analysis to study the distribution of effective spin χeff as a function of primary black hole mass. A clear transition is found at 15.2+4.3–3.6 M⊙, separating two statistically distinct populations. Below the transit
abstract: Analysis of the effective spin (χeff) distribution of binary black holes in the GWTC-5.0 catalog using hierarchical Bayesian inference revealed a transition at the primary black hole mass. The population is modeled as a mixture of two spin components with a boundary mass extracted from the data: 15.2(+4.3/−3.6) M⊙. Analysis of simulated catalogs showed that such a transition is unlikely to be caused by finite sampling fluctuations. Below the transition mass, the χeff distribution is narrow, peaking at a small positive value but with significant support for negative spins; above it, the distribution is broader, the peak shifts toward χeff≈0, and the support for positive and negative values is roughly equal. These results point to statistically distinct populations: the dominant group with masses ~10 M⊙ likely forms differently. The low-mass population is consistent with formation from massive multiple stars in the field — either through isolated binary evolution with large initial black hole kicks (≳100 km/s) below the boundary mass, or through dynamical evolution of hierarchical triple systems; standard isolated binary evolution models do not reproduce the support for negative χeff.
threads: 15 солнечных масс — как горный хребет, разделяющий реки, текущие в разные стороны. Так и спины чёрных дыр: ниже этой отметки они собраны, выше — хаотично разбросаны. Это открытие в гравитационных волнах указывает на два сценария рождения: одни пары появляются в спокойных системах, другие — в результате мощных взрывов. С детекторами нового поколения мы увидим этот рубеж и узнаем, как умирают гигантские звёзды.

title: Thorium-229: The Atomic Quantum Battery
oneliner: A thorium-229 atom works like a pair of coupled pendulums: energy shuttles back and forth between the electron shell and the nucleus.
description: Scientists turned a thorium atom into a quantum battery: the electron shell and nucleus swap energy like two pendulums on a shared string. A laser charges the shell, and the energy slips into the nucleus on its own. No wires—just light and the atom.
abstract: The electron shell of the thorium-229 ion with an M1 transition at 8.4 eV and the ground-state doublet of the nucleus with a similar energy represent two spatially nested qubits. When the transition energies are relatively close, weakly damped oscillations can arise between them, with multiple coherent transfers of energy from the shell to the nucleus and back. The process does not require resonant coincidence within the level widths due to the high interaction energy of electronic and nuclear currents. The electron shell “breathes,” periodically changing size, which is observable in an ion trap by the intensity of scattered light. This extends the energy range for exciting the 229mTh isomer (3/2+, 8.4 eV) via the electronic bridge. Under coherent laser irradiation, the system turns into a nuclear quantum battery: charging (isomer excitation) is achieved by coherent excitation of the shell, followed by energy transfer to the nucleus. The result opens the possibility of creating a nuclear quantum battery based on 229Th at the current technological level.
threads: В атоме тория-229 электроны и ядро «играют в пинг-понг» энергией. Оболочка дышит, то сжимаясь, то расширяясь. Это позволяет создать ядерную квантовую батарейку, заряжаемую лазером.

title: Hidden Quantum Symmetry of de Sitter Backgrounds: Wands Duality and Entanglement
oneliner: Quantum-information measures of entanglement between local modes in an inflationary Universe turn out to be indistinguishable for backgrounds related by Wands duality, despite different evolutionary trajectories.
description: The study shows that for pairs of inflationary backgrounds that are Wands-dual (such as slow-roll and ultra-slow-roll), all symplectic invariants of the covariance matrix of local perturbations coincide. This means that entanglement entropy, mutual information, quantum discord, and logarithmic negat
abstract: The study investigated how degeneracies in quasi-de Sitter backgrounds (in the sense of Wands duality) manifest in quantum correlations of primordial perturbations. Using the Gaussian continuous-variable formalism for coarse-grained scalar fluctuations, the covariance matrix for a pair of localized modes was constructed and symplectic invariants were extracted. For Wands-dual backgrounds, the symplectic eigenvalues (and consequently, entanglement entropy, mutual information, quantum discord, and log-negativity) coincide, although the matrix elements strongly depend on the background. This reveals a quantum-information symmetry of the de Sitter vacuum: local linear entanglement witnesses cannot tell dual inflationary histories apart. The reason lies in local and scale-invariant canonical transformations, which are the essence of Wands duality.
threads: Реликтовое излучение — театр теней ранней Вселенной. Разные варианты инфляции отбрасывают абсолютно одинаковые тени в квантовых корреляциях: даже запутанность не выдаёт, какая история была на самом деле. Чтобы пробить эту маскировку, учёным придётся ловить тончайшие негауссовы сигналы — возможно, именно в них скрыта истинная физика рождения космоса.

title: The Age of the Universe from the Galaxy's Oldest Stars
oneliner: Analysis of 155,000 old stars in the Milky Way points to a cosmic age of 13.73 billion years, supporting standard cosmology and challenging hypotheses about the 'Hubble tension'.
description: A new study using LAMOST spectroscopy and Gaia astrometry has determined the age of the Galaxy's oldest stars, and through them, the age of the Universe. By applying MCMC reconstruction to the hidden age distribution of a sample of 155,000 stars, it was shown that the oldest star has an age of 13.73
abstract: Using spectroscopy from LAMOST DR7 and parallaxes from Gaia eDR3 for 247,103 Milky Way stars, ages were estimated with YY isochrones up to 20 billion years. Strict criteria (metallicity, α-enrichment, agreement with FLAME) narrowed the sample to 155,600 objects within a 5 kpc radius. MCMC reconstruction of the underlying distribution gave an oldest star age of 13.73+0.18−0.15 billion years, with a spread of 13.31–14.02 billion years under selection variation. The result is consistent with 13.6 billion years in the ΛCDM model calibrated by the relic radiation (first stars after 0.2 billion years). This challenges Hubble tension solutions via new physics before recombination, as such models predict a universe age of ~12.9 billion years, which is hard to reconcile with observations of old metal-poor stars and asteroseismic constraints.
threads: 155 тысяч звёзд-долгожительниц, чей возраст почти равен возрасту Вселенной, раскрыли астрономам тайну своего рождения. Их свет — окаменевшая хроника. Анализ показал: мироздание старше, чем предсказывали модные «быстрые» модели. Итоговый возраст 13,73 млрд лет исключает раннее ускорение расширения. Ключ к загадке Хаббла, видимо, не в древней физике, а в тонкостях современных измерений.

title: The Age of the Universe from the Oldest Stars: A New Blow to 'Early' Solutions of the Hubble Tension
oneliner: Analysis of 155,000 old stars in the Milky Way shows the oldest is about 13.73 billion years, consistent with the standard cosmological model and contradicting hypotheses that make the Universe younger to explain the Hubble paradox.
description: An international team led by Indranil Banik used data from the LAMOST spectroscopic survey and the Gaia astrometric catalog to determine the ages of 155,600 subgiants in the solar neighborhood. Through Bayesian isochrone analysis and a novel reconstruction of the age distribution, they found the old
abstract: Based on a sample of 247,103 stars from the LAMOST DR7 survey and Gaia eDR3 parallaxes, an estimation of the age of the universe was conducted. Star ages were determined using YY isochrones (up to 20 billion years); after selecting objects with low metallicity and enhanced α-element abundances, and checking consistency with FLAME ages, the final sample consisted of 155,600 stars within 5 kpc. Reconstruction of the latent age distribution using the MCMC method yielded an age for the oldest star A★ = 13.73+0.18–0.15 billion years. This result matches the expectation from the ΛCDM model (13.8 billion years) assuming the first long-lived stars formed 0.2 billion years after the Big Bang. Such agreement challenges solutions to the 'Hubble tension' via new physics before recombination, which predict a universe age of about 12.9 ± 0.2 billion years. Uncertainties in stellar modeling cannot reconcile these values, given the low metallicity of the oldest stars and asteroseismic constraints.
threads: Звёзды-долгожители — живые архивы. Из 155 000 субгигантов одна оказалась старше 13,73 млрд лет — почти ровесница мироздания. Её неторопливое горение длилось дольше, чем существуют планеты. Будь Вселенная моложе, такие звёзды не успели бы зажечься. Увидеть эру первобытного огня можно прямо из окрестностей Солнца: нужно лишь научиться читать звёздные кольца, как дендрохронологи читают кольца деревьев.

title: Time Loop from an Empty Universe
oneliner: Physicists built a model where closed time-like trajectories emerge from ordinary vacuum—without exotic matter.
description: Scientists have found an exact solution to Einstein's equations for empty space in which paths to the past arise spontaneously. It was once thought that time machines required exotic matter with negative energy, but the new work gets by with just a gravitational wave. This brings us closer to unders
abstract: An exact vacuum solution to Einstein’s equations is constructed, in which closed timelike curves develop from regular, asymptotically flat initial data obeying the weak, dominant, and strong energy conditions. The geometry is shaped by two functions: a harmonic transverse profile and a traveling wave mode. Their evolution drives closed curves in the time machine’s core from spacelike to timelike. The chronology horizon admits a degenerate limit, where its generating closed null geodesic has vanishing acceleration (boost) and optical scalars, matching the existence conditions for a Killing spinor. The finding confirms that a time machine can form in classical general relativity without exotic matter and reveals an unexpected link to supersymmetry.
threads: В новой модели пустого пространства гравитационная волна закручивает время в петлю. Частица внутри нее возвращается в прошлое. Это не фантастика — строгое решение уравнений Эйнштейна. Возможно, Вселенная прячет карманы с замкнутым временем, и когда-нибудь мы научимся их открывать.

title: Dark matter energy exchange in stars near supermassive black holes: a new path to dark stars
oneliner: Calculations show that elastic scattering of dark matter in the star S4714 orbiting Sagittarius A* can heat it to a luminosity comparable to its own, opening an annihilation-free path to a dark star phase.
description: At the center of the Milky Way, the star S4714 passes through a region with extremely high dark matter density. Scientists calculated the orbit-averaged energy exchange due to elastic scattering of dark matter particles on protons and electrons in the star. It turned out that for a spiked profile, t
abstract: Stars in tight orbits around the supermassive black hole at the center of the Galaxy pass through regions of sharply increased dark matter density. For the star S4714, moving on an exceptionally close relativistic orbit around Sagittarius A*, the orbit-averaged energy exchange due to dark matter interaction has been calculated. With a spike density profile, the transferred power reaches the star's luminosity if the scattering cross-section on protons is on the order of 10⁻³⁶ cm² for particle masses in the MeV–GeV range, and on electrons—around 5×10⁻³⁸ cm² for masses sub-MeV. This opens up an annihilation-free pathway to a dark star phase, where heating is caused by elastic scattering of dark matter. The obtained cross-sections fall within the region predicted by freeze-in scenarios and do not contradict limits from experiments on dark matter reflection off the Sun and its acceleration by cosmic rays.
threads: S4714 — спринтер галактического центра: её скорость достигает 8% световой. Влетая в облако тёмной материи, она испытывает трение, способное разогреть её до сияния, сравнимого с ядерным пламенем. Никакой аннигиляции — просто столкновения. Так рождаются тёмные звёзды: их блеск зависит от того, сколько незримых частиц встретит на пути небесный пловец. Быть может, однажды мы прочтём историю галактик по их фантомному свету.

title: Dark Matter Heats Stars Near Black Holes: A New Path to Dark Stars
oneliner: Elastic scattering of dark matter particles off stars near supermassive black holes can rival the star's own luminosity, opening an annihilation-free path to a 'dark star' phase.
description: On extreme orbits around the supermassive black hole at the center of the Milky Way, the star S4714 passes through a region of enormous dark matter density. Scientists calculated that elastic scattering of dark matter particles off protons and electrons in the star can transfer energy equivalent to
abstract: Stars on tight orbits around the supermassive black hole at the Galactic center pass through regions with potentially enhanced dark matter density. Using the star S4714, which moves on an exceptionally close and relativistic orbit around Sagittarius A*, the orbit-averaged energy exchange rate due to dark matter interactions has been calculated. For a dark matter density profile with a 'spike', this rate reaches stellar luminosity at scattering cross-sections with protons of σ_{χp} ~ 10^{-36} cm² (for particle masses from MeV to GeV) and with electrons of σ_{χe} ~ 5×10^{-38} cm² (for masses below MeV). The result points to the possibility of transitioning into a 'dark' phase of the star without annihilation. The obtained cross-sections lie within the predictions of the freeze-in mechanism and are consistent with constraints from cosmic-ray scattering and solar reflection experiments.
threads: В центре Млечного Пути звезда S4714 каждые 12 лет ныряет в окрестности чёрной дыры, разгоняясь до 8% скорости света. Там её поджидает невидимый шквал: частицы тёмной материи, спрессованные гравитацией в невероятно плотный «сугроб», бомбардируют раскалённую плазму. Если снежинки-частицы тяжелы, они раздувают звёздный костёр; если легки — остужают. Этот танец энергий может породить тёмные звёзды, чей свет питается не синтезом, а ударами незримого роя.

title: Rapid Secular Evolution: A Bar Matures in a Galaxy 7.6 Billion Years Ago
oneliner: JWST reveals a fully formed X-shaped bulge in a galaxy just 6.2 billion years after the Big Bang, pointing to an early completion of bar-induced evolution.
description: Astronomers report the discovery of three key structures in galaxy UDS 12999, observed at a redshift of 0.92, that are hallmarks of mature spiral galaxies: an X-shaped bulge, a nuclear stellar disk, and an extended disk. Using data from the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST), they performed detailed
abstract: The James Webb Space Telescope captured an image of a galaxy at redshift 0.92 (when the universe was 6.2 billion years old, i.e., 7.6 billion years ago). It already shows an X-shaped bulge, a nuclear stellar disk, and an extended stellar disk. The geometry and estimated bar size are indistinguishable from those of modern barred spiral galaxies. This indicates that the main evolutionary phase involving the bar was completed when the universe was less than half its current age. The result shows that mature structures can form much earlier than previously thought.
threads: JWST заглянул на 7.6 млрд лет назад и увидел галактику с уже зрелым X-образным балджем — словно космический гончар работал в режиме перемотки. Обычно на такую структуру уходят эпохи, а здесь — стремительный бросок. Учебники придётся править: галактики взрослеют куда раньше, чем мы полагали.

title: The Oldest X-shaped Structure in a Galaxy: JWST Peers Back 7.6 Billion Years
oneliner: The James Webb Space Telescope has discovered a distant galaxy where, 7.6 billion years ago, an X-shaped bulge, nuclear disk, and bar had already formed, pointing to an early completion of key stages in disk galaxy evolution.
description: Astronomers using JWST images studied the galaxy UDS 12999 at redshift 0.92, when the universe was just 6.2 billion years old after the Big Bang. The analysis revealed that it already possessed all the features of a mature disk galaxy: an elongated stellar bar, a dense nuclear disk, and the characte
abstract: Disk galaxies like the Milky Way evolve through a sequence of internal processes: the stellar disk forms a bar, the bar funnels gas to the center, creating a nuclear stellar disk, and then the bar vertically thickens into an X-shaped bulge. It was long thought that this evolution takes up most of cosmic history. However, observations from the James Webb Space Telescope revealed a galaxy at redshift 0.92 (7.6 billion years ago) that already has an X-shaped bulge, a nuclear stellar disk, and an extended disk. Its geometry and estimated bar size are indistinguishable from those of modern barred galaxies. Thus, the main phase of bar-induced evolution was completed when the universe was less than half its current age, imposing tight constraints on the timescales of dynamical galaxy evolution.
threads: 7.6 миллиарда лет назад галактика UDS 12999 уже щеголяла зрелым X-образным балджем, будто её эволюцию пропустили через гигантские песочные часы. Бар, как горловина, ускорил приток вещества, и всего за 3.8–5.4 млрд лет она набрала массу Млечного Пути. Теперь JWST будет искать такие «часы» на ещё больших глубинах. Вселенная взрослеет стремительнее, чем мы думали — придётся переписывать хронологию галактического созревания.

title: Lensing Tomography Without Rare Coincidences: Pseudo-Double Lenses vs Dark Energy
oneliner: Astrophysicists propose replacing rare double gravitational lenses with pairs of ordinary ones to measure the equation of state of dark energy with record precision.
description: To circumvent the rarity of double-lens systems, scientists propose using pseudo-double lenses (PDSPL) — pairs of independent galaxy–galaxy lenses with nearly identical deflectors. Simulations for the LSST survey show that such pairs can achieve a precision in measuring the dark energy equation of s
abstract: To measure cosmic expansion and dark energy with strong gravitational lensing, the double-source-plane lens technique is limited by rarity and mass-sheet degeneracy (MSD). This work presents pseudo double-source-plane lenses (PDSPLs) — pairs of independent single-source plane lenses whose deflectors have self-similar mass profiles. This approach generalizes the formalism to ~10^5 galaxy–galaxy lenses expected from LSST, Euclid, and Roman, eliminating the secondary MSD from intermediate source mass. Using a hierarchical forecasting framework that incorporates MSD, the study predicts constraints on the dark energy equation of state in a flat w0waCDM model. With LSST's 10-year photometric sample alone, σ(w0)≈0.45, while simultaneously determining MSD and power-law slope to ~2%. Adding a prior on Ωm (e.g., from CMB, BAO, SNe Ia) tightens σ(w0) to ~0.29, competitive with Stage III weak lensing. Notably, the large photometric volume outperforms smaller precisely measured spectroscopic samples, emphasizing statistical power over per-object precision.
threads: Вселенная — комната смеха с гравитационными зеркалами. Тёмная энергия растягивает её стены. Чтобы измерить искривление, астрономы ищут не уникальные двойные линзы, а тысячи пар галактик-двойников, которые работают как одинаковые зеркала. Статистика отражений выдаёт уравнение состояния тёмной энергии точнее, чем когда-либо. Космос перестаёт быть лабиринтом, когда знаешь форму каждого зеркала.
authors: the LSST Dark Energy Science Collaboration

title: Automatic Detection of Solar Filament Oscillations: A Multiscale Spectral Pipeline
oneliner: A new automated pipeline detects solar filament oscillations in GONG data, quadrupling the number of detections compared to manual methods.
description: We present an automatic pipeline for detecting spatially coherent oscillations of solar filaments from Hα observations by the GONG network. The method combines deep learning for filament segmentation with multiscale spectral analysis and empirical significance calibration to isolate global oscillati
threads: Солнечные волокна дрожат, как струны. Раньше эти вибрации искали вручную, теперь алгоритм с машинным зрением и спектральным анализом слушает Солнце автоматически. За две недели он нашёл 91 событие — вчетверо больше, чем человек. Это открывает путь к прогнозу космической погоды: уловив дрожь вовремя, можно предсказать корональный выброс.

title: How Black Holes Actually Glow: A Simple Discovery
oneliner: Physicists found that black holes lose energy not through a cascade of particles, but through a simple ejection — like spray from a roaring current.
description: What's it about: they created an analog of a black hole's event horizon in an optical fiber — a point from which light cannot escape. What's new: Hawking radiation turned out to be not an avalanche, but a single burst. Why it matters: this could explain how real black holes lose mass.
abstract: Hawking radiation, predicted for black holes, links gravity, quantum mechanics, and thermodynamics, but has never been observed astronomically—the odds are vanishingly small, and it is studied in laboratory analogues. The source of the radiation's energy should be the gravitational field, but the mechanism of quantum generation remained unknown. Experiments in a fiber-optic analogue of an event horizon showed that, contrary to previous ideas of a complex cascade process, quantum birth occurs in a simple direct way. For the first time, the backreaction of the radiation on the field was measured. The result suggests the existence of an equally direct mechanism for other lab analogues and possibly for real gravitational fields, clarifying how black holes may radiate.
threads: Чёрные дыры не только пожирают – они ещё и светятся. Физики поймали этот процесс в оптоволокне и нашли неожиданно простой механизм: квантовые капли срываются с бурного потока, как брызги с речного порога. Может быть, так излучает и настоящая дыра.

title: Mass functions as evidence for hierarchical black hole mergers
oneliner: Comparing mass distributions of low-spin and high-spin black holes in the GWTC-5 gravitational-wave catalog showed that the latter are products of mergers of the former.
description: Using a flexible mixed-population model for 259 binary black hole mergers from the GWTC-5 catalog, a team found a striking match between the mass function shape of the high-spin subpopulation and the remnant mass distribution of the low-spin one. The similarity is quantitatively confirmed by a Bhatt
abstract: Using a flexible mixture model of the population for 259 binary black hole mergers from GWTC-5, we show that the mass function of the high-spin subpopulation reproduces, peak by peak, the predicted mass distribution of merger remnants from the low-spin (stellar-origin) subpopulation up to ~80 M☉. The morphological match, quantified by the Bhattacharyya coefficient (up to ~0.95), is naturally explained if rapidly spinning black holes are themselves products of previous mergers; alternative scenarios require fine-tuning. This serves as decisive evidence for hierarchical mergers. Additionally, the sharp upper cutoff of the low-spin subpopulation at m_max,1 = 54.2^{+7.7}_{-7.2} M☉ yields an astrophysical S-factor for the 12C(α,γ)16O reaction: S_300 = 151^{+30}_{-26} keV·b (68% confidence), consistent with the theoretical reference value. The entire observed black hole population is explained by stellar collapse followed by dynamical hierarchical assembly, without invoking primordial black holes.
threads: Среди хаоса гравитационных волн проступил чёткий узор: словно отпечатки пальцев, массовые функции выдали родословную чёрных дыр. Малоспиновые «родители» и высокоспиновые «дети» связаны каскадом слияний — каждый гигант когда-то был парой меньших дыр. Это не просто статистика, а прямое доказательство иерархической сборки. Гравитационная астрономия превращается в генеалогию: мы видим, как из космической пыли рождаются поколения всё более массивных объектов. Следующий шаг — загля

title: Irrefutable Evidence for Hierarchical Growth of Black Holes
oneliner: Analysis of 259 gravitational-wave events reveals that massive, rapidly spinning black holes are products of previous mergers, not the result of accretion.
description: Using a flexible mixed population model, scientists discovered a striking coincidence: the mass distribution of high-spin black holes exactly mirrors the distribution of remnant masses of the low-spin subpopulation. This 'smoking gun' proves that fast-spinning black holes arose from hierarchical mer
abstract: The origin of massive rapidly spinning black holes is an open question: hierarchical mergers in dense clusters or accretion onto isolated holes. Analysis of 259 GWTC-5 events using a mixture model shows that the mass distribution of the high-spin subsample closely matches the expected remnant mass distribution for the low-spin subsample (stellar origin) up to ~80 M☉. The similarity of these functions (Bhattacharyya coefficient ~0.95) is decisive evidence for hierarchical mergers, while other mechanisms would require fine-tuning. The upper mass cutoff of slow-spinning holes at 54.2 (+7.7/-7.2) M☉ allows extraction of the astrophysical S-factor S_300 = 151 (+30/-26) keV·b for the 12C(α,γ)16O reaction, consistent with theoretical predictions. Thus, the entire population of observed black holes is explained by stellar collapse and subsequent hierarchical assembly, without invoking primordial black holes.
threads: 259 гравитационно-волновых событий указали на то, что быстровращающиеся чёрные дыры — это буквально «дети» от слияния более спокойных родителей. Их массовый спектр, словно две половинки одной фотографии, совпал с остатками слияний с коэффициентом 0,95. Сеть детекторов нового поколения позволит увидеть «внуков» и, возможно, подобраться к рождению чёрных дыр промежуточной массы — к тому самому мостику к сверхмассивным монстрам.

title: Dim Builders of the Universe: JWST and a Gravitational Lens Clarify the Contribution of the Tiniest Galaxies to Reionization
oneliner: Observations of the galaxy cluster Abell S1063 using the JWST space telescope and the gravitational lensing effect show that extremely faint galaxies may have provided most of the ionizing photons in the early Universe.
description: A new study used strong gravitational lensing by the cluster Abell S1063 to detect ultra-faint galaxies at redshifts z~6–11. The data refined the ultraviolet luminosity function (UV LF) at its faint end. Modeling a possible 'turnover' of the function at the dim end showed that even with gradual supp
abstract: Based on gravitationally lensed ultra-deep images from JWST/NIRCam (GLIMPSE survey) and HST/ACS (Hubble Frontier Fields) of the galaxy cluster Abell S1063, a sample of distant galaxy candidates at z~6–11 was constructed to constrain the faint end of the ultraviolet luminosity function (UVLF). Instead of a sharp cut-off, a model of smooth quadratic suppression after a characteristic luminosity M_t was used, accounting for a possible contribution from galaxies beyond the decline. No direct evidence for a cutoff was found down to M_UV = −13.5 at z=6; weak, medium, and strong decline models were ruled out beyond M_t = −15.9, −15.1, and −14.8, respectively. Lower limits were obtained: UV luminosity density ρ_UV ≥ 22×10^25 erg s^−1 Hz^−1 Mpc^−3, star formation rate density SFRD ≥ 25×10^−3 M_⊙ yr^−1 Mpc^−3, log(ionizing photon rate ṅ_ion) ≥ 51.02 (s^−1 Mpc^−3). Galaxies fainter than the standard threshold M_UV = −17 contribute more than 50% of the UV luminosity density and at least ~64% of the stellar ionizing photons at z=6. The model allows a non-zero population beyond M_t, so sources fainter than the decline continue to contribute to ρ_UV and ṅ_ion, requiring consideration of the decline shape in reionization scenarios.
threads: Первые галактики-карлики были незаметнее пламени спички в мегаполисе. Но именно их многомиллионный хор выжег туман нейтрального водорода и сделал Вселенную прозрачной. Астрономы заглянули в этот хор благодаря естественной линзе из тёмной материи — и теперь знают, что более 60% света, разорвавшего космическую тьму, пришло от тех, кого мы раньше считали статистами. Возможно, именно в моргании этих тусклых искр скрыт ключ к природе самой тёмной материи.

title: Local Galaxy Distribution Does Not Violate the Cosmological Principle
oneliner: Analysis of DESI DR1 data confirms: large-scale structures agree with the standard ΛCDM model, and reports of gigaparsec anomalies stem from a distance error.
description: Recent claims of gigaparsec-scale inhomogeneities in galaxy distribution from the DESI spectroscopic survey cast doubt on the cosmological principle. A new study comparing the same data with the FLAMINGO cosmological hydrodynamical simulation, run within ΛCDM, shows that with correct conversion of r
abstract: The cosmological principle asserts the statistical homogeneity and isotropy of the Universe on large scales. Earlier analysis of galaxy samples from DESI DR1 revealed coherent anisotropic features in the local distribution at distances up to a gigaparsec, which would contradict this principle. A re-analysis of the same data was performed using the correct comoving distance scale and comparison with the FLAMINGO hydrodynamic cosmological simulation within the standard ΛCDM model. It is shown that with the correct distance scale, the anomaly disappears. The observed structures are consistent with ΛCDM predictions, confirming the validity of the cosmological principle.
threads: Почти сломали стандартную модель. Просто перепутали сантиметры с дюймами. В данных DESI увидели гигапарсекового монстра — оказалось, это знакомая Великая стена Слоуна, растянутая в кривом зеркале неверных расстояний. Вселенная остаётся однородной, но напоминает: каждый новый обзор — это шаг по минному полю систематических ошибок. Следующие карты неба могут показать тени настоящих аномалий — и тогда зеркало потребуется отполировать до блеска.

title: Dark Energy: Intertwined Constraints in Extended Cosmologies
oneliner: A new analysis shows that the preference for dynamic dark energy is robust to adding new parameters, but constraints on neutrinos and inflation depend strongly on the model.
description: Scientists conducted a systematic reassessment of cosmological data using the latest measurements of cosmic microwave background radiation, baryon acoustic oscillations, and supernovae. Extensions to the standard ΛCDM model were considered, including dynamic dark energy, spatial curvature, massive n
abstract: A systematic revision of cosmological constraints beyond ΛCDM has been carried out, with a consistent relaxation of assumptions about dark energy, curvature, neutrinos, and inflation. Based on the latest data from CMB, DESI BAO, and various supernova catalogs, it is shown that the preference for dynamic dark energy persists across all extended cosmologies considered. The curvature Ω_k is consistent with flatness, despite a weak hint (2.2σ) of a positive value, which substantially weakens in models with dynamic dark energy. Constraints on N_eff are generally consistent with the standard value of 3.04, while upper limits on the sum of neutrino masses range from ≤0.06 eV to ≤0.2 eV depending on the model. No signs of inflationary tensor modes are found: r ≤ 0.035. The spectral index n_s shows significant model dependence; including running parameters α_s and β_s leads to a slight positive shift, which may compensate for the preference for larger n_s in small-scale CMB data, yet both parameters are compatible with zero at ~1.5σ. None of the extensions considered resolve the H_0 tension. Implications for Ω_m and S_8 are discussed.
threads: Вселенную часто представляют как застывшую гравюру, но её тёмная энергия оказывается живым дыханием. Новые данные намекают: космологическая постоянная не так уж постоянна — она меняет темп расширения, словно дирижёр ускоряет финал симфонии. От этого зависят судьбы нейтрино и кривизна пространства, а в отдалённой перспективе — сценарий Большого сжатия вместо вечной пустоты.

title: Bloated Hot Neptune TOI-2195 A b: Birth from a Jupiter
oneliner: The new exoplanet TOI-2195 A b — a bloated Neptune on a polar orbit — reveals a possible evolutionary path from hot Jupiters to hot Neptunes through mass loss and tidal heating.
description: Astronomers discovered the exoplanet TOI-2195 A b — a hot Neptune with a mass one and a half times that of Neptune, but a radius almost as large as Jupiter's. Orbital analysis shows that the planet likely moves on a polar orbit around its star. Simulations suggest it could have formed as a cold Jupi
abstract: We present the discovery and characterization of TOI-2195 A b — a bloated hot Neptune with an orbital period of 4.16 days, a mass of 1.46 Neptune masses, and a radius of 0.79 Jupiter radii, orbiting an early K-star in a wide binary system with a companion at ~600 AU. Using the Magellan/PFS spectrograph, we detected the Rossiter–McLaughlin effect at ~2.6σ, indicating a nearly polar orbit with a projected obliquity λ = 109{+35/-53}°. Joint dynamical and structural modeling reproduces the observed system parameters. The planet likely originated as a cold Jupiter, which was driven onto a highly eccentric orbit via the eccentric Kozai–Lidov mechanism, triggered by the gravity of the stellar companion. At pericenter, it lost up to 90% of its mass through Roche lobe overflow, causing rapid tidal migration and radius inflation due to tidal heating. TOI-2195 A b serves as a test of planet migration theories, and modeling suggests that puffy hot Neptunes may be the stripped remnants of more massive Jupiters that survived mass loss during high-eccentricity migration.
threads: Планета, когда-то бывшая холодным юпитером, прошла сквозь гравитационную мясорубку и потеряла почти всё, кроме раздутой водородной оболочки и каменного сердца. Теперь она, как воздушный шар, кружит вокруг звезды по полярной орбите. Возможно, половина горячих нептунов — это «выпотрошенные» юпитеры. Заглянуть в их атмосферу — значит прочитать историю насилия, сформировавшую миры.

title: A Planet's Atmosphere Around a White Dwarf: Hydrocarbons, Aerosols, and Thermal Emission
oneliner: JWST detects hydrocarbons, aerosols, and excess heat in the atmosphere of planet WD 1856 b, which survived the death of its star.
description: Using JWST NIRSpec PRISM transmission spectroscopy, the atmosphere of the giant planet WD 1856 b, orbiting a white dwarf, has been studied. Methane (CH₄), aerosols, and strong thermal emission from the nightside were detected, indicating an effective temperature of ~400 K instead of the expected 160
abstract: Planets can survive the red giant stage and end up around white dwarfs. The atmosphere of planet WD 1856 b was studied using transmission spectroscopy with the NIRSpec PRISM instrument on JWST. The spectrum in the 0.5–5.0 μm range showed the presence of hydrocarbons (with a preference for CH4 at an odds ratio of 17:1–30:1), aerosols (2×10^5:1–2×10^6:1), and thermal emission from the nightside (2×10^63:1–2×10^73:1). The planet's mass is estimated at 4.3–10.9 Jupiter masses, the atmosphere is enriched in carbon (CH4 abundance ≈7%), and the effective temperature (390–412 K) significantly exceeds the equilibrium temperature (160 K). Cooling models point to a heating event associated with migration, 3.0–5.5 billion years after the star transitioned to the white dwarf stage, which is consistent with tidal evolution to the current circular orbit with a radius of 0.02 AU. These results offer a glimpse into the future of giant planets around solar-type stars.
threads: Планета у мёртвой звезды хранила тепло миллиарды лет. JWST засёк её инфракрасное свечение — как камень, что помнит полуденный зной. Атмосфера выдала метан и следы древней приливной катастрофы. Такие миры — ключ к будущему нашего Юпитера, когда Солнце станет белым карликом.

title: Atmosphere of a Planet around a White Dwarf: Hydrocarbons, Aerosols, and Nighttime Thermal Emission
oneliner: JWST has for the first time studied the atmosphere of a giant planet that survived its star's death, finding methane, aerosols, and thermal glow from the night side.
description: Astronomers used the JWST space telescope to observe a transit of the planet WD 1856 b across a white dwarf. The transmission spectrum in the 0.5–5.0 µm range revealed the presence of hydrocarbons (including methane with a confidence of 17:1–30:1), aerosols, and thermal emission from the night side
abstract: Transmission spectroscopy of exoplanet WD 1856 b at a white dwarf was performed with the JWST's NIRSpec PRISM instrument in the 0.5–5.0 μm range. The spectrum reveals the presence of hydrocarbons (odds ratio in favor of CH₄ 17:1–30:1), aerosols (odds ratio 2×10⁵:1–2×10⁶:1), and thermal emission from the nightside (2×10⁶³:1–2×10⁷³:1). The analysis constrains the object’s mass to 4.3–10.9 Jupiter masses, reveals a carbon-enriched atmosphere with a methane abundance of about 7% and an effective temperature of 390–412 K, significantly higher than the equilibrium value (~160 K). Cooling models point to a heating event associated with migration that occurred 3.0–5.5 billion years ago, already in the white dwarf stage, consistent with tidal evolution to the current circular orbit of radius 0.02 AU. These results open up the possibility of studying the ultimate fate of giant planets around solar-type stars.
threads: Среди звёздного пепла, где умирают солнца, вращается тлеющий гигант. WD 1856 b — планета, пережившая ад красного гиганта, теперь мерцает собственным инфракрасным светом. Её атмосфера насыщена метаном, словно дымом от затухающего костра. Открытие доказывает: даже после смерти звезды жизнь планетных систем продолжается. Заглянув в спектр этого мира, мы впервые читаем химическую летопись космического выживания. Скоро таких маяков станет больше — и финал звёздной эволюции переста

title: Quasars Shedding Dusty Cocoons: Extreme Outflows and Weak Lines
oneliner: Discovered: quasars with extreme outflows and weak emission lines are objects shedding their dusty cocoons.
