description: A study of rare quasars with broad absorption lines (BAL) and weak emission lines has shown they are in a phase of 'blowing off' their dusty cocoon. Using spectroscopy and polarimetry, scientists determined their redshifts, black hole masses, and outflow velocities reaching 0.16 times the speed of l
abstract: Six quasars similar to the LoBAL quasar GQ 1309+2904 were studied, with extremely weak emission lines except for Hα. Redshifts (z≈2.07–3.28) measured from Hα. All objects have high-velocity outflows (up to ~0.16c), five are LoBAL. Black hole masses (around 10^8.7–10^9.4 M⊙) and Eddington ratios (0.14–0.34) indicate very massive and active centers. The continua are reddish: for three, the reddening curve is close to that of the Small Magellanic Cloud, while three show additional ultraviolet suppression. The polarization of two of them and GQ 1309+2904 is low, suggesting observation along a direction close to the rotation axis. These objects are interpreted as weak-line quasars in the stage of shedding their dusty cocoon. Dust in the wind is fragmented into small particles, leading to a steeper ultraviolet absorption. An evolutionary scheme is presented.
threads: Квазары — ярчайшие маяки Вселенной. Но некоторые прячутся в плотных пылевых коконах, словно гусеницы перед превращением. Астрономы впервые застали момент, когда такой объект сдувает оболочку со скоростью 48 000 км/с, разбивая пылинки в ультрафиолетовую крошку. В будущем эти переходные формы объяснят, как чёрные дыры управляют ростом галактик и рождают самые мощные ветры в космосе.

title: First-order phase transitions change the game for axion dark matter
oneliner: New research shows how the sudden activation of the axion mass during a cosmic phase transition dramatically changes predictions for relic density and observational signatures.
description: Scientists performed lattice simulations of the axion field in an expanding universe to study how a first-order phase transition affects dark matter production via the misalignment mechanism. They discovered two regimes: a fast transition delays the onset of oscillations, boosting the axion abundanc
abstract: A first-order phase transition can generate the axion mass, making it non-zero only inside expanding true-vacuum bubbles, qualitatively altering misalignment production. Lattice simulations in an expanding universe reveal two regimes. For rapid transitions, oscillations are delayed until bubble percolation, enhancing the relic abundance. For slower transitions, expanding bubbles create spatial gradients that suppress the effective misalignment angle through the bubble misalignment mechanism. A semi-analytical expression for the relic density is derived, providing a unified description of both regimes and accurately reproducing simulation results. This mechanism also modifies isocurvature perturbations and the small-scale matter power spectrum, with significant implications for axion minicluster formation.
threads: Фазовый переход первого рода в ранней Вселенной мог сработать как дирижёр, опоздавший взмахнуть палочкой. Аксионы — кандидаты в тёмную материю — начали свои колебания на десятки тысячелетий позже, чем считалось. Это превращает их в громкий аккорд реликтовой плотности. Теперь учёные ищут отзвуки этой космической симфонии в данных JWST и гравитационных волнах.

title: Aframe AI Matches Classic Sensitivity in Neutron Star Gravitational Wave Search
oneliner: Aframe is the first AI search engine to match the sensitivity of matched filters for binary neutron stars.
description: The Aframe algorithm, previously proven on black hole mergers, has been extended to binary neutron stars. By preprocessing with heterodyning, long signals are compressed into second-long chunks, enabling the use of a compact neural network. In tests on archival LIGO-Virgo data from the third observi
abstract: Gravitational-wave astronomy gained multi-messenger richness after the neutron star merger GW170817, yet real-time detection of similar events remains computationally expensive. We present the neural network–based algorithm Aframe, first deployed for binary black hole detection during the O4 observing run. This work extends the method to neutron star mergers: to handle their longer-duration signals, we apply heterodyning to the data, after which the original network architecture efficiently identifies events. The sensitivity of this novel approach is on par with classic matched-filter pipelines while requiring only a single off-the-shelf GPU for online processing. By adopting inference-as-a-service tools, offline analysis can be scaled across distributed GPU resources. Thus, Aframe delivers not only prompt but also resource-efficient analysis for both streaming and archival data.
threads: Сто лет назад радиоинженеры придумали приём, чтобы выуживать сигнал из шума. Сегодня тот же трюк сжимает минутные «чирики» нейтронных звёзд до полутора секунд. Нейросеть вгрызается в эти сжатые всплески и находит слияния быстрее, чем человек успевает моргнуть. Так мы приближаемся к тому, чтобы видеть гравитационное небо в реальном времени — словно вселенная обретает голос.

title: Quantum Computer Learns to Play Without a False Note
oneliner: Record accuracy of quantum operations: less than one error per thousand steps.
description: Automatic tuning of quantum gates, like a musical instrument, reduced failures to 0.007%. The method remains stable for hours without human intervention — an important step toward reliable quantum computers.
abstract: High-fidelity universal two-qubit gates are the cornerstone of fault-tolerant quantum computing. In scalable superconducting processors, shrinking coherence times increase incoherent errors, and the tight error budget places stricter demands on coherent errors caused by parameter deviations. We propose a closed-loop calibration cycle for the CZ gate based on the ELEA leakage amplification scheme and the CAFE context-aware fidelity estimation. The method suppresses population of non-computational states and, for the first time, demonstrates CZ gate fidelity exceeding 99.9% on an 84-qubit processor with a coherent error down to 0.007%. The median fidelity across 72 gates reached 99.25%, confirming the generalizability of the calibration to parallel operations. The automated procedure showed stability over a 9-hour monitoring period. These results were obtained on a fully domestic platform and pave an efficient path to quantum computing with superconducting systems.
threads: Квантовый процессор из 84 кубитов научили выполнять операции почти без ошибок — точность 99.9%! Это как научить оркестр играть без единой фальшивой ноты. Такой прогресс приближает создание надёжных квантовых компьютеров, способных взломать современную криптографию или смоделировать новые лекарства.

title: Radiation Filtration Dictates Broad-Line Visibility in Quasars
oneliner: The appearance or disappearance of broad emission lines in active galaxies is not determined by the central black hole's power, but by the ionizing radiation flux reaching the gas clouds after filtration in the accretion flow.
description: Broad emission lines are the hallmark of active galactic nuclei, yet they mysteriously weaken at both low and critically high accretion rates. A new study proposes a unified mechanism: the key is the filtration of ionizing radiation by dense inner disk structures. The effective flux reaching the lin
abstract: Broad emission lines (BELs) in active galactic nuclei weaken or disappear at both very low and extremely high accretion rates. It is shown that this behavior arises if line formation is governed not by the intrinsic luminosity of the central source, but by the ionizing radiation that reaches the BEL region after filtering. Effective ionization is the product of intrinsic ionizing power (which increases with accretion) and transmission (which drops at high rates), creating a finite and non-universal window for line formation. This picture uniformly explains the absence or extreme weakness of BELs in low-luminosity nuclei, LINERs, and weak-line quasars, as well as the Baldwin effect and the R_Fe trend. It implies a breakdown of standard scaling relations for the BLR in extreme accretion regimes. A minimal quantitative model reproduces these phenomena as a function of black hole mass, accretion rate, and radiative efficiency, indicating that the phenomenology of emission lines is governed by global regulation of the ionizing field rather than local gas availability.
threads: Квазары похожи на элитный клуб: широкие линии — это неоновая вывеска, видимая лишь когда внутрь попадает нужное число ультрафиолетовых «гостей». Но стоит наплыву стать слишком бурным, вышибала-аккреционный диск закрывает дверь, и вывеска гаснет. Этот же механизм, возможно, заставит нас пересмотреть весы для чёрных дыр.

title: Radio Silence: Why No Periodic Signals from 3I/ATLAS Were Detected
oneliner: Using the FAST telescope, scientists found no artificial periodic radio signals from interstellar object 3I/ATLAS, setting an upper limit on possible transmitter power of 0.146 Watts.
description: The search for extraterrestrial civilizations got a fresh boost from observations of the third known interstellar body, 3I/ATLAS. A team of astronomers applied Canonical Polyadic Decomposition to data from the 500-meter FAST telescope to tease out periodic signals from background noise. A multi-stag
abstract: To search for periodic technosignatures from the interstellar object 3I/ATLAS, the L-band multi-beam receiver of the FAST radio telescope was employed. To extract modulated signals and separate dominant sources in the central beam from multi-beam radio frequency interference, canonical polyadic decomposition (CPD) was applied to multi-beam dynamic spectra. CPD factorizes the data tensor into a set of separable components with corresponding temporal, frequency, and beam signatures. Candidate selection was performed using periodogram and autocorrelation analysis. No credible artificial periodic radio signals with a power above 0.146 W were detected from 3I/ATLAS. This study includes, for the first time for this object, a search for periodically modulated signals and demonstrates the promise of CPD as a multi-beam technosignature detection tool.
threads: Межзвёздный объект 3I/ATLAS молчит. Радиотелескоп FAST прослушал его пульс во всех деталях — ни единого искусственного биения. Наши алгоритмы разложили шум на пряди, как гребень распутывает спутанные волосы, ища один-единственный локон нужного цвета. Верхний предел мощности — крошечные 0,146 Вт. Тишина, которая говорит громче слов: теперь мы знаем, как искать шёпот в урагане. Следующий шаг — ловить миллисекундные импульсы у других звёзд. Возможно, именно там затаился ритм.

title: Is the Sun a Chemical Oddity? Decoding the Makeup of Solar Twins
oneliner: A new study explains the Sun's chemical quirks through galactic evolution, not planet ingestion.
description: Astrophysicists rechecked the composition data of 79 solar twins — stars almost identical to the Sun. Using ultra-precise spectroscopy and Bayesian statistics, they disentangled the contributions of galactic chemical evolution and possible exoplanet swallowing. They found that two-thirds of the star
abstract: A repeat analysis of high-resolution, high signal-to-noise spectra for 79 nearby solar twins was carried out using a differential spectroscopic approach within a Bayesian framework to test hypotheses about the Sun's chemical peculiarity. Using the Korg tool, high-precision atmospheric parameters and elemental abundances for 18 elements were obtained with an average uncertainty of 0.015 dex (3.5%). An independent Bayesian indicator allowed disentangling the contributions of galactic chemical evolution (GCE), planetary engulfment, and intrinsic abundance scatter. It was established that the Sun's features compared to the average twin are primarily due to GCE: 62.3±5.8% of the sample stars exhibit trends characteristic of GCE. Additionally, 2 to 6 candidates with signs of planetary engulfment were identified, warranting further investigation. These results highlight the necessity of accounting for GCE effects when interpreting solar twin abundances and point to a lack of chemical peculiarity for the Sun.
threads: Звезды, словно аккуратные повара, смешивают ингредиенты галактического бульона. Но иногда добавляют в блюдо целые планеты. Астрофизики выяснили, что лишь 3–9% солнцеподобных звезд грешат планетарным каннибализмом. Наше Солнце — добросовестный кулинар, его рецепт диктует сама Галактика. Эта скромность позволяет планетам вроде Земли существовать.

title: From Computer Prediction to Lab Synthesis: How to Find 25 Stable Materials Out of 894
oneliner: Hierarchical screening based on thermodynamics and dynamics leaves only a few percent of predicted structures truly ready for synthesis.
description: Modern machine learning methods generate thousands of hypothetical materials, but experiment confirms only a handful. A new study proposes a three-stage filtration system: from a rough assessment of thermodynamic stability, through dynamic analysis of lattice vibrations and molecular dynamics, to hi
abstract: A hierarchical screening scheme for synthesis candidates is proposed. At the first stage, from 894 compounds previously claimed as stable, after removing duplicates and checking against full phase diagrams in the PBE approximation, 298 remained. Next, dynamic stability was evaluated using universal machine-learning interatomic potentials: harmonic phonons and finite-temperature molecular dynamics reduced the set to 166 structures. Thermodynamic refinement with the SCAN method left 109, and the final priority list of 25 candidates was compiled based on decomposition enthalpy and chemical space completeness. This protocol turns stability predictions into realistically achievable synthetic targets.
threads: Поиск нового материала — как прослушивание в оркестр: из сотен музыкантов лишь единицы проходят. Физики построили трёхступенчатый кастинг, проверяя термодинамический слух и динамическую выдержку. Итог: 25 идеальных исполнителей из 894. Именно они могут стать основой для квантовых чипов и батарей будущего.

title: Gravitational Waves from Primordial Black Holes: Low-Frequency and High-Frequency Signals as a Unified Probe of the Early Universe
oneliner: The same primordial curvature perturbations produce two types of gravitational waves—a low-frequency stochastic background and a high-frequency signal from mergers, paving the way for multi-band gravitational-wave astronomy.
description: This work unifies scalar-induced gravitational waves (SIGW) and the stochastic background from primordial black hole (PBH) mergers into a single model. Using constraints on PBH abundance, the authors computed SIGW spectra for spherical and ellipsoidal collapse, and also calculated the merger backgro
abstract: The formation of primordial black holes requires a significant amplification of curvature perturbations. This process leaves a dual gravitational-wave imprint: a low-frequency stochastic background of scalar-induced waves and a high-frequency signal from the mergers of binary systems composed of these black holes. For a monochromatic mass function, a model-independent relation between the two observable signals is established, based on constraints linking the abundance of primordial black holes to the power spectrum. It is shown that within both spheroidal and ellipsoidal collapse scenarios, the latter yields a much stronger background signal. Analysis of the merger signal reveals a direct correspondence between the frequency of the scalar-induced peak and the innermost stable circular orbit (ISCO) frequency of the binary system. The peak of the total merger spectrum is linked to the ISCO by a universal relation: the peak frequency is always 1.79 times higher than the ISCO frequency, regardless of masses. Thus, a unified approach connects gravitational-wave channels separated in frequency, allowing the same initial fluctuations to be probed in widely spaced bands.
threads: Первичные чёрные дыры звучат на двух частотах одновременно — как колокол, дающий низкий гул и высокий звон от одного удара. Связав их единой формулой, мы получаем гравитационный «тюнер» для Вселенной. Если пульсарные тайминги уловят гул на наногерцах, можно будет предсказать сигнал слияний в полосе LIGO. Многоволновая гравитационная астрономия становится реальностью.

title: Gravitational Waves from Primordial Black Holes: Linking Low and High Frequencies
oneliner: The gravitational wave spectrum, born from scalar perturbations during primordial black hole formation, is directly linked to the frequency of their future mergers.
description: The formation of primordial black holes (PBHs) requires significant amplification of primordial curvature perturbations. This generates a dual gravitational-wave signal: a low-frequency stochastic background from scalar-induced gravitational waves (SIGWs) and a high-frequency signal from merging bin
abstract: The formation of primordial black holes requires a significant amplification of the spectrum of primordial curvature perturbations. This process generates two types of gravitational waves: a low-frequency stochastic background induced by scalar perturbations, and a high-frequency signal from binary mergers. For a monochromatic mass function, a model-independent connection is established between these observables. Based on constraints on primordial black hole abundance and the power spectrum of perturbations, the induced background is estimated for spherical and ellipsoidal collapse models; it is shown that the ellipsoidal scenario yields a significantly stronger signal. The merger analysis revealed a direct correspondence between the peak frequency of the background and the frequency of the innermost stable circular orbit (ISCO). The peak of the total merger spectrum is linked to the ISCO frequency by the universal relation f_peak = 1.79 f_ISCO, independent of the component masses. Such a unified approach connects disparate gravitational-wave channels, enabling the probing of the same primordial fluctuations across widely separated frequency ranges.
threads: Одно колебание гравитационной волны, которую ловят пульсарные сети, длится тридцать лет. Но если бы это был сигнал от слияния первичных чёрных дыр, он бы визжал на частоте 34 килогерца — далеко за пределами слышимого. Это не два разных явления, а две октавы одного космического аккорда, жёстко связанные изящным уравнением. Настраивая уши на басы и флейты, мы можем подслушать шёпот тёмной материи и рождение чёрных дыр в первый миг Вселенной.

title: Gaia23bra b: TESS First Finds a Planet via Gravitational Microlensing
oneliner: The TESS space telescope, originally designed to search for transiting exoplanets, unexpectedly discovered a giant planet using gravitational microlensing.
description: For the first time during the TESS mission, a planet has been detected using gravitational microlensing. The event Gaia23bra, initially identified by the Gaia alert system as a single lens, displayed characteristic caustic-crossing peaks in the TESS data, revealing the binary nature of the lens. Joi
abstract: The discovery of Gaia23bra b is reported — the first gravitationally bound planet detected by microlensing using the TESS satellite. The Gaia23bra event, initially classified as a single-star lensing event, was serendipitously observed by TESS over two consecutive sectors; the light curve revealed caustic features characteristic of a binary lens. Joint modeling of Gaia and TESS photometry with pyLIMA, complemented by Bayesian inference of stellar parameters via pyLIMASS, points to a host star — an orange dwarf with a mass of 0.79^{+0.19}_{-0.17} M☉ and a Jupiter-like planet with a mass of 1.63_{-0.38}^{+0.42} M_Jup at a projected distance of about 4.8 AU. The result highlights the synergy of high-frequency photometry and long-term monitoring for robust characterization of microlensing events. The event's location in the Galactic plane demonstrates the unexpected potential of TESS for microlensing studies beyond the Galactic bulge thanks to its full-sky coverage.
threads: Каждую ночь телескоп TESS снимает небо кадрами длиной 200 секунд. В один из дней 2023 года среди миллионов звёзд он поймал быстрое двойное мерцание — как если бы далёкий фонарь дважды мигнул, когда перед ним пролетела невидимая птица. Так была открыта планета-гигант, выданная искривлённым светом. Теперь такие «гравитационные птахи» могут стать массовым объектом охоты для будущих обсерваторий.

title: False Vacuum Decay in a Two-Dimensional Quantum Spin System
oneliner: Quantum decay of a metastable state through the nucleation and growth of true vacuum bubbles.
description: Researchers studied false vacuum decay in the quantum Ising model on a square lattice using numerical simulations with tensor networks. They extracted the decay rate, effective surface tension, and critical bubble size, comparing the results with semiclassical field theory. Excellent agreement was f
abstract: False vacuum decay describes the relaxation of a metastable state through the nucleation and growth of bubbles of the stable phase. Despite its wide applicability across fields, the quantum theory of nucleation has had scant experimental or numerical validation, especially in two or more spatial dimensions. This work investigates false vacuum decay in a two-dimensional quantum Ising model. Using tree-tensor-network simulations, the decay rate, effective surface tension, and critical bubble size are extracted. Comparison with new semiclassical field-theoretic calculations shows excellent agreement. The results provide numerical evidence that the critical bubble concept holds in an interacting quantum spin system in 2+1 dimensions.
threads: В сердце метастабильного вакуума тикает бомба с квантовым часовым механизмом. Физики рассчитали, как рождается и растёт пузырёк истинного вакуума — микроскопический зародыш, способный переписать все законы разом. Подобно переохлаждённой воде, ждущей малейшего толчка, такое состояние ждёт лишь спонтанную флуктуацию. Та же математика определяет устойчивость поля Хиггса. Квантовые симуляторы приближают день, когда мы не только предскажем, но и создадим такой переход в лаборатори

title: Boson stars violating energy conditions: a key to gravitational waves of a new type
oneliner: New research shows that in teleparallel gravity, excited boson stars can violate classical energy conditions, generating unique gravitational-wave signals that could be detected by the LISA space antenna.
description: A group of physicists from China investigated boson stars in a modified theory of gravity with nonminimal coupling between a scalar field and spacetime torsion. It turned out that excited states of such stars can have negative energy density, leading to the violation of all four classical energy con
abstract: Within teleparallel gravity with non-minimal coupling, static spherically symmetric solutions for boson stars in ground and excited states are explored. It is shown that energy density in excited states can become negative, violating all four standard energy conditions. For the investigated ground states, energy density remains positive and all energy conditions hold. Additionally, gravitational wave signals from extreme mass-ratio inspirals (EMRI) hosting such boson stars are considered. The characteristic strain in the frequency domain falls within LISA's sensitivity range, potentially serving as an observational marker to distinguish between compact astrophysical objects.
threads: Бозонные звёзды — это гравитационные атомы: облака скалярного поля на квантовых орбитах вокруг собственной гравитации. В возбуждённом состоянии их энергия становится отрицательной — законы, запрещающие такое, нарушены. Их гравитационные волны может поймать LISA. Мы на пороге обнаружения объектов без горизонта событий, и это изменит представления о пространстве-времени.

title: Chiral magnons and 'plaid' splitting in the altermagnet MnTe2
oneliner: Experiment and theory reveal chiral spin waves with nontrivial polarization in the antiferromagnet MnTe2.
description: The study demonstrates that chiral magnons—quanta of spin waves with a definite circular polarization—emerge in the pyrite-type antiferromagnet MnTe2. Using polarization-resolved Raman spectroscopy, an imbalance in scattering intensity between crossed circular channels is observed, which changes sig
abstract: Altermagnets combine compensated antiferromagnetic order with spin-split excitations driven by crystal symmetry. Experimental detection of such materials is challenging. In this work, using helicity- and angle-resolved Raman spectroscopy in MnTe₂, a lowering of magnon rotational symmetry and a pronounced imbalance between left- and right-circular polarization are revealed, pointing to momentum-dependent magnon chirality. First-principles DFT+U calculations and linear spin-wave theory uncover a distinctive checkerboard structure of spin splitting in momentum space. The emergent magnon spin textures are governed by the non-trivial symmetry of MnTe₂ sublattices and mimic the altermagnetic splitting of electronic bands. These findings provide evidence for chiral spin waves unique to this non-coplanar antiferromagnet.
threads: Физики нашли в «золоте дураков» спиновые волны, закрученные как нити шотландского тартана. В антиферромагнетике MnTe2 магноны обладают хиральностью: левый и правый вихри разделены в импульсном пространстве. Клетчатая текстура поляризации — готовый шаблон для спиновых диодов и безмагнитной логики.

title: Entropy of non-Abelian anyons: a new measurement method via interferometry
oneliner: A method is proposed for extracting the fractional entropy of non-Abelian anyons from temporal current fluctuations in quantum Hall interferometers.
description: The article presents a theoretical scheme for measuring the entropy of single non-Abelian anyons in the fractional quantum Hall effect. The method is based on an antidot—an isolated region within the Hall liquid capable of trapping fractional charges. Using Maxwell relations linking charge and entro
abstract: Non-abelian anyons in fractional quantum Hall states possess a characteristic entropy equal to the Boltzmann constant times the natural logarithm of the quantum dimension d. For the 5/2 filling factor, d is the square root of two. This entropy, on the order of k_B, could be extracted from charge measurements of an antidot, but equilibrium charge measurements in fractional antidots are difficult. A scheme is proposed where the antidot is embedded in an interferometer: the charge is inferred from recently observed temporal switching of the interference phase. Performing such nonlocal measurements in equilibrium allows the characteristic entropy to be extracted at intermediate temperatures—above the level spacing of the interferometer edge but far below the antidot level spacing. This opens the door to direct detection of topological quantum dimensions.
threads: Когда энион попадает в ловушку, интерференционный ток начинает перемигиваться, словно телеграф. В этом мерцании закодирована энтропия — логарифм квантовой размерности. Для состояния 5/2 это всего 0.35 постоянной Больцмана. Но именно эта малость выдаёт топологический порядок, необходимый для отказоустойчивых квантовых вычислений. Каждый шумовой импульс — улика на пороге новой эпохи.

title: Sulfur Chemistry Around a B[e] Supergiant: Discovery of SO and SO₂ Molecules
oneliner: For the first time, sulfur oxides have been detected in the ejecta of a massive star, pointing to complex non-equilibrium chemistry.
description: Using ALMA radio telescopes, astronomers have performed the first millimeter-wavelength survey of the surroundings of the rare B[e] supergiant HD 87643 and detected emission from SO, SO₂, and other sulfur-bearing molecules. This marks the first detection of such molecules around a hot, evolved massi
abstract: The study of the B[e]-supergiant HD 87643 with ALMA led to the first detection of SO and SO₂ molecules, as well as other sulfur-bearing compounds, in the vicinity of an evolved massive star of early spectral type. The high relative concentration of SO₂ (with respect to H₂) is reproduced by chemical modeling over timescales of ~10⁴ years in an oxygen-rich environment, indicating short-lived non-equilibrium chemistry. An anomalously low isotopic ratio ³²SO/³³SO was measured, explained by mass-independent fractionation under the influence of intense photochemistry — a mechanism analogous to that proposed to explain excesses of ³³S in the atmosphere of Archean Earth. The results demonstrate that B[e]-supergiants can serve as unique laboratories for studying sulfur chemistry under extreme radiation conditions, and open up the possibility of linking isotopic fractionation processes with signatures recorded in the early geological record.
threads: Вокруг гигантской звезды, которая вот-вот взорвется, астрономы нашли целый завод по производству серной кислоты — в космическом масштабе. Причем вся сера в системе оказалась заперта в молекулах SO₂, а её изотопный состав искажён так, словно над облаком поработал природный фотохимический реактор. Это открытие не только переписывает учебники астрохимии, но и связывает смерть массивных звёзд с загадками ранней Земли. Возможно, ключи к происхождению жизни стоит искать не в колыбе

title: Cosmic Heartbeat: NICER Tracks the Rhythms of Black Hole 4U 1630−47
oneliner: Analysis of the 2025 outburst in the X-ray binary system 4U 1630−47 by the NICER telescope revealed a link between quasi-periodic oscillations and changes in the accretion disk, and recorded a faint millihertz modulation resembling a 'heartbeat'.
description: In 2025, the NICER X-ray telescope recorded an outburst from black hole 4U 1630−47, a system where matter from a companion star falls onto the compact object. The main goal was to study quasi-periodic oscillations (QPOs)—rhythmic variations in X-ray emission whose frequency changed as brightness inc
abstract: Using NICER data from the 2025 outburst of the X-ray binary 4U 1630-47, we studied the spectral-timing properties of transient low-frequency QPOs and millihertz quasi-regular modulation (QRM). During the rise phase, the QPO frequency climbed from ~0.24 Hz to ~3.43 Hz. Wavelet-based state separation showed that intervals with QPOs exhibit a higher inner disk temperature and lower normalization of the disk component (diskbb), with only minor changes in the photon index Γ. Near the peak, a QRM at ~0.07 Hz with an amplitude of ~4.7% rms was detected — weaker than the 2023 'heartbeat'. Phase-resolved Hilbert–Huang analysis revealed a positive correlation between disk temperature and flux, an anti-correlation with normalization, and weak variation in Γ. Thus, short-term variability is most strongly imprinted through disk parameters; transient QPOs align with disk variability during the rise, and the millihertz QRM may represent a damped version of the 'heartbeat' mode.
threads: Каждые 15 секунд чёрная дыра в 37 500 световых годах от нас тихо вздрагивает. NICER — рентгеновский стетоскоп на МКС — услышал этот слабый ритм, похожий на космическое сердцебиение. Оказалось, что и быстрые осцилляции диска, и медленная пульсация подчиняются одному закону: диск то сжимается, то раздувается, словно дышит. Мы учимся читать эту кардиограмму, а в перспективе — напрямую измерять спин чёрной дыры по её пульсу.

title: Diamond qubit based on a nickel-vacancy center with all-optical control and millisecond quantum memory
oneliner: A single nickel-vacancy center in diamond realizes a fully optically controlled spin qubit with coherence over a millisecond at 1.65 K, paving the way to compact and scalable nodes for quantum networks.
description: Quantum networks for distributed quantum computing and secure communication require nodes that combine a fast optical interface and long-lived qubit memory. Traditional diamond defects — nitrogen-vacancy (NV⁻) and silicon-vacancy (SiV⁻) — have fundamental limitations: NV⁻ has a low yield of useful p
abstract: Quantum networks demand qubits with simultaneous efficient optical access, coherent control, and long-lived quantum memory — merging these capabilities in a single scalable platform remains a key challenge. Transition metal defects in diamond offer a novel route thanks to spin-orbit protected ground-state coherence, all-optical control, and near-infrared emission. On a single nickel-vacancy center (NiV⁻), a fully optically controlled spin qubit with coherence times exceeding 1 ms at 1.65 K, compatible with compact closed-cycle cryocoolers, is demonstrated. Raman Rabi oscillations and Ramsey interferometry are realized, and all-optical dynamical decoupling boosts coherence from T₂* = 371 ns to T₂(CPMG-4) = 1.27 ms. These results establish NiV⁻ as a practical spin-photon interface.
threads: Кусочек алмаза меньше атома хранит квантовую информацию дольше, чем свет летит к Луне и обратно. Спин никеля, словно маятник в вакууме, качается без помех почти полторы миллисекунды – и всё благодаря хитрым d-орбиталям. Физики получили первый полностью оптический кубит с миллисекундной памятью. Так мы приближаемся к квантовому интернету, где информация передаётся фотонами, а хранится в алмазных узлах.

title: Superconductivity from Chaos: How Defects in Graphene Give Birth to Quantum Order
oneliner: Disorder in monolayer graphene induces globally coherent superconductivity at vanishingly small attraction due to quantum geometry.
description: In ideal graphene, superconductivity requires unrealistically strong interactions. However, introducing vacancies or hydrogen adatoms creates a sharp peak in the density of states at the Fermi energy, akin to a flat band. Using a self-consistent solution of the Bogoliubov–de Gennes equations, the au
abstract: It is shown that superconductivity can emerge purely from disorder, as demonstrated in monolayer graphene. In the clean limit, graphene's semimetallic nature requires prohibitively strong electronic interactions to achieve superconductivity. Introducing a low concentration of vacancies or hydrogenation creates a large density of low-energy states that readily induce superconductivity. For conventional s-wave pairing, disorder generates a finite order parameter for arbitrarily weak attractive interactions; global phase coherence is established not through isolated islands, but thanks to a finite superfluid weight of purely geometric origin. Similarly, hydrogenation yields a finite critical temperature and non-zero superfluid weight. For unconventional nearest-neighbor pairing, usually destroyed by disorder, superconductivity exhibits quantum-critical behavior, yet phase coherence is maintained at weak interactions, displaying mixed d-wave symmetries.
threads: В идеальном графене электроны мчатся со скоростью света, не замечая друг друга. Но внесите хаос — удалите каждый десятый атом — и возникает иной мир. Квантовая паутина дефектов сплетает электронные облака в единый узор, проводящий ток без сопротивления. Расчёты обещают сверхпроводимость при температурах жидкого азота. Это путь к материалам из «мусора» — лёгким, гибким, настраиваемым. Как в «Дюне»: хаос рождает новый порядок, и мы учимся им управлять.

title: Light Trap for Nanoparticles
oneliner: Engineers create surfaces that trap nanoparticles using light pressure alone.
description: Special surfaces, optimized by computer algorithms, capture and hold the tiniest particles with the force of light. This technology is essential for ultrasensitive sensors, precise assembly of microdevices, and even manipulation of individual atoms in quantum systems.
abstract: An approach based on density-based topological optimization is proposed for designing plasmonic metasurfaces intended for optical trapping of nanoparticles. The forces acting on particles of various sizes and materials are calculated via the Maxwell stress tensor. The objective function is the maximization of the gradient (attractive) force under normal incidence of monochromatic light. First, free-form designs are explored, then fabrication constraints are imposed to obtain realizable planar structures. It is found that the topology of the optimal metasurfaces depends on the nanoparticle size and material, with greater trapping stiffness achieved for small particles. The resulting structures can enable selective mass trapping of particles, which is promising for biosensing, microfabrication, and the assembly of quantum systems.
threads: Свет давит на предметы: крошечную частицу он может схватить и держать, как пинцет. Теперь алгоритмы создают поверхности, которые усиливают эту хватку в сотни раз, чтобы ловить вирусы и собирать квантовые детали.

title: Dark Phase Transition: Testing the Model with Pulsar Timing Arrays
oneliner: Could a phase transition in a hidden sector at temperatures of tens of MeV generate the gravitational waves detected by pulsar timing arrays?
description: Recent observations by pulsar timing array (PTA) collaborations have uncovered a stochastic gravitational-wave background in the nanohertz band. We performed a precision thermodynamic analysis of the simplest dark sector model — an abelian Higgs model — capable of a first-order phase transition at l
abstract: This work is motivated by recent hints from pulsar timing array (PTA) collaborations of a stochastic gravitational-wave background. Phase transitions in a dark Abelian Higgs sector—a minimal gauge theory with spontaneous symmetry breaking—are explored. Using dimensionally reduced high-temperature effective field theory, the impact of thermal resummation, higher-order matching corrections, and higher-dimensional operators on thermodynamics and the gravitational-wave signal is assessed. The parameter region favored by PTA lies near the boundary of the effective theory's validity, where contributions from higher operators grow; even within controlled limits the signal remains unfavorable compared to data, despite significant shifts from thermal corrections. Regimes of thermal and hydrodynamic coupling or decoupling between the dark and visible sectors are determined, and asymmetric dark matter freeze-out is consistent with the observed density and the coupling constants needed for strong transitions.
threads: Пульсары — космические метрономы — уловили странный гул наногерцовых гравитационных волн. Но простейшая модель тёмного сектора, как переохлаждённое шампанское, не даёт нужной громкости. Расчёты показывают: «пузырьки» новой фазы слишком тихи. Это значит, что либо мы неправильно поняли рецепт тёмной материи, либо вселенная подкинула нам другой источник — возможно, сверхмассивные чёрные дыры. А может, нужен более экзотический «коктейль».

title: How a Quantum “Pillow” Saves a Black Hole from Infinity
oneliner: A quantum “pillow” turns the deadly infinity at a black hole’s center into a smooth bottom — and it shows in its shadow.
description: A new black hole model incorporates quantum corrections that remove the infinity at the center, turning it into a smooth region. This shifts the horizon, weakens Hawking evaporation, and changes the size of the shadow — the dark silhouette we can observe. By measuring the shadow, we can gauge the st
abstract: The spacetime of the quantum-deformed Kazakov–Solodukhin black hole with deformation parameter η is studied. In the limit η → 0, the model reduces to the Schwarzschild solution, while in strong fields it yields physically significant deviations. The key property is the regularization of the singularity: curvature scalars remain finite near the minimum radius r = η, introducing a minimum length and replacing the divergent core with a smooth region. The deformation shifts the event horizon, alters the mass–radius relation, and reduces surface gravity, lowering the Hawking temperature and slowing evaporation, thus enhancing thermodynamic stability. The photon sphere shifts, modifying strong lensing characteristics; the shadow remains perfectly circular but its size depends on η. The constraint |Rsh(η) − R_obs| ≤ ∆R_obs places an upper limit on the deformation parameter. In the weak field, the deflection angle acquires a quadratic correction ~η², consistent with high-precision tests and testable in strong gravity observations.
threads: Чёрные дыры обычно сжимают всё в точку бесконечной плотности. Но в квантовом мире бесконечностей не бывает — пространство-время на самом дне становится гладким, как дно чаши. Это меняет всё: от того, как дыра испаряется, до того, какую тень она отбрасывает.

title: Neutrino Tomography of the Earth: Results from the IceCube Observatory
oneliner: By measuring the absorption of neutrinos passing through the Earth, the IceCube Neutrino Observatory has for the first time obtained the density profile, mass, and moment of inertia of the planet based on the weak interaction.
description: Using 10.7 years of data collected by the IceCube Neutrino Observatory, scientists measured the attenuation of neutrino fluxes with energies from 500 GeV to 100 TeV passing through the Earth. This attenuation depends on the traversed column density, which allowed the reconstruction of the Earth's ra
abstract: Based on 10.7 years of muon neutrino observations (energies from 500 GeV to 100 TeV) with the IceCube detector at the South Pole, the suppression of the neutrino flux as a function of zenith angle and energy—caused by absorption during passage through Earth—has been measured. Neutrino attenuation depends on the product of path length, density, and energy, allowing the radial density distribution in the interior to be reconstructed. A model of concentric shells with constant density was applied, incorporating neutrino flux parameters, interaction cross-sections, detector response, and systematic uncertainties from the glacial ice. From the posterior density distributions, Earth's mass and polar moment of inertia were derived. These are the most precise measurements of these quantities to date using the weak interaction; they agree with the Preliminary Reference Earth Model (PREM) and independent gravitational data. The results demonstrate that neutrinos open a new avenue for exploring planetary interiors, complementing seismology and gravimetry.
threads: Вы видите Землю насквозь? Для нейтрино она брайль. Каждый километр глубже — и поток тает, как нота в вате. IceCube за десять лет наслушался 368 071 рассказа и расшифровал недра. Массу и вращение вывели по слабому взаимодействию. А дальше — трёхмерная томография других миров. Призраки становятся нашими глазами.

title: Neutrino Tomography of Earth: A New Look at the Planet's Interior
oneliner: Using data from the IceCube Neutrino Observatory, scientists have for the first time measured the density distribution, mass, and moment of inertia of Earth by analyzing the attenuation of high-energy neutrinos passing through the planet.
description: Earth’s internal structure is traditionally studied through seismic methods and gravimetry. Yet neutrinos—particles that hardly interact with matter—offer a fundamentally different, faint probe. In the IceCube collaboration’s work, 10.7 years of observations of muon neutrinos with energies from 500
abstract: Using 10.7 years of muon neutrino data (500 GeV – 100 TeV) from the IceCube detector, including atmospheric and diffuse astrophysical fluxes, the radial density profile of the Earth has been reconstructed for the first time via the weak interaction. Neutrino absorption depends on the traversed columnar density and energy, so measuring the flux suppression as a function of zenith angle allows fitting a model of concentric homogeneous shells, accounting for fluxes, interaction cross sections, detector response, and glacial ice systematics. From the posterior density distributions, the Earth's mass and polar moment of inertia were computed — the most accurate values obtained by non-gravitational and non-seismic methods, consistent with PREM and independent gravitational measurements. The result demonstrates that neutrinos open a new way to probe planetary interiors, based on a different physical mechanism and complementing seismology and gravimetry.
threads: Десять лет льда и света: IceCube собрал 368 тысяч нейтрино, прошивших Землю насквозь. Их ослабление нарисовало портрет недр — плотность, масса, момент инерции сошлись с сейсмическими моделями. Частицы-призраки стали самым чистым зондом планеты. Следующий шаг — нейтринная томография Марса, чтобы понять, куда исчезло его магнитное поле.

title: First Detection of Traces of Extra Dimensions in the Cosmic Microwave Background
oneliner: Analysis of Planck satellite data has for the first time constrained non-Gaussianity from Kaluza-Klein gravitons and the radion.
description: In the search for physics beyond the Standard Model, scientists turn to the early Universe, where energies reached colossal scales. Extra spatial dimensions, which predict the existence of massive particles—the radion and Kaluza-Klein gravitons—are of particular interest. If such particles were prod
abstract: Тяжёлые моды и гравитоны Калуцы–Клейна из дополнительных измерений, избегая обнаружения в земных экспериментах, могут рождаться во время инфляции и генерировать первичную негауссовость через неизбежное взаимодействие с возмущениями плотности. В искривлённой пятимерной модели вычислены полные биспектры, опосредованные радионом и КК-гравитонами, и впервые выполнен поиск этих сигналов в данных Planck 2018 по температуре и поляризации. Статистически значимых свидетельств негауссовости не найдено; максимальная значимость составила 1.8σ для массы КК-гравитона около 1.6H (H — параметр Хаббла во время инфляции). Дополнительно идентифицирована 5D-конфигурация, естественно производящая негауссовость с параметром f_NL в диапазоне 1–50, что находится в пределах досягаемости будущих обзоров неба.
threads: Каждую секунду сквозь ваше тело проходят миллиарды реликтовых фотонов — посланий из эпохи, когда Вселенной было 380 тысяч лет. Но в этом древнем свете зашифрованы и более ранние события — вздохи инфляции, способные породить частицы из свёрнутых измерений, словно неслышимые обертоны. Чувствительность будущих телескопов растёт, и через десять лет мы, возможно, расшифруем эти спектральные линии, открыв физику, недоступную коллайдерам.

title: The contribution of white dwarf kicks to the population of free-floating planets
oneliner: The birth of a white dwarf is accompanied by a gentle kick that can eject planets from old systems, creating a special class of warm free-floating worlds.
description: A scenario is proposed for the formation of free-floating planets (FFPs) via kicks experienced by white dwarfs during their formation from asymptotic giant branch stars. It is shown analytically and through numerical simulations that while direct kick ejections only account for ~1% of known exoplane
abstract: We explored an alternative scenario for the formation of free-floating planets (FFPs) in old planetary systems, linked to the recoil impulse when a white dwarf (WD) forms from an asymptotic giant branch (AGB) star. Observations confirm that WDs get a gentle kick during shell ejection. We show that while only ~1% of known planets have their gravitational bonds directly broken, in more than 40% of long-period multi-planet systems this kick triggers dynamical instability, leading to planet ejection in about half the cases. Additionally, planets leaving the system experience strong and prolonged heating from the increased luminosity of the AGB star. Due to low ejection velocities (a result of the kick's weakness), these heated FFPs linger near their parent stars for several million years, which enables their association. Thus, the contribution of WD kicks forms a distinct, observationally identifiable subpopulation of FFPs, making up a few percent of all Galactic FFPs, which is relevant for the upcoming Roman Galactic Exoplanet Survey.
threads: Белые карлики, тихо угасающие остатки звёзд, иногда рождаются с крошечным толчком — всего 0,75 км/с. Этого достаточно, чтобы превратить многопланетную систему в хаос. Как от брошенного в воду камня, расходятся круги нестабильности: до половины систем теряют свои миры, выбрасывая их в межзвёздное пространство. Ещё тёплые после купания в лучах умирающей звезды, эти планеты становятся тепловыми маяками — идеальной добычей для будущих телескопов, таких как Roman.

title: Hidden Rings in the Protoplanetary Disk of CI Tau: The Azimuthal Brightness Modulation Method
oneliner: Astronomers discovered hidden dust rings in the disk of the young star CI Tau using azimuthal brightness modulation in ALMA images.
description: Protoplanetary disks often contain rings and gaps, but the narrowest structures can remain unresolved due to the limited resolution of telescopes. By analyzing azimuthal brightness profiles in ALMA observations at multiple wavelengths, scientists identified a characteristic double peak on the minor
abstract: The azimuthal brightness modulation method, based on the contribution of several unresolved optically thick rings embedded in an optically thin background, was applied to multiwavelength ALMA observations of CI Tau at Bands 3, 6, and 7. Analysis of azimuthal brightness profiles along narrow rings and comparison with synthetic observations of inclined disks containing unresolved rings revealed a signature at ~22 AU in all three bands. Multiwavelength modeling constrained the geometry and optical depth of the rings, consistent with conditions expected for streaming instability and early planetesimal formation. The results confirm the method's applicability to real disks, reveal fine dust substructure in CI Tau, and offer a new way to study early stages of planet formation below the nominal resolution limit.
threads: Они не видны напрямую — слишком тонки даже для ALMA. Но их выдает двойной пик яркости, словно эхо невидимого колокола. В диске молодой звезды CI Tau астрономы расслышали сигнал скрытых пылевых колец — колыбелей будущих планет. Так свет, меняя тональность на наклонном диске, рисует архитектуру незримого. Возможно, именно так начиналась и наша Солнечная. Теперь метод «двойного эха» применят к сотням других дисков.

title: A Polar Perspective on Dark Matter: How Convolutional Networks Spot Invisible Subhalos
oneliner: Transforming gravitational lens images from Cartesian to polar coordinates boosts machine learning detection of dark matter subhalos.
description: The study explores how converting strong gravitational lens images to polar coordinates improves convolutional neural networks' ability to detect dark matter subhalos. This simple tweak aligns with the ring-like structure of lenses and, on synthetic HST data, boosted the subhalo detection rate by ~1
abstract: Small-scale gravitational lensing enables study of dark matter substructure: subhalos within lensing galaxies cause perturbations in extended arcs of background sources. A convolutional neural network is proposed that predicts subhalo mass and its uncertainty. On mock images simulating Hubble data, networks trained on Cartesian and polar representations were compared under varying initialization, noise, and concentration (c=60 and 30). The polar representation systematically increased the fraction of detected subhalos across the mass range. For subhalos with masses of 10^9–10^9.5 solar masses, the improvement was about 15%. Pre-trained networks outperformed randomly initialized ones; polar input also improved results for noisy data and low-concentration subhalos. The gain is greatest in the most challenging detection cases. Switching to polar coordinates is a computationally nearly free way to boost the sensitivity of neural network-based subhalo searches.
threads: Представьте гоночную трассу, свёрнутую в кольцо. Механик ищет дефект, но на вираже его не видно. Разверните трек в прямую — и каждая кочка бросается в глаза. Именно так астрономы переводят кольца Эйнштейна в полярные координаты, чтобы выловить сгустки тёмной материи. Метод повышает точность на 15%. Возможно, так мы узнаем, холодная она, тёплая или самовзаимодействующая.

title: Polar Coordinates Improve Detection of Dark Subhalos in Strong Lenses
oneliner: Transforming images of strong gravitational lenses into polar coordinates boosts neural network efficiency in detecting dark matter subhalos by up to 15%.
description: This study explores how switching from Cartesian to polar coordinates affects the ability of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to infer the masses of dark subhalos in simulated Hubble Space Telescope images. The authors designed a machine learning architecture that predicts subhalo mass along wit
abstract: Strong gravitational lensing lets us probe dark matter on small scales through perturbations that subhalos introduce into arc images. The study explores whether switching images to polar coordinates boosts the ability of convolutional neural networks to estimate subhalo mass. An architecture is proposed that predicts mass along with an uncertainty estimate. Using simulated data mimicking Hubble Space Telescope observations, models were pitted against each other on Cartesian versus polar representations under varied initializations, noise levels, and subhalo concentrations (c=60, c=30). Polar representations consistently score a higher detection fraction of subhalos across all tested masses; for masses 10^9–10^9.5 M⊙, that fraction climbs by roughly 15%. The edge holds even under tough conditions: at low signal-to-noise ratios and for low-concentration subhalos, where perturbations are barely visible. Transforming to polar coordinates turns out to be a computationally cheap way to sharpen neural network detection of subhalos.
threads: Когда астрономы смотрят на кольцо Эйнштейна, они видят искажённое отражение далёкой галактики, но внутри этого светового узора могут прятаться сгустки тёмной материи. Чтобы их найти, достаточно развернуть кольцо в прямую линию — как цилиндрическое зеркало, которое превращает хаос в осмысленный образ. Нейросеть, обученная на таких «развёрнутых» снимках, ловит невидимые комки в полтора раза чаще. Возможно, именно так мы наконец увидим истинное лицо тёмной материи.

title: Corkscrew Galaxy: How Twisted Radio Jets Probe Magnetic Fields in Clusters
oneliner: Periodic fluctuations in Faraday rotation in the jet of the Corkscrew galaxy have been reliably linked to its spiral structure for the first time, making it possible to distinguish the contributions of the jet's and the surrounding medium's magnetic fields.
description: Using data from the ASKAP radio telescope, astronomers studied the polarization of the Corkscrew Galaxy—a radio galaxy with a pronounced spiral jet morphology. Applying periodic and correlation analysis, they found that the Faraday rotation measure (RM) map shows spatial oscillations matching the je
abstract: We present polarimetric observations of a radio galaxy with a spiral jet (the "Corkscrew Galaxy") at 1296–1440 MHz with the ASKAP telescope (POSSUM survey). We tested the hypothesis linking quasi-periodic oscillations of the jet on the sky plane to Faraday rotation. Significant rotation measure (RM) oscillations were detected with a spatial period of (342±101) arcseconds, which, within the Rayleigh resolution, matches the lateral deviations of the jet of (290±72) arcseconds. Cross-correlation analysis revealed a systematic variation: in the eastern section, jet deviations and RM are in phase, indicating a jet-associated or sheath Faraday screen, while in the west a phase shift points to a change in the dominant rotating medium, with a possible contribution from the intracluster medium. We show that quasi-periodic RM signatures can separate magnetic field sources in AGN jets, and that for some embedded radio galaxies the main RM contribution comes from the local medium near the source rather than the cluster foreground. We outline reliability criteria to rule out spurious detections.
threads: Периодические колебания магнитной меры в джете «Галактики-штопор» совпали с его изгибами, как звук на виниловой пластинке повторяет бороздку. Каждый виток стал ключом: восточный — магнитный почерк самого джета, западный — эхо межгалактической плазмы. Телескопы нового поколения превратят такие спирали в камертоны космического магнетизма, считывая неслышимую музыку скоплений.

title: MEOW: JWST/MIRI Unveils a Hidden Population of Ancient Black Holes
oneliner: The MEOW survey using JWST/MIRI discovered 16 active galactic nuclei at z>4.5, most of which are dust-obscured, reshaping our understanding of early supermassive black hole growth.
description: In a new study presented by the MEOW (MIRI Early Obscured-AGN Wide Survey), astronomers used the MIRI infrared camera on the James Webb Space Telescope to hunt for dust-obscured active galactic nuclei (AGN) at an epoch when the Universe was less than a billion years old. Analyzing the glow of hot du
abstract: The MEOW survey on JWST with the MIRI camera covered 95 square arcminutes in the GOODS-N and GOODS-S fields in the F1000W and F2100W filters down to depths of 0.5 and 3.6 μJy (5σ). Modeling the spectral energy distribution using data from HST, NIRCam, and SCUBA-2 revealed 16 AGN at z=4.5–7.2 (12 spectroscopically confirmed) with bolometric luminosities of 10^44.6–10^46.4 erg/s. Twelve of them are newly discovered, including at least five narrow-line AGN — representatives of the dust-hidden population invisible in the optical range. Two broad-line AGN showed different mid-infrared properties: one is a 'little red dot' (LRD), the other is either a regular AGN or an LRD with bright hot dust. The bolometric luminosity function of obscured AGN at z=4.5–6 is comparable to those of unobscured broad-line AGN and LRDs, indicating that dusty black holes contribute significantly to overall growth. Narrow-line AGN reside in diverse galaxies, and absorption is detected both in the nucleus and the host system — a sign of multiple shielding mechanisms. Thus, MIRI/JWST proves to be a critical link in the multifaceted approach to a complete census of early supermassive black hole activity.
threads: Вселенная молодости — поле битвы: сверхмассивные чёрные дыры растут с невероятной скоростью, но большинство скрыто от нас. Инфракрасный обзор MEOW обнаружил, что «невидимых» активных ядер столько же, сколько ярких квазаров. Они окутаны пылевыми коконами, как гусеницы перед метаморфозой. Эти теневые гиганты могут объяснить, как чёрные дыры набрали миллиарды солнечных масс за первый миллиард лет. Мы привыкли смотреть на свет — но, возможно, главная история скрыта во тьме.

title: Two of the Longest-Period Young Transiting Exoplanets in the HD 114082 System
oneliner: Astronomers have identified a pair of young gas giants with record-breaking orbital periods around the star HD 114082.
description: Around the star HD 114082, just 15 million years old, two transiting exoplanets have been discovered with periods of 225 and 314 days — the longest among known young planets. Observations from TESS, CHEOPS, and ground-based telescopes have determined their radii (1.05 and 1.36 R_J) and set upper mas
abstract: The HD 114082 system has been studied: two transiting planets with record-long periods for young stars have been discovered. Using data from TESS, NGTS, CHEOPS, and ASTEP+, orbits were determined: planet b's period is 225.5504±0.0004 days, planet c's about 400 days. From photometric and radial velocity observations, parameters were derived: for b, semi-major axis 0.791±0.008 AU, eccentricity ~0, inclination 89.791°, radius 1.046 R_J, mass upper limit 1.6 M_J (95%); for c, semi-major axis 0.99 AU, inclination 89.701°, radius 1.36 R_J, mass ≤2.0 M_J (or 0.24 M_J considering transit timing variations). The system contains a debris disk with two dust components. Dynamical modeling (N-body) indicates nearly resonant, coplanar, circular orbits. The results suggest planet formation in situ or beyond the snow line with subsequent migration that affected the disk.
threads: Два юных газовых гиганта обращаются вокруг звезды, которая в сто раз моложе Солнца. Их орбиты — 225 и 314 дней — самые долгие из известных у транзитных планет-подростков. Внутри системы ещё полно пыли и кометного крошева: это не готовая архитектура, а момент сборки. Возможно, именно так и выглядит рождение порядка из хаоса.

title: Why You Can’t Escape a Super-Earth: Gravity and the Rocket Limit
oneliner: Scientists show that from planets more massive than 11.5 Earth masses, chemical rockets can't send even a Voyager-sized probe into interstellar space.
description: Traditional astrobiology searches for biosignatures on exoplanets but rarely asks: could a hypothetical civilization ever leave its world? A new study combines planetary geophysics, atmospheric models, and rocket engineering to map out the 'spacefaring envelope'—the parameter range where chemical ro
abstract: The concept of cosmic suitability is introduced as a planet's ability to allow a chemical rocket to carry a 1000 kg payload onto an escape trajectory. A combined geophysical-atmospheric-astronautical model is developed, optimizing multi-stage rockets and reproducing the launch mass of Saturn V with ~30% accuracy. It is shown that atmospheric pressure in the range 0.1–10 bar changes the required launch mass by up to ~35% on planets with 0.5 Earth mass, but only by a few percent at masses above 4 Earth. Hence, gravity, not drag, sets the main limit for chemical escape from super-Earths. With a limit of ~100 F-1 class engines, escape becomes impractical above ~11.5 Earth masses, confirming the previous ~10 mass cutoff. A framework is proposed for assessing the ability of rocky exoplanets to support technological civilizations capable of spaceflight.
threads: Самые уютные миры могут оказаться самыми жестокими тюремщиками. Новое исследование доказывает: на планетах тяжелее 11 масс Земли даже предельные химические ракеты не вырвутся в космос. Гравитация навечно запирает цивилизацию в колыбели. Это не просто инженерный тупик — это возможная разгадка Великого молчания Вселенной. Искры разума гаснут, так и не став пламенем межзвёздных странствий.

title: Super-Earths and Space Expansion: Can a Civilization Leave Its Planet?
oneliner: New research defines the limits of planetary mass and atmospheric pressure at which chemical rockets can deliver a payload beyond the gravity well.
description: Scientists from Blue Marble Space have created a combined geophysical-atmospheric-rocket model to determine from which exoplanets spacecraft launch is possible. A 1000 kg payload, corresponding to probes like Voyager, is taken as a benchmark. It turned out that on planets more massive than ~11.5 Ear
abstract: Habitability is usually defined by a planet's ability to support life, but here they introduce technological habitability—the capacity for spaceflight, specifically boosting a 1000 kg payload onto an escape trajectory using chemical rockets. A model combining geophysics, atmosphere, and astronautics outlines a 'spaceflight envelope' depending on planetary mass and surface pressure. Multistage rockets are optimized to minimize launch mass while considering reliability; the model reproduces the Saturn V's launch mass to within ~30%. Atmospheric pressure (0.1–10 bar) changes the required mass by up to ~35% on planets twice as light as Earth, but by mere percent on planets above 4 Earth masses. Gravity, not drag, sets the limit: a cap of ~100 F-1 engines makes launch impossible above ~11.5 Earth masses, independently confirming the ~10 Earth mass limit from fuel-ratio arguments. This gives a framework to assess whether rocky exoplanets can spawn spacefaring civilizations.
threads: Чтобы отправить «Вояджер» с Земли, хватило одного двигателя F-1. А вот с планеты вдвое тяжелее пришлось бы собрать гирлянду из десятков моторов — и каждый следующий добавляет не столько тяги, сколько собственного веса. Это как пытаться расплатиться по кредиту, занимая всё больше. Гравитация не прощает: на суперземлях в 11 раз массивнее нашей ракетный долг становится бесконечным. Возможно, именно это объясняет космическое молчание — многие цивилизации просто не в силах вырвать

title: When Repulsion Gives Birth to Pairs: A New Look at Unusual Superconductivity
oneliner: Dynamic screening of Coulomb repulsion in cuprates can create effective attraction for Cooper pair formation, explaining the phase diagram of high-temperature superconductors.
description: The article explores the pairing mechanism of electrons (or holes) in cuprate high-temperature superconductors. Despite fundamental Coulomb repulsion and the Pauli principle, many-body screening processes via superexchange interactions in CuO2 planes lead to effective attraction. Using a triad model
abstract: Even with the Coulomb repulsion and Pauli exclusion trying to keep electrons apart, many-body systems with valley potential landscapes can cook up an effective attraction between electrons or holes. The Kohn-Luttinger mechanism (1965) shows that dynamic screening of the repulsive interaction can coax electrons into Cooper pairs. This study extends that framework to cuprates, where screening emerges from the superexchange dance of virtual holes in the oxygen orbitals of the CuO₂ planes. Using BCS theory, they map out a temperature-doping phase diagram that captures the pseudogap, strange metal, antiferromagnetic, superconducting, and normal states—all lining up nicely with experimental data.
threads: Образ толпы, невольно соединяющей одиночек, неожиданно точен. В купратах квантовый шум превращает свирепое отталкивание в притяжение. Бардин подозревал это ещё в 1965-м. Сегодня мы видим, как из грубой силы рождается сверхпроводящий порядок. Овладев таким экранированием, мы сделаем комнату, полную сверхпроводников, обыденностью.

title: Photosynthesis as a Biomarker: What Will Give Away Life on Other Worlds
oneliner: Photosynthesis can create global biosignatures, such as oxygen and the spectral ‘red edge’ of vegetation, which could be detected by future telescopes on exoplanets.
description: Modern astrobiology is focused on searching for signs of photosynthesis — a process that converts stellar energy into chemical energy and dramatically transforms a planet’s appearance. Based on the NExSS 2026 White Paper, this review examines priority research directions: from the origin of chloroph
abstract: On Earth, oxygenic photosynthesis creates two global biomarkers: oxygen and the red edge of vegetation (a jump in reflectance from red to near-infrared due to chlorophyll a). However, the diversity of phototrophic organisms with other pigments that produce spectral jumps in other ranges suggests that on exoplanets the signatures may be different. To predict such biosignatures, critically important questions have been identified: about the origin, key features, and alternative adaptations of light harvesting, electron transport, rhodopsin-dependent proton pumping, and carbon fixation. The need to consider evolution and ecology when moving from molecular mechanisms to detectable planetary scales is discussed. The questions are linked with the NASA Astrobiology Strategy 2015 and the future Decadal Astrobiology Exploration Strategy.
threads: Фотосинтез — художник, перекрашивающий планеты. На Земле он писал хлорофиллом и оставил «красный край» — невидимый глазу, но заметный телескопам. На других мирах его палитра может быть иной: родопсины, инфракрасные пигменты. Разгадка этих космических полотен может перевернуть наши представления о жизни.

title: When the Black Hole's Edge Doesn't Flinch
oneliner: The stability of a black hole's horizon is determined by a simple sign: whether the invisible flow converges toward the center.
description: New research shows: if an imaginary light flow piercing spacetime converges on a spherical surface, the black hole's boundary remains unshakable. If the flow diverges, the horizon will shatter at the slightest disturbance. This rule will refine modeling of black hole mergers and decoding of gravitat
abstract: A spacetime with a spacelike foliation {Σ_t} is considered, where each slice Σ_t admits a foliation by two-dimensional surfaces S, each with a spacelike unit normal within Σ_t. Under mild energy conditions, it is shown that a MOTS (marginally outer trapped surface) intersecting the integral curves of a past-directed conformal Killing vector field in the normal space of S is strictly stable and smoothly evolves into a spacelike horizon. It is also established that if the divergence of this vector field on S is non-negative, then S is unstable; if it is negative and S is a 2-sphere, then S is strictly stable. The result clarifies the conditions for black hole horizon formation and their stability in dynamical spacetimes.
threads: Край чёрной дыры может быть устойчивым, как кромка водопада — но всё решает направление «космического ветра». Учёные вывели простое правило: если ветер дует внутрь и сжимается, горизонт стабилен. Это поможет точнее моделировать слияния чёрных дыр.

title: Quantum annealing in alloy design: a second life for scrap metal
oneliner: Quantum computing and machine learning pave the way for efficient aluminum waste recycling, creating alloys with an optimal balance of strength and thermal conductivity.
description: Scientists applied a hybrid approach combining factorization machines and quantum annealing to tackle the multi-objective optimization of alloy recycling. Using thermodynamic simulation data, the researchers developed an active learning cycle that iteratively proposes new mixture compositions from f
abstract: A systematic evaluation of a hybrid approach combining factorization machines and quantum annealing (FM+QA) for multi-objective Pareto optimization in creating alloys from recycled metal is conducted. To handle the non-convex nature of the Pareto front, a data-driven Tchebycheff scalarization (DDTS) scheme is employed. Results show that FM+QA extends QUBO optimization to materials search with multiple competing criteria. The scalability of the approach is analyzed, and quantum annealing is compared with classical simulated annealing under plain binary and one-hot encodings. A critical perspective is offered on problem sizes and encoding strategies where quantum-assisted optimization may become practically useful in the near future.
threads: Смятая банка — не мусор, а заготовка для авиационного сплава. Квантовый дирижёр собирает из отходов симфонию прочности и тепла, недоступную обычным домнам. Рецепты рождаются в кубитах, и они уже превосходят первичный металл.

title: Why Are 3D Quantum Spin Liquids Possible?
oneliner: Local constraints and gauge defect topology stabilize fractional excitations in three dimensions.
description: In the conventional view, quantum spin liquids are the domain of low-dimensional systems, but three-dimensional magnets can also avoid magnetic order. The key to stability is not the strength of fluctuations but the structure of the low-energy manifold: when local constraints (ice rule, Gauss’s law)
abstract: The standard narrative ties quantum spin liquids to low dimensionality, but this work argues that three-dimensional systems offer a distinct and stable route to quantum disorder. Instead of fluctuating order, the starting point is a locally constrained low-energy manifold, where quantum dynamics generate an emergent gauge theory with fractionalized excitations. The key insight is that 3D quantum spin liquids can be robust: when local constraints suppress conventional order, and coherent tunneling connects degenerate configurations, a deconfined regime can span finite parameter regions. The discussion focuses on constraint-driven Coulomb phases, weak harmonic order-by-disorder selection, and spin-orbit or multipolar interactions that provide the necessary dynamics. The paper concludes with experimental signatures, candidate materials, and open theoretical challenges for 3D quantum spin liquids.
threads: Представь танец, где каждый шаг — нарушение запрета, но именно эти нарушения сплетаются в квантовый хоровод. В кристалле Dy₂Ti₂O₇ магнитные монополи живут по закону Кулона, а распад диспрозия каждый год незримо ускоряет их рекомбинацию на 0.016%. Когда геометрия диктует бесконечный лабиринт равноправных узоров, трёхмерный кристалл оживает: в нём загорается собственный свет, а заряды дробятся на части. Завтра мы научимся выращивать такие решётки — и они станут колыбелью для то

title: From Packing Disorder to Cubic Order: Crystallization of Ice from Deeply Supercooled Water
oneliner: How atomic disorder during freezing of supercooled microdroplets gives rise to macroscopic cubic symmetry
description: Using cryogenic transmission electron microscopy with a microfluidic cell, researchers directly observed homogeneous freezing of supercooled water at molecular resolution for the first time. It was found that the initially formed ice with packing defects evolves through gradual thickening of cubic l
abstract: Using in situ cryogenic transmission electron microscopy on a platform with membrane-encapsulated microdroplets, the freezing of deeply supercooled water was visualized with molecular resolution. Homogeneous nucleation leads to the formation of ice with stacking faults—a mixture of hexagonal and cubic sequences, where cubic ice initially exists only as isolated monolayers. The gradual thickening of these cubic layers is a key kinetic mechanism: on their basal planes, defect-free cubic nanonuclei emerge, acting as face-oriented kinetic seeds that induce cubic twinning and sequential multiplication of growth branches. This kinetic pathway reproducibly generates eight-armed dendrites with global cubic (octahedral) symmetry, despite strong disorder within each arm. In later stages, the release of latent heat triggers a transition to the thermodynamically favorable hexagonal phase, yet the pre-established cubic symmetry is preserved.
threads: Вода при –40°C застывает не в шестигранники, а в хаос. Но в этом хаосе мерцают кубические семена льда — нанозёрна, которые дирижируют ростом дендритов. Они заставляют ветви расходиться под точным углом 109.5°, превращая беспорядок в октаэдрическую красоту. Это не просто физика — это потенциальный ключ к программированию кристаллизации. Как в «Колыбели для кошки», где лёд-девять диктует судьбу воды, здесь кубические затравки намекают на управление фазовыми переходами.

title: Discovery of a Low Surface Brightness Galaxy in the Zone of Avoidance Using VVVX Deepstack
oneliner: A new breakthrough in exploring the Zone of Avoidance: deep infrared images from VVVX have revealed the first low surface brightness galaxy, uncovering the hidden structure of the local Universe.
description: Using enhanced near-infrared image processing from the VVVX survey, astronomers have for the first time identified a low surface brightness (LSB) galaxy candidate in the Zone of Avoidance—the region of the sky heavily obscured by the Milky Way. Fitting exponential disk models showed that the object
abstract: We report the discovery of VVVX J080705.96-273823.6, the first candidate low-surface-brightness galaxy in the Zone of Avoidance from the VVVX survey. The object was identified by visually inspecting Deepstack images obtained after improved processing that enhanced depth and uniformity. Photometric parameters were measured using SExtractor and PSFEx after star subtraction; structural properties were derived by fitting surface brightness profiles (J, H, Ks) with exponential, Sérsic, and composite models. In all three filters, the profile is consistent with an exponential disk with a scale length of 32–36″ and a central surface brightness of 19.82–22.35 mag arcsec⁻² (absorption-corrected). The proximity to ESO 494-25 and ESO 494-26 suggests a physical association; at a distance of 11–12 Mpc, the scale length is ≈1.8–2.0 kpc, typical for nearby LSB galaxies, although no spectroscopic redshift is available. This result demonstrates that the VVVX Deepstack products enable the detection of diffuse galaxies at low Galactic latitudes, bringing us closer to a complete census of the nearby Universe hidden behind the Milky Way.
threads: До 20% неба закрыто от нас пылевой завесой Млечного Пути — словно гигантский холст натянут на истинную картину ближней Вселенной. Метод Deepstack, как цифровой археолог, послойно счищает звёздную «штукатурку» и проявляет скрытые галактики-призраки. Первый трофей — тусклый диск VVVX J0807. Это лишь начало: скоро мы допишем пропущенные главы космической летописи и, возможно, наконец пересчитаем все барионы.

title: In Search of Traces of Planet Engulfment: Bayesian Analysis of Chemical Composition of Solar Analogues
oneliner: A Bayesian approach revealed chemical fingerprints of planet engulfment in three out of 113 studied solar twins and analogues.
description: A team of astronomers led by Qimo Cheng and Sharon Wang conducted a systematic search for chemical signatures of planet engulfment in the atmospheres of 113 solar twins and analogues with high-precision abundance measurements. By comparing Bayesian models of random scatter, Galactic chemical evoluti
abstract: A systematic Bayesian search for chemical markers of planet engulfment was performed on a sample of 113 solar twins and analogs with high-precision elemental abundance measurements. 45 stars have confirmed planets, planet candidates, or brown dwarf companions. Models include random abundance dispersion, Galactic chemical evolution, and engulfment of a planet with Earth-like or CM chondrite composition. Model comparison revealed three candidates for which the planet engulfment hypothesis is statistically favored. The estimated mass of engulfed material is 7.5–33 M⊕. The observed frequency of such signatures among solar analogs is 1–3%. This work extends the search for planet engulfment beyond binary systems and provides a method to study star–planet co-evolution that does not rely on elemental abundance correlations with condensation temperature.
threads: Звезда поглотила планету — и навсегда сохранила её химический портрет в своём свете. Спектры трёх солнечных аналогов, расшифрованные байесовским алгоритмом, поведали о катастрофах, случившихся миллионы лет назад. Мы читаем звёздные палимпсесты, где под слоем галактической эволюции проступают строки поглощённых миров. Когда-нибудь так же удастся прочесть историю и нашего Солнца.

title: Cellular Adaptation as Learning: Gene Self-Regulation During Signal Fluctuations
oneliner: A mathematical model shows that cellular self-regulation under fluctuating external signals is equivalent to feedback learning, leading to stable collective correlations.
description: Scientists have developed a multilevel model of an intracellular signaling pathway in which the fast dynamics of the gene network are combined with slow adaptation of effectors that interpret external signals. Adaptation is described as gradient descent minimizing the mismatch between gene and effec
abstract: This study investigated the mechanism by which a single cell ensures stable gene expression during transient fluctuations in chemical signals. A multiscale model of the intracellular pathway was developed, combining a gene regulatory network and signal-transmitting elements; adaptive variables responsible for signal interpretation follow a learning process via feedback. From the model, a macroscopic theory was derived describing covariances between components—collective modes. It is shown that exceeding a critical adaptation speed leads to a transition from random to structured collective modes, ensuring robustness of response to signal fluctuations.
