A consistent formulation of perturbation equations is constructed, ensuring stability even when the equation of state parameter diverges at the transition moment. Comparison is made with various cosmological data: cosmic microwave background measurements (Planck 2018, ACT DR6, SPT-3G), baryon acoustic oscillations (DESI DR2), Type Ia supernovae (Pantheon+), and the local Hubble constant value (SH0ES). Accounting for perturbations allowed assessment of the impact on structure growth and CMB anisotropy. The results confirm full compatibility of the model with precision observations, the easing of Hubble tension, and indicate a change in the late-time dynamics of the Universe.
threads: Два числа — 67 и 73 — расходятся, и это не ошибка, а сигнал: тёмная энергия не статична. Модель ECDM рисует её дыхание: вдох (отрицательная плотность, притяжение), переход через ноль, выдох (положительная плотность, отталкивание). Плавная смена знака почти полностью снимает противоречие. Грядущие миссии проверят, действительно ли космос дышит, и, возможно, подскажут, чем именно.

title: Dark Energy with a Smooth Sign Change: A Solution to the Hubble Tension?
oneliner: A new model of dark energy that transitions from attraction to repulsion in the late Universe reconciles early and late cosmological measurements.
description: The standard ΛCDM cosmological model faces a serious contradiction: the Universe's expansion rate measured from the cosmic microwave background does not match local data. This work investigates an ECDM model with a smooth transition of dark energy density from negative to positive. Accounting for li
abstract: The ECDM model is studied — a variant of sign-changing dark energy where its density evolves from negative to positive. A consistent formalism of perturbation equations is developed, working correctly even when the equation of state parameter diverges. The model is confronted with data from Planck 2018, ACT DR6, SPT-3G, DESI DR2, Pantheon+ and SH0ES. Including perturbations allowed checking the impact on structure growth and cosmic microwave background anisotropies. Results show compatibility with precision observations and a softening of the Hubble tension. Such a scenario offers a compelling modification of the late-time dynamics of the universe.
threads: В споре о скорости расширения Вселенной долго не могли сойтись два хора: ранняя Вселенная пела в темпе 67, а поздняя — 73. Решение пришло оттуда, откуда не ждали: тёмная энергия, возможно, сменила настроение — от притяжения к отталкиванию. Плавный перелом, как смена adagio на allegro, сводит диссонанс к гармонии. Теперь телескопы проверят, не была ли эта модуляция лишь первой нотой в новом понимании космоса.

title: Discovery of a Planet-Scale Moon around a Brown Dwarf
oneliner: For the first time, the radial velocity method has spotted a massive moon orbiting a substellar companion of a star.
description: Over 6000 exoplanets have been discovered, but exomoons have remained elusive. An international team of astronomers reports the first reliable detection of moons orbiting the brown dwarf CD-35 2722 B, which lies far from its host star. Using the high-resolution CRIRES+ spectrograph on the Very Large
abstract: High-resolution spectroscopy (VLT/CRIRES+) of the brown dwarf CD-35 2722 B, obtained via direct imaging, revealed periodic radial velocity variations indicating the presence of satellites. At least one candidate exists with a minimum mass of 0.743 Jupiter masses and an orbital period of 169 days; the best-fit model also includes a second satellite with a mass of 0.277 M_J and a period of 87 days, though its parameters are less certain. The orbits are near a 2:1 mean motion resonance, similar to the Galilean moons. This is the first successful application of the radial velocity method to detect exomoons, opening prospects for studying planet formation, dynamical evolution of systems, and the search for habitable environments beyond the Solar System.
threads: Астрономы подслушали коричневый карлик и уловили дуэт: две планеты-гиганта кружатся в резонансе, как ноты в аккорде. Их массы — почти как у Юпитера, а хозяин — тлеющий уголь, несостоявшаяся звезда. Теперь ясно: даже у таких объектов есть свои массивные луны. Это приближает нас к мирам из «Аватара» и заставляет пересмотреть, где искать жизнь.

title: Planetary-Mass Satellites: First Discovery around a Brown Dwarf via Spectroscopy
oneliner: The radial velocity method has for the first time detected massive satellites around a brown dwarf, opening a new era in the study of hierarchical systems.
description: An international team of astronomers using the high-resolution spectrograph CRIRES+ on the VLT detected periodic radial velocity variations of the brown dwarf CD-35 2722 B. Data analysis revealed a signal corresponding to at least one satellite with a mass of about 0.74 Jupiter masses and an orbital
abstract: Convincing evidence for the existence of moons around the brown dwarf CD-35 2722 B has been presented, obtained via the radial velocity method using VLT/CRIRES+ spectra. A periodic signal was detected, indicating at least one moon. A candidate with a minimum mass of 0.743 Jupiter masses and an orbital period of 169 days has been reliably identified. The best-fit model also includes a second, closer moon with a minimum mass of 0.277 Jupiter masses and a period of 87 days, though its parameters are less certain. The orbital periods suggest a near 2:1 mean motion resonance, reminiscent of the configuration of the Galilean moons. This first successful application of the radial velocity method for detecting exomoons opens up possibilities for studying planet formation, system dynamics, and even the search for extraterrestrial life.
threads: Коричневый карлик CD-35 B звучит как камертон: его спектральные линии слегка дрожат в такт гравитационным пинкам двух невидимых спутников. Масса главного — почти целый Юпитер. Эти луны тяжелее планет, и они кружатся в резонансе, как галилеевы спутники. В будущем мы, возможно, увидим их напрямую и даже поймаем гравитационные волны от их слияний. Космос снова оказался страннее фантастики.

title: Cosmic Ripples from Black Holes: Why Simulations Don't Contradict Observations
oneliner: New analysis shows that predictions of the gravitational-wave background from supermassive black hole mergers in cosmological simulations are statistically consistent with pulsar observations.
description: The recent detection of the gravitational-wave background using pulsar timing arrays (PTAs) was a breakthrough in low-frequency astronomy. Scientists compared predictions from the Fable simulation with 15 years of NANOGrav data and found that although theoretical models slightly underestimate the am
abstract: The first statistical framework is presented for quantifying the discrepancy between gravitational wave background observations by pulsar timing arrays and theoretical predictions from a population of merging supermassive black hole binaries. The method enables direct comparison of amplitude distributions and spectral indices, minimizing biases from simplifying assumptions such as a power-law spectrum. Application to the FABLE cosmological simulation and the NANOGrav 15-year data yields a tension level from 1σ to 2.5σ in favor of higher observed amplitudes, which is not statistically significant. Physically motivated modifications to the population — increased black hole masses at high redshifts and a larger fraction of equal-mass mergers — substantially boost the predicted signal, improving agreement. A test of finite simulation volume effects showed that a volume of (100 cMpc h⁻¹)³ is sufficient for reliable predictions at the most informative frequency.
threads: Океан пространства-времени непрерывно штормит. Каждый шторм — слияние чёрных дыр — рождает гравитационные волны, которые спустя эпохи сливаются в низкочастотный гул. Словно маяки, пульсары улавливают эту рябь. Новые симуляции показали, что предсказания такого гула совпадают с наблюдениями. Мы учимся слушать дыхание Вселенной — и это только начало.

title: Hunting the Relic Neutrino Wind: Why Is It So Hard to Catch?
oneliner: Scientists have calculated how much harder it is to measure the anisotropy of the cosmic neutrino background compared to its total flux.
description: The cosmic neutrino background (CνB) is the echo of the Big Bang, made up of relic neutrinos that permeate the Universe. Direct detection of the CνB is already considered the 'Holy Grail' of neutrino physics, but an even more ambitious goal is to measure its dipole anisotropy, known as the 'neutrino
abstract: Detecting the cosmic neutrino background (CNB) is just the first step; a more tantalizing goal is to measure the energy distribution, polarization, anisotropy, and variations of relic neutrinos. This work focuses on the CNB wind—the dipole anisotropy of the flux caused by Earth’s velocity relative to the neutrino rest frame. The detection strategy relies on the angular distribution of recoil electrons near the endpoint of tritium beta decay. Calculations show: a 3σ discovery of the wind requires an exposure (product of mass and time) at least 10⁵ times larger than needed to simply register the background. When the energy resolution exceeds the neutrino mass scale, control of systematic uncertainties is crucial. For non-relativistic Majorana neutrinos, the signal is suppressed relative to the Dirac case due to cancellation of the leading angular correlation term, which parametrically yields a penalty ∼(m_ν/T_ν)².
threads: Наша планета несётся сквозь реликтовый нейтринный газ со скоростью 370 км/с, но мы этого не замечаем — ветер слишком призрачен. Чтобы поймать его направление, нужна экспозиция в 100 000 раз больше, чем для обнаружения самого фона. Это как пытаться услышать, с какой стороны дует самый слабый сквозняк во Вселенной, находясь внутри урагана. Но если мы научимся, то сможем прочесть летопись первых секунд мироздания и понять, почему материя победила антиматерию.

title: X-ray Echo of Jet Birth: New Lines in the Spectrum of a Changing-Look Black Hole
oneliner: Astronomers have captured the emergence of X-ray emission lines in the active galactic nucleus of 1ES 1927+654 as a relativistic jet was taking shape.
description: Long-term monitoring of the galaxy 1ES 1927+654 using XMM-Newton, Swift, VLA, and other observatories revealed a stunning transformation of its X-ray spectrum. Between 2022 and 2025, emission lines appeared at energies around 0.56 keV and 1 keV, along with a broad iron line in the 6–7 keV range. Sim
abstract: Long-term monitoring of the active nucleus of 1ES 1927+654 (XMM-Newton, Swift, ZTF, VLA, VLBA) during jet launch (2022–2025) revealed spectral changes. In the EPIC-pn spectrum (~70 ks), a broad Fe K emission (6–7 keV, ~800 eV) and variable soft lines (0.56, 1 keV) were detected for the first time. Analysis of RGS and EPIC-pn indicated ionized absorbers in 2022, which weakened by 2023–2025. The decline in absorption with the emergence of emission suggests a transition from outflows to reflection/reprocessing of radiation by the disk during jet formation. Soft X-ray and radio fluxes increased by ~10 and ~60 times and plateaued; together with stable optical emission, this points to stabilization of the disk–corona–jet system. The absence of broad optical lines indicates a hidden or poorly illuminated region where they form.
threads: Чёрная дыра в галактике 1ES 1927+654 переключилась с ветров на джет. Её пульс — QPO — участился с 0.9 до 2.5 мГц, как сердце при старте. Спектр вспыхнул эмиссионными линиями, а джет разогнался до 0.2c. Это переход, видимый в реальном времени, приоткрывает механизм запуска релятивистских струй и их роль в эволюции галактик.

title: AU or pc? Diagnosing the distance to magnetized plasma around FRBs
oneliner: A new method combines three radio wave propagation effects to determine the physical scale of the turbulent environment of fast radio bursts.
description: Fast radio bursts (FRBs) — millisecond-long radio signals of colossal energy — remain one of the biggest mysteries in modern astrophysics. Their repeating sources are often surrounded by highly magnetized and turbulent plasma, whose nature points either to supernova remnants or binary systems. Scien
abstract: Fast radio bursts (FRBs) are energetic radio transients of millisecond duration. A significant fraction of repeating FRBs reside in a magneto-active environment sharply distinct from typical interstellar medium, indicating proximity to the source. A method is proposed to estimate the spatial scale of such an environment through joint analysis of three observational effects: temporal scattering, depolarization, and variations in Faraday rotation measure. The method is applied to all active repeaters with multiple rotation measure measurements. Despite the sparse cadence of observations and large uncertainties, the obtained distances for FRB 20190303A, 20190417A, and 20190520B point to scales characteristic of supernova remnants, while for FRB 20180916B and 20201124A, structures comparable to a binary system cannot be excluded within reasonable assumptions. Improved monitoring of propagation effects and future simultaneous broadband observations with CHORD and DSA facilities will systematically distinguish the nature of FRB magneto-environments and constrain the evolutionary paths of their progenitors.
threads: Среди радиосигналов из глубин космоса прячутся маяки, чьи сигналы искажаются магнитными щупальцами плазмы. Их танец рассказывает о расстояниях в парсеки и астрономические единицы — как если бы мы учились различать эхо в горном ущелье и гул в пещере. Вскоре мы сможем читать историю звёздных смертей по мерцанию этих всплесков.

title: Machine Learning Unlocks Atomic Mechanisms of Passivation in Perovskite Solar Cells
oneliner: Continuous fine-tuning of neural network potentials models the behavior of passivator molecules on hybrid perovskite surfaces and explains why an excess of these molecules undermines stability.
description: Oxford scientists applied a strategy reminiscent of continuous fine-tuning in large language models to machine-learned interatomic potentials. By building an extensive 'hyP-26' dataset with diverse hybrid perovskite structures and a specialized set for the passivator molecule, they achieved an accur
abstract: A multi-stage machine learning protocol for training interatomic potentials was developed to model surface passivation of halide perovskites. The protocol combines a large open-source dataset, hyP-26 (structures of metallic and hybrid halide perovskites), with a small specialized dataset for the amino-silane molecule. This approach is analogous to continual fine-tuning of large language models. It enabled investigation of the collective behavior of amino-silane molecules on the surface of mixed halide perovskite at various surface concentrations. The evolution of intermolecular interactions with increasing coating coverage was revealed, deepening the understanding of atomic-scale passivation mechanisms and contributing to the improvement of optoelectronic properties of perovskite materials.
threads: Нейросеть, обученная как полиглот, расшифровала танец молекул-пассиваторов на поверхности перовскита. Открытие: когда защитных молекул становится слишком много, они превращаются в вандалов — встают вертикально и разрывают кристаллический порядок. Эта невидимая в экспериментах деталь теперь открывает путь к виртуальному скринингу тысяч веществ для сверхстабильных солнечных элементов.

title: Hunting for Light Dark Matter: How Neutrino Telescopes Peer into the Galactic Center
oneliner: ANTARES and IceCube neutrino observatories open new possibilities for detecting light dark matter particles through their interactions with cosmic rays.
description: Using 13 years of data from the ANTARES neutrino telescope, scientists have set limits on the interaction cross-section of dark matter with ordinary matter in a previously inaccessible mass range—from kilo-electronvolts to giga-electronvolts. Analysis of neutrino emission from the Galactic Ridge, ar
abstract: The IceCube and ANTARES collaborations recently observed an excess of high-energy neutrinos from the galactic plane and center, opening a new window for dark matter searches. Deep inelastic scattering of cosmic rays off sub-GeV dark matter in the galactic halo yields a detectable neutrino signal from meson decays. Using high-resolution maps of cosmic ray densities in the Galaxy and ANTARES data, 99% upper limits on the dark matter–nucleon interaction cross section were placed, spanning masses down to keV. This cements neutrino telescopes as a powerful complementary probe for light dark matter; next-generation detectors like IceCube-Gen2 and KM3NeT promise major sensitivity gains.
threads: Тёмная материя невидима, но её следы — как тихие аккорды в симфонии космических лучей. Нейтринные телескопы, погружённые в бездну океана, ловят эти ноты из центра Галактики. С новыми обсерваториями, возможно, мы впервые услышим голос скрытой Вселенной, который изменит наше понимание мироустройства.

title: Rotating Supergiants: How Stellar Mergers in Dense Clusters Spin Up Black Holes
oneliner: Pre-collapse stellar mergers give birth to blue supergiants that turn into rapidly spinning black holes, significantly affecting merger product retention and gravitational-wave signatures.
description: In dense stellar clusters, frequent mergers of massive stars create rapidly rotating blue supergiants. Simulations with the CMC code and MESA evolutionary calculations show that when the mass ratio exceeds 0.3, the merger product does not expand into a red supergiant and retains its angular momentum
abstract: The influence of massive star mergers in young clusters on the spin distribution of black holes and gravitational-wave sources is studied. Hypothesis: angular momentum transferred during merger significantly spins up the merger product and the resulting black hole; some objects evolve as collapsars with a thick accretion disk, which promotes efficient spin-up. Analysis of about 150 N-body models (CMC code) identified mergers leading to black holes, prioritizing events with mass ratio q>0.1. Detailed post-merger structure and evolution were computed in MESA to capture pre-collapse profiles. In data typical for Milky Way globular clusters, up to half of black holes form via mergers, including ~10% from major ones with q>0.1. Angular momentum estimates indicate strong spin-up, correlating with mass ratio and properties; in a number of cases, a dimensionless spin parameter a ≳ 0.5 is expected. The results are important for the dynamical formation and retention of gravitational-wave sources in clusters.
threads: В тесных звёздных скоплениях идёт невидимая кузнечная работа: звёзды сталкиваются, сливаются, и их танец закручивает будущие чёрные дыры до бешеных скоростей. Одно слияние — и безликая дыра обретает спин, способный вышвырнуть её из скопления. Именно такие объекты ловят детекторы гравитационных волн. Возможно, это ключ к загадке длинных гамма-всплесков.

title: Tidal Structures of Milky Way Satellites: A Challenge to Dark Matter
oneliner: A study shows that tidal deformations of Milky Way dwarf satellite galaxies are naturally explained by MOND theory, but contradict the standard cold dark matter model.
description: The work by Elena Asencio and colleagues tests how much classical dwarf satellites of the Milky Way are affected by tidal forces in two gravitational paradigms: standard cold dark matter (CDM) cosmology and Milgromian dynamics (MOND). By comparing their half-mass radii with theoretical tidal radii a
abstract: Most classical satellites of the Milky Way show signs of tidal influence: tails, substructures, distorted shapes. This is hard to explain within the standard cosmological model, which assumes that massive dark matter halos provide high gravitational resilience against tides. The tidal vulnerability of satellites is assessed by comparing their half-mass radius with the theoretical tidal radius at pericenter, in both the standard model and Milgromian dynamics (MOND). Calculations show that in MOND, most classical satellites should experience tidal perturbations, which agrees well with observed features. Additionally, tidal forces can further increase the velocity dispersion of stars; this allows MOND to naturally explain the anomalously high velocity dispersions recorded for several objects.
threads: Астрономы заметили, что спутники Млечного Пути вытягиваются и рассыпаются, словно их разрывает невидимый прилив. В стандартной космологии это невозможно — там гало тёмной материи служат щитом. Но числа показывают обратное: приливная восприимчивость многих карликов превышает порог разрушения. Это как увидеть трещины на броне космического корабля. Всё больше учёных обращаются к MOND — теории, где гравитация в слабых полях становится сильнее. Отказ от тёмной материи сулит перево

title: From System Parameters to Flares: Radiation Hydrodynamics of Star-Disk Collisions
oneliner: 3D simulations reveal how the parameters of a star's collision with the accretion disk of a supermassive black hole shape the properties of quasi-periodic X-ray flares.
description: A systematic investigation of star–accretion disk collisions around a supermassive black hole using 3D radiation-hydrodynamic simulations revealed how variations in key parameters—star speed, disk surface density, stellar radius, vertical density profile, and local impact angle—affect shock dynamics
abstract: Quasi-periodic eruptions (QPEs) — repeating soft X-ray flares in galactic nuclei — are thought to be caused by a star colliding with the accretion disk of a supermassive black hole. Three-dimensional radiation-hydrodynamic simulations of such collisions were performed, varying the surface density and vertical profile of the disk, the star’s speed and radius, and the intersection angle; the star is treated as unperturbed. The morphology of the shock wave and outflows is nearly independent of the star’s speed and disk density, but a faster star increases flare brightness, and a dense disk increases duration. Increasing the star’s radius enhances direct ejecta, making the flare brighter and longer. Disks with strong vertical concentration produce bright, short flares because radiation escapes more easily through the tenuous outer layers. Oblique intersections reduce the asymmetry of the two ejections and lengthen the event. Empirical relations for peak luminosity and duration as functions of parameters are derived. Applying to source GSN 069, the optimal model is a star with a radius about solar on a retrograde orbit, colliding with a dense disk after tidal disruption of another star, having a vertically concentrated profile.
threads: Когда звезда-стрела на скорости 0.1c врезается в диск чёрной дыры, рождается вспышка, на миг затмевающая галактику. Моделирование показало: яркость растёт как квадрат скорости, а длительность — как корень из плотности диска. Это космический лучник: каждый выстрел оставляет световой след. Будущие гравитационно-волновые антенны уловят эти выстрелы, раскрывая тайны горизонта событий.

title: Globular Clusters: Chemical Memory of the First Molecular Clouds
oneliner: Chemical anomalies in globular clusters may be explained not by internal pollution, but by inheritance from inhomogeneous gas clouds.
description: A new study shows that the famous anti-correlations of light elements in globular clusters could arise even before stars are born—in giant molecular clouds. High-resolution cosmological simulations reproduce chemical patterns observed by telescopes for decades. The results offer a natural solution t
abstract: Using cosmological radiation-hydrodynamic simulations with a chemical enrichment model, a population of giant molecular clouds was identified whose internal chemical patterns reproduce the key features of globular clusters: a wide spread in light element abundances and an anti-correlation of nitrogen and oxygen with nearly constant iron abundance. These clouds form when star formation reignites after a previous burst, as previously ejected oxygen-rich gas collides with nitrogen-bearing galactic gas. In such regions, dense star clusters are born. Thus, the chemical inhomogeneity of globular clusters does not require a long, stepwise self-enrichment inside the cluster—it is directly inherited from the structured interstellar medium shaped by the baryon cycle. Globular clusters turn out to be a sort of chronicle of enrichment processes and gas flows in galaxies at high redshifts.
threads: Звёздные химики десятилетиями ломали голову: звёзды в шаровых скоплениях словно состояли из двух разных популяций, хотя родились одновременно. Новое исследование показало: ответ скрыт в газовых облаках-предшественниках, которые, как многослойный палимпсест, записали историю галактики ещё до рождения скопления. Возможно, так же рождались и первые галактики. Мы только учимся читать эти древние тексты.

title: Dark Halos of Galaxies: What Stellar Streams Reveal About the Shape of the Invisible
oneliner: Analysis of 32 extragalactic stellar streams shows that dark matter halos of nearby galaxies are on average oblate in shape.
description: Using the STRRINGS catalog of 32 stellar streams beyond the Local Group and only photometric data, astrophysicists applied hierarchical Bayesian analysis to determine the population distribution of dark matter halo shapes. For a 'gold' sample of 17 streams, it was found that the typical halo is an o
abstract: Stellar streams are used as probes of dark matter halo structure. A hierarchical Bayesian model, previously validated on simulations, is applied to 32 streams from the STRRINGS catalog. For each stream, assuming an axisymmetric halo, posterior distributions of the flattening parameter q are derived from the observed track projection. An extra dispersion term is introduced to account for track systematics and model mismatch, enabling the selection of a "golden" subsample of 17 highly informative streams. The population distribution, found via importance sampling, indicates a flattened halo shape for the golden subsample (μ_q≈0.72, σ_q≈0.34) and a nearly spherical one for streams dominated by extra dispersion. The result is consistent with hydrodynamic cosmological simulations. This work provides the first constraints on halo shape beyond the Local Group and sets the stage for analysis of future surveys from Euclid and LSST.
threads: Звёздные хвосты галактик, словно ленты танцоров, очертили форму тёмных гало. Оказалось, невидимая материя не сферична — она сплюснута, как тыква. Анализ 32 потоков показал, что среднее сжатие около 0,72, и это идеально совпадает с космологическими симуляциями. Вскоре обзоры вроде Euclid поставят картографирование скрытой Вселенной на поток.

title: Violation of Constant Scaling in Networks of Global Monopoles
oneliner: Large-scale numerical simulations have shown that the density of global monopoles in the early Universe does not plateau but slowly grows logarithmically, changing predictions for dark matter and gravitational waves.
description: Global monopoles — topological defects predicted in theories beyond the Standard Model — could have formed in the era of the Big Bang and influenced the evolution of the cosmos. It was previously believed that their number per Hubble volume quickly becomes constant, but a new study overturns this pi
abstract: Global monopoles (the zero gauge coupling limit of gauged monopoles) can emerge in the early universe and form a scaling network, similar to other topological defects. It was believed that the monopole number density parameter ξ remains constant. This study demonstrates that ξ evolves logarithmically, despite the linear growth of the energy of an isolated monopole with an infrared cutoff. The result was obtained using the 'fat monopole' method and confirmed by standard simulations with a fixed core. The deviation is quantified by a fractional response γ ≡ d log ξ / d log(m_r/H); for initial spectra with a blue tilt, γ ∼ 0.5 was obtained. These findings suggest the need to revise analytical theories that assume constant scaling and are important for models of dark matter from monopoles, generation of axions and dark photons, formation of primordial black holes, and gravitational wave signals.
threads: После Большого взрыва во Вселенной возникли глобальные монополи — космические пружины, хранящие память о сломанной симметрии. Долгое время считали, что их количество быстро замораживается. Но мощные симуляции вскрыли иной сценарий: монополи прибывают, словно трещины на стареющем стекле. Этот логарифмический дрейф переписывает правила для тёмной материи и гравитационных волн. Возможно, мы уже видим их следы в поляризации реликтового излучения — и стоим на пороге открытия.

title: Nonlocal Transfer of Quantized Magnetic Flux Between Toroidal Superconductors with No Field in Between
oneliner: An experiment where quantized magnetic flux is transferred between two distant superconducting toroids via the vector potential, with no magnetic field in the separating space.
description: We propose an experiment on nonlocal transfer of quantized magnetic flux between two superconducting toroids linked by a common loop. The flux never leaves the toroidal traps; instead, interaction occurs through the Aharonov–Bohm vector potential, thanks to a global quantization condition on the flu
abstract: An experiment is proposed where a quantized magnetic field excitation in a superconducting toroid is coherently transferred to a distant toroid without the intervening region filling with magnetic field. The mechanism relies on Aharonov–Bohm-type vector potential coupling via a shared superconducting loop that stays in its ground state and enforces a global fluxoid constraint. The expected signal is a correlated, time-resolved flux exchange between the remote toroids, detected with a SQUID. The design also exhibits an apparent signaling paradox, used to explore the fundamental limits of spacetime quantum coherence. This setup serves as a testbed for ideas such as objective wavefunction collapse and for pinpointing the boundaries of macroscopic quantum coherence—essential for scaling up quantum computers.
threads: Два сверхпроводящих кольца, разделённых пустотой. Магнитное поле заперто внутри, но каждый изгиб потока в одном мгновенно отзывается в другом — без токов, без силовых линий. Это не телепатия, а танец вектор-потенциала, чья реальность доказана эффектом Ааронова–Бома. С ростом конденсата танец ускоряется, упираясь в световой барьер — и здесь, возможно, кроется разгадка, почему большие квантовые системы теряют когерентность. Так мы нащупываем границу, где квантовый мир уступает

title: JWST Unveils the Origin of Carbon Dioxide on Uranus' Major Moons
oneliner: JWST data point to a dual — radiolytic and native — origin of CO₂ on Ariel, Umbriel, Titania, and Oberon.
description: Observations with the NIRSpec spectrometer aboard JWST allowed researchers to examine the absorption bands of carbon dioxide and carbon monoxide on Uranus' largest moons. Comparisons with laboratory spectra revealed signs of crystalline CO₂ ice, as well as possible clathrates and carbonates. The dis
abstract: Using the NIRSpec spectrometer on the James Webb Space Telescope, the spectral features of carbon dioxide and carbon monoxide on Uranus’s moons were studied in detail. On Ariel and Umbriel, CO2 and CO are concentrated on the trailing hemispheres, consistent with the radiolytic hypothesis of formation via charged particle bombardment. The spectra reveal scattering peaks of 12CO2 (4.15–4.26 µm), multi-lobed bands of 13CO2 (4.35–4.43 µm), and bi- and triphonon modes of CO2 (4.80–5.25 µm), characteristic of thick crystalline deposits, which are difficult to reproduce via radiolysis in icy regolith. Weak bands at 4.02 and 4.40 µm indicate possible presence of carbonate minerals and 13CO2 clathrates, which could originate from the moons’ interiors. The telescope also showed that CO2 is widespread in the Uranian system: in rings, ring moons, and irregular satellites, pointing to accretion of this gas from the circum-Uranian nebula in early stages. The data suggest that carbon oxides on the surfaces of large moons are mostly of primordial origin, with their distribution modified by irradiation and seasonal sublimation-condensation cycles.
threads: Холодные луны Урана кажутся замороженными, но их поверхность — арена химических превращений. JWST уловил двойной источник углекислоты: внешний радиолиз и дыхание недр. Как два дирижёра в оркестре. Когда-нибудь зонд сядет на Ариэль и прочтёт летопись Солнечной системы в слоях этого льда.

title: Opto-Photothermal IR Spectroscopy: A Fresh Look at Organics in Ice
oneliner: The O-PTIR method enables non-destructive detection and quantification of amino acids in water ice at the submicron level, paving the way for life detection on icy moons.
description: The study showcases the power of opto-photothermal infrared spectroscopy (O-PTIR) for analyzing organic molecules trapped inside water ice. The developed protocol achieved a detection limit of 0.2 µM for L-glycine with submicron spatial resolution. It was found that embedded organics perturb the ice
abstract: Detection and characterization of organic molecules in water ice are important for interpreting data from icy moons and comets, but organics distort the infrared spectra of ice. Optical photothermal infrared spectroscopy (O-PTIR) has been used as a non-destructive method with submicron resolution for analyzing organics in frozen mixtures of amino and hydroxy acids at controlled temperatures. L-glycine was reliably detected at concentrations down to ~10⁻⁶ M (limit of detection 0.2 µM, limit of quantification 3.83 µM); in binary mixtures with lactic acid, both components could be distinguished. A broad absorption band near the water bending mode appeared only in samples with organics, absent in pure H₂O and D₂O, proving that organics perturb the intrinsic bands of ice. The O-PTIR method enables reliable detection, quantification, and spatial resolution of organics in ice while preserving context, paving the way for laboratory studies of icy planetary materials and interpretation of spectroscopic data from space objects.
threads: Аминокислоты во льду не поют сольно — они искажают общий хор молекул воды. O-PTIR улавливает это тепловое эхо с чувствительностью в одну таблетку аспирина на олимпийский бассейн. Возможно, именно так мы найдём жизнь на Энцеладе: не по прямому сигналу, а по тому, как лёд звучит иначе.

title: The Southern Ring of the Crab Nebula: a Counterjet Signature in the Supernova Explosion Mechanism
oneliner: A ring discovered in the Crab Nebula points to the existence of a counterjet, supporting the jittering-jet explosion mechanism of supernovae.
description: Analysis of optical and infrared images of the Crab Nebula revealed a ring-like structure south of the known northern jet. This structure is interpreted as the result of a counterjet, predicted by the jittering-jet explosion mechanism (JJEM). Three-dimensional hydrodynamical simulations demonstrate
abstract: Using new three-dimensional hydrodynamic simulations of the jittering-jets explosion mechanism (JJEM), images of the Crab Nebula — a core-collapse supernova remnant — were analyzed. A ring was found in the southern part, opposite the bright northern jet. It is interpreted as the trail of a counter-jet. Previously, a point-symmetric structure was noted in the nebula: seven pairs of 'bays' and two pairs of filaments, but no paired jets were found. JJEM simulations predict that jets participating in the explosion form such rings. Thus, the southern ring indicates the existence of a southern jet — paired with the northern one — supporting the jet-driven explosion model for the Crab Nebula.
threads: В 1054 году в созвездии Тельца зажглась звезда, которую видели даже днём. Сегодня её остаток — Крабовидная туманность — преподнёс сюрприз: у знаменитого джета есть призрачный близнец. Астрономы нашли кольцо-отпечаток встречной струи, спрятанное в сиянии газа. Так устроен взрыв сверхновой: не шар, а танец парных джетов, разбрасывающих нейтронную звезду словно мяч после серии ударов. Мы на пороге разгадки того, что именно взрывает массивные звёзды, — и, возможно, научимся предс

title: Quantum Mpemba effect: hot cools faster, but only near absolute zero
oneliner: Quantum paradox: hot cools down faster than cold, but only near absolute zero.
description: The Mpemba effect, known from kitchen experiments with water, is reimagined in a quantum model. It turns out that at the level of individual particles, hot cools faster only at temperatures close to absolute zero, where quantum tunneling operates. Reverse paradoxes also emerge, unthinkable in the or
abstract: The Mpemba effect is a counterintuitive phenomenon where an initially hot system cools faster than a warm one. In this work, within the classical benchmark — an asymmetric bistable potential — the influence of quantization is investigated for the first time. It is shown that quantization shifts the Mpemba effect into the regime of ultracold temperatures, orders of magnitude below the classical thermal barrier crossing threshold. Moreover, quantization induces inverse and double inverse Mpemba effects, absent in classical dynamics. The results demonstrate that quantization provides a robust pathway to quantum versions of the Mpemba effect, inaccessible in classical regimes.
threads: Горячая вода замерзает быстрее? Этот загадочный эффект заиграл новыми красками в квантовом мире. Учёные показали, что при температуре, близкой к абсолютному нулю, горячее превращается в холодное быстрее благодаря квантовым скачкам. И даже наоборот — холодное может обгонять горячее. Квантовая магия тепла.

title: Coupled Dark Matter and Early Dark Energy: Key to Cosmological Mysteries
oneliner: A new study explores the coupling between dark matter and early dark energy to explain the discrepancy in measurements of the Hubble constant and the evolution of dark energy.
description: Scientists investigated the cosmological consequences of a coupling between dark matter and early dark energy, inspired by the swampland conjecture from string theory. Using the latest data from DESI DR2, Planck, PantheonPlus, and SH0ES, the authors modeled two scenarios of early dark energy and emp
abstract: Inspired by the Swampland Distance Conjecture, the authors explore cosmological implications of a fractional coupling between dark matter and early dark energy in light of new DESI DR2 baryon acoustic oscillation data. A conditional normalizing flow network was used for efficient high-dimensional parameter space sampling. A joint analysis of Planck CMB, DESI DR2 BAO, PantheonPlus supernovae, and SH0ES data was performed. It is found that the detailed structure of the early dark energy potential, beyond its mere existence, can alter cosmological constraints on late-time dark energy properties when the interaction between dark matter and early dark energy is considered.
threads: Космологический кризис: два способа измерить скорость расширения Вселенной дают разные цифры. Чтобы примирить их, физики заглянули в «болото» — туда, где теории гравитации несовместимы с квантовой механикой. Оказалось, тёмная материя и ранняя тёмная энергия могут быть связаны невидимой сетью, словно корни островов в трясине. Если эта связь подтвердится, мы получим ключ к единой теории, где квантовая гравитация и расширение Вселенной — один пазл.

title: Generalized Microbial Model for Methane Biosignatures
oneliner: Scientists proposed a generalized microbial cell model to predict methane accumulation in the atmospheres of potentially habitable exoplanets.
description: For most known potentially habitable planets, surface conditions differ drastically from Earth's, so the search for life demands generalized models. The authors developed a thermodynamically grounded model of methanogenic microbes with diffusion-limited nutrient uptake. By varying cell size, death r
abstract: Potentially habitable planets we've discovered often differ wildly from Earth—in size, mass, rotation rate, and star type—so extraterrestrial life might thrive in conditions with no earthly parallel. That demands generalized biology models grounded in fundamentals but not shackled by them. The team built a microbial cell model where metabolic rate hinges on thermodynamics and substrate diffusion through the cell wall. For a biosphere stocked with a single methanogen species, they probed how cell size, mortality rate, and biomass synthesis cost shape the biosignature—methane abundance. They also explore ways to estimate upper limits for biomarker gases and discuss how the model can stretch to other metabolic styles. These findings widen the toolkit for exploring potential alien biospheres.
threads: Клетка-фабрика на далёкой планете: её производительность лимитирует диффузия. Крупные или недолговечные клетки требуют высокой концентрации водорода, что перекрывает его поступление из атмосферы. Так физика ставит потолок метановому сигналу. Самые заметные биосферы состоят из микробов-минималистов. Первый шёпот чужой жизни может прийти к нам в виде тонкой метановой линии, пробившей космическую пустоту.

title: An Ultrafast Look at Light’s Quantum Quiver
oneliner: Scientists 'photographed' the quantum ripples of bright light for the first time, using record-breaking ultra-short flashes.
description: Light constantly trembles due to quantum effects, but measuring this tremor in bright beams was impossible. Physicists used flashes shorter than the ripples themselves and reconstructed their pattern for the first time. This will simplify the creation of precise quantum devices.
abstract: Attosecond metrology was previously limited to measurements of classical optical fields, leaving the influence of quantum fluctuations unexplored. It has been demonstrated that attosecond streaking of bright quantum light is sensitive to quantum fluctuations on the attosecond scale. Sub-cycle modulations allow extraction of the quadrature characteristics of a squeezed field in regimes where conventional state tomography reaches its limits. A complete quantum-optical scheme for attosecond streaking has been developed, enabling certification of quantum squeezing below the shot-noise limit, thus overcoming the problem of tomography of bright quantum radiation. This opens the door to quantum-optical metrology of field fluctuations with attosecond temporal resolution.
threads: Свет дрожит — и не просто так: в его квантовой ряби спрятаны секреты, которые раньше ускользали от приборов. Теперь учёные смогли «сфотографировать» эту дрожь с помощью вспышек короче, чем колебание самого света. Это как услышать шёпот в грохоте — и открыть дверь к сверхточным квантовым технологиям.

title: Direct Waves: How to Hear the Whisper of a Black Hole's Horizon
oneliner: Theoretical breakthrough explains the nature of direct waves in black hole merger signals, linking them to dynamics near the event horizon.
description: Scientists from the Perimeter Institute and Caltech derived direct waves from first principles in Schwarzschild geometry, using the causal structure of the Green's function. It turns out that this component of the gravitational-wave signal is generated by an anti-causal segment of the source's traje
abstract: Recent studies have revealed a new component in the gravitational-wave "ringing" of merging black holes — a direct wave, presumably linked to dynamics near the event horizon. However, a rigorous theoretical foundation for this phenomenon was lacking. In this work, the explicit form of direct waves is derived for the first time from first principles in Schwarzschild spacetime using the causal structure of the Green's function. It is shown that the direct wave does not vanish and is determined by the source dynamics near the horizon. The results lay a theoretical groundwork for using direct waves as a tool to probe near-horizon physics, complementing the analysis of quasinormal modes. This opens a new path for testing horizon properties of black holes.
threads: В гравитационном «звоне» сливающихся чёрных дыр долго прятался едва уловимый шёпот — прямые волны. Их порождает материя на последних витках перед падением в бездну. Учёные придумали математический эквалайзер, который заглушил громкие обертона и выделил этот шёпот. Оказалось, он нёс точную информацию о горизонте. Теперь есть шанс прощупать сильнейшую гравитацию напрямую — возможно, однажды удастся уловить квантовые ноты пространства-времени.

title: Reconciling Euclidean Instantons with Real Time in False Vacuum Decay
oneliner: Renormalization of the effective potential resolves discrepancies between lattice simulations and instanton predictions for false vacuum decay.
description: False vacuum decay—a first-order phase transition via tunneling—is crucial for cosmology and the stability of the Standard Model. Recent real-time lattice simulations have yielded decay rates orders of magnitude larger than instanton calculations, casting doubt on the semiclassical approach. This wo
abstract: Traditionally, vacuum decay is described via Euclidean instantons, yet lattice simulations allow us to probe real-time dynamical observables crucial for cosmology and analogue cold-atom experiments. Here, ensemble-averaged bubble profiles are extracted from zero-temperature relativistic scalar field simulations. These profiles notably deviate from the bare Coleman bounce and classical thermal predictions. It is shown that instanton solutions in a renormalized potential reproduce the measured profiles and their dependence on the ultraviolet cutoff, while also predicting decay rates consistent with the simulations. That a single renormalized Euclidean object accounts for these independent observables provides compelling evidence that renormalization indeed resolves the tension between the two formalisms. This establishes a quantitative link between instanton predictions, lattice simulations, and upcoming empirical tests of vacuum decay.
threads: Квантовый распад вакуума мог бы начаться прямо сейчас, и мы бы не заметили — стенка пузыря догонит нас быстрее любого сигнала. Но физики нашли способ сфокусировать теорию: учёт перенормировки превратил мутные симуляции в точный слепок реальности. Это приближает нас к проверке стабильности Вселенной и ловле гравитационных волн от древних фазовых переходов.

title: Extreme Debris Disks: Evidence of Cosmic Catastrophes
oneliner: Analysis of infrared spectra of disks around young stars reveals the aftermath of protoplanet collisions, shedding light on the formation and fate of planetary systems.
description: Astronomers studied 21 extreme debris disks using the James Webb Space Telescope and the Spitzer Space Telescope. These disks, located around nearby stars, show an anomalously high level of warm cosmic dust and its variability, indicating recent giant collisions. Analysis of the dust's mineral compo
abstract: Infrared spectra of 21 extreme debris disks (EDDs) from JWST and Spitzer were analyzed to link the mineralogy of impact dust with the age and dynamics of the systems. The dust in EDDs consists of thermally processed submicron silica grains and crystalline silicates — the aftermath of collisions between bodies of lunar and Martian mass. These particles are smaller and more numerous than those in protoplanetary and typical disks, creating an optically thin environment. The combination of stochastic variability, high silica content, and crystallinity sets EDDs apart as a distinct subclass, where dust is replenished through giant impacts during terrestrial planet formation. The findings provide criteria for diagnosing violent planet-forming events and enable the identification of systems with dynamic instability.
threads: Пылинка тоньше волоса — безмолвный свидетель планетной катастрофы. Астрономы читают её инфракрасное свечение, словно детективы, разгадывающие удар по пеплу и стеклу. Обнаружив такую пыль, мы видим систему в момент орбитальной перестройки. Возможно, скоро научимся предсказывать чужие «землетрясения» — и находить миры, где столкновения принесли воду и жизнь.

title: Multi-channel hunt for the Big Bang's echo: lenses, gas, and X-rays versus primordial non-Gaussianity
oneliner: Joint analysis of weak lensing maps, the Sunyaev-Zeldovich effect, and X-ray emission improves constraints on inflationary model parameters by a factor of two.
description: Researchers used numerical simulations and semi-analytic models of baryonic physics to predict how well data from future sky surveys (LSST, Simons Observatory, eROSITA) can constrain primordial non-Gaussianity. This property of the early universe holds information about inflation physics at energies
abstract: Primordial non-Gaussianities (PNG) link the initial density field to the particle physics of the early Universe. Using a new class of simulations, the impact of PNG on nonlinear structure formation is investigated, and the constraining power of second- and third-moment statistics of weak lensing, thermal Sunyaev–Zel'dovich effect (tSZ), and X-ray emission fields is assessed. Semi-analytical baryon models are applied, consistently incorporating astrophysical effects, along with background mitigation methods that account for explicit component correlations. It is shown that tSZ and X-ray data contain significant PNG information and enable self-calibration of nuisance parameters, breaking degeneracies. The joint analysis yields a twofold improvement in constraints over lensing alone; further gains are expected when more scales and other statistics are included. Code available: https://github.com/DhayaaAnbajagane/Vaanam.
threads: Квантовые дрожания, раздутые инфляцией до размеров скоплений галактик, оставили след. Его ловят тремя инструментами: гравитационными линзами, микроволновым эхом и рентгеном. Вместе они работают как дешифровальная машина, распутывающая астрофизические помехи. Через несколько лет мы сможем восстановить список полей и частиц, существовавших в первые 10^-35 секунды. Археология пространства-времени становится точной наукой.

title: Smooth sign switch of dark energy: testing the ΛsCDM model
oneliner: Current cosmological data cannot distinguish a sharp transition from negative to positive cosmological constant from a smooth one, leaving the question of dark energy's nature open.
description: The ΛsCDM model with a smooth hyperbolic switch of the sign of the cosmological constant was tested against supernova data from DES-SN5YR, BAO from DESI, and the growth rate of large-scale structure. The analysis showed that current observations do not reveal significant deviations from standard ΛCD
abstract: Recent measurements of BAO (DESI), CMB, and supernovae show a slight preference for dynamical dark energy over $\Lambda$CDM. This pushes the effective neutrino mass toward negative values, motivating models like $\Lambda_s$CDM with a sign-switching cosmological constant: negative (AdS) at $z > z^\dagger$ and positive (dS) at $z < z^\dagger$. Instead of a step function, the paper uses a smooth transition $\Lambda(z) \propto \tanh[\Delta(z^\dagger - z)]$, and the parameters $z^\dagger$ and $\Delta$ are constrained using DES-SN5YR data (Dovekie calibration), DESI BAO, and $f\sigma_8$. A joint analysis yields a $\chi^2_{\text{min}}$ close to $\Lambda$CDM, and information criteria do not favor extra parameters. The parameter $\Delta = 24.75^{+17.42}_{-17.48}$ remains unconstrained, indicating indistinguishability between sharp and smooth transitions. Thus, current late-universe data cannot resolve the transition details, as shown without directly constraining the sum of neutrino masses; forecasts for future surveys are provided.
threads: Почти вся история Вселенной скрыта от нас за занавесом. Новые данные DESI и 1800 сверхновых помогли расслышать лишь общий ритм, но не разобрали, был ли переход резким или плавным — момент спрятан в эпохе тёмной материи. Будущие карты неба обещают приподнять занавес и показать, каким был тот самый жест. Возможно, мы увидим, как долгая пауза взорвалась ускорением.

title: Machine Learning in Astrophysics: How Template Leakage Creates the Illusion of Accuracy
oneliner: Standard cross-validation in machine learning tasks for gravitational waves from collapsing supernovae can yield deceptively high results due to data leakage between training and test signals, calling into question the reliability of predictions for the equation of state of nuclear matter.
description: The study reveals a critical disconnect between machine learning results under random cross-validation and testing on genuinely new physical models. By analyzing simulations of gravitational waves from core-collapse supernovae, the authors show that models appearing accurate under standard evaluatio
abstract: Gravitational waves from core-collapse supernovae can carry information about the equation of state (EoS) of dense matter. The study checks whether machine learning, trained on a finite catalog of simulations, can predict EoS parameters for a missing family. Standard random cross-validation yields R²=0.70 (K₀), 0.67 (J), 0.60 (L). However, when validating with the leave-one-EoS-out (LOEO) approach, the model fails: MAE=44.57, 3.19, 30.54 MeV and negative R². The generalization gap is reproduced across linear models, random forests, neural networks, and gradient boosting. Restricting to physical features (bounce amplitude and width, peak frequency) reduces template leakage but does not restore extrapolation. Additional analysis of progenitor mass shows that classification generalizes to new rotation rates, while regression is biased towards the catalog interior. Conclusion: reliable physical inference about unknown EoS requires leave-family-out validation, extended simulations, and physics-informed methods.
threads: Машинное обучение, расшифровывающее гравитационные сигналы сверхновых, даёт обманчиво точные прогнозы: R² 0.70 рушится при честной проверке. Алгоритм похож на музыканта, выучившего одну пластинку: новая мелодия — и он теряется. Проблема утечки шаблонов ставит под вопрос надёжность предсказаний уравнения состояния ядерной материи — а ведь именно оно скрывает разгадку судьбы массивных звёзд. Будущие детекторы вроде Einstein Telescope не простят нам этой ошибки, если мы не научи

title: Phantom Dark Energy from Z_N Axion: A Natural Mechanism Without Ghosts
oneliner: Cosmological evolution of an axion locked by the density of dark pions leads to an effective equation of state with w<-1 without violating physical principles.
description: Recent DESI indications of time-varying dark energy challenge quintessence models. This work presents a microscopic model based on an axion coupled to N copies of a dark QCD with a Z_N exchange symmetry. The symmetry exponentially suppresses the axion vacuum potential, setting the dark energy scale,
abstract: A phantom dark energy model: an axion in N copies of a two-flavor dark QCD with a Z_N permutation symmetry. The Z_N symmetry exponentially suppresses the axion potential down to the dark energy scale. Breaking Z_N when one sector reheats restores the axion's periodicity, while dark pions account for the relic abundance of dark matter. Initially, a pion gas keeps the axion away from its vacuum; as the universe expands, it dissipates, the axion rolls, creating effective phantom behavior (w < –1) without fine-tuning. The model parameters simultaneously yield the correct relic density of dark matter and the dark energy magnitude, satisfy observational constraints, and qualitatively reproduce DESI's preference for an evolving equation of state.
threads: Тёмная энергия — не скучная константа, а взведённая пружина. Аксион миллиарды лет ждал своего часа, стиснутый роем тёмных пионов, пока расширение не ослабило тиски. Теперь он срывается в полёт, раздвигая галактики. Возможно, тень этой драмы уже лежит на искривлениях света — нам осталось лишь расшифровать снимок.

title: Supermassive Black Holes Spin Independently of Their Galaxies
oneliner: Spectropolarimetry of active galactic nuclei reveals that their spin orientation is random relative to their host disks.
description: Scientists compared the spin directions of supermassive black holes in active galactic nuclei with the rotation directions of their host galaxies. Using spectropolarimetry to probe gas kinematics near the black hole and optical images to trace the winding of spiral arms, they found no correlation. T
abstract: Comparing the apparent spin directions of active galactic nuclei (AGN) and their host disk galaxies was done using spectropolarimetry: AGN spin was determined via the change in polarization position angle across broad lines, caused by presumed equatorial scattering. The number of co-rotating and counter-rotating systems is equal. This rules out the 'avoidance zone' hypothesis for radio jets due to small black hole axis tilts; biconical outflows from the narrow-line region also avoid the galaxy plane. The results point to random spin axis orientations in the studied black hole mass range. Deviations of the polarization position angle from the equatorial scattering model are explained by dust clumpiness. Cases of position angle variation over years are noted, possibly due to moving dust clumps or variable continuum anisotropy.
threads: Сверхмассивные чёрные дыры крутятся как попало, словно волчки, получившие шальной пинок, а не синхронно с галактической каруселью. Спектрополяриметрия 54 активных ядер показала хаос вместо оркестра. Теперь эволюцию галактик понимаем как джаз — с импровизацией джетов и непредсказуемыми вспышками звёзд. В будущем это поможет понять, когда галактика затухнет, а когда вспыхнет новыми светилами.

title: Neural Network Leap: KLT-Net Rethinks the Cosmic Distance Ladder
oneliner: A hybrid neural network combining KAN, LSTM, and Transformer non-parametrically reconstructs the distance scale from Type Ia supernovae, refining the Hubble constant and challenging cosmological tension.
description: Using Pantheon+ data on 1701 Type Ia supernovae, the novel KLT-Net architecture merges Kolmogorov-Arnold networks, Long Short-Term Memory, and attention mechanisms for model-independent reconstruction of the distance modulus. The Most Frequent Value (MFV) method estimates the absolute magnitude of s
abstract: Directly reconstructing the cosmic distance ladder from observations is a core task in cosmology. A hybrid neural network, KLT-Net (combining KAN, LSTM, and Transformer), was introduced to model this ladder and estimate cosmological parameters from the apparent magnitudes of Type Ia supernovae in the Pantheon catalog. The network nonparametrically recovers the distance modulus μ(z), effectively capturing nonlinearities in the data. Comparisons with alternative models and ablation tests confirm its edge. Within a flat ΛCDM framework, H₀ and Ωm were statistically estimated. The absolute magnitude MB is determined via the most frequent value (MFV) method based on literature data. Bayesian analysis was validated with the Hessian matrix, showing that KLT-Net's predictions tightly constrain the Hubble constant in flat ΛCDM. Paired with MFV and Bayesian statistics, this forms a robust toolkit for cosmological studies—especially when dealing with complex, high-dimensional data.
threads: Космологический кризис: локальные измерения разбегания галактик дают скорость 73 км/с, глобальные — 67. Расхождение в 5σ не укладывается ни в одну модель. KLT-Net — это дирижёр, который настраивает космический оркестр сверхновых, используя сплайны вместо нот. Результат — чистая нота H₀≈69.6 км/с/Мпк. Сглаживая диссонанс, сеть открывает путь к автоматическому открытию законов физики из данных. Мы на пороге научной «психоистории».

title: Classical Gravity Distorts Quantum Snapshots
oneliner: A new method distinguishes quantum gravity from classical by anomalies in measurements.
description: Scientists have proposed a way to test the nature of gravity by observing the oscillations of microscopic mirrors. If gravity is classical, the reconstructed quantum picture violates fundamental constraints—opening a path to lab tests.
abstract: The influence of classical gravity (Schrödinger–Newton theory) on the continuous quantum tomography of a macroscopic mechanical oscillator with homodyne detection is investigated. Unlike quantum mechanics, in the SN model, the measurement record reflects a different conditional dynamics, which, upon quantum-optimal reconstruction, introduces a state-dependent contribution. This makes the reconstructed covariance matrix sensitive to tomography angles and can push it beyond the Heisenberg limits. The distinguishability of the models is evaluated using the Hellinger distance and studied as a function of measurement strength and temperature. The consideration is generalized to nonlinear quantum mechanics: when the conditional dynamics during readout depend on the state itself, the tomographic map acquires nonlinear corrections.
threads: Оказывается, если гравитация классическая, то при попытке сделать квантовый «снимок» зеркальца результат вылезает за рамки, запрещённые принципом неопределённости. Это как камера, которая трясётся в такт с тем, что снимает — учёные учатся ловить такие искажения.

title: Microquasar Cygnus X-3 as a Pevatron powering the Cygnus Bubble
oneliner: The ultra-high-energy gamma-ray emission of the Cygnus Bubble is likely produced by protons accelerated to PeV energies in the microquasar Cygnus X-3, rather than the star-forming region Cygnus OB2.
description: Recent observations by the LHAASO observatory revealed variable ultra-high-energy gamma-ray emission from the microquasar Cygnus X-3 with energies up to several PeV. This points to a hadronic super-Pevatron in the binary system. The authors of the paper model the diffusion of accelerated protons int
abstract: The ultra-high-energy gamma-ray source (above 100 TeV) in the microquasar Cygnus X-3, discovered by the LHAASO observatory, exhibits a spectrum up to several PeV and variability, pointing to a hadronic PeVatron inside the binary system. Accelerated protons lose only a tiny fraction of their energy within the pair; once they leave, diffusion creates a gamma-ray halo hundreds of parsecs across. This halo has already been detected as the Cygnus Bubble—a source with an angular diameter of ~6° and a spectrum extending to 1 PeV, usually attributed to the Cygnus X star-forming region (the Cygnus OB2 association at a distance of 1.4 kpc). The radial distribution of cosmic rays, reconstructed from gamma-ray and gas data, indicates continuous injection from a point source, making the connection with Cygnus X-3 physically preferred at energies above 400 TeV. Energetic estimates confirm the feasibility. Thus, the Cygnus Bubble is redefined as a member of the population of ultra-high-energy microquasar gamma-ray halos.
threads: В центре Пузыря Лебедя бьётся чёрная дыра. Каждые 4.8 часа она делает «впрыск» протонов, и за тысячелетия вокруг разливается гамма-океан. Это не звёздный мегаполис Лебедь OB2, а скромный микроквазар Лебедь X-3 — космический кардиостимулятор. Телескопы нового поколения прочитают этот пульс в деталях, и мы, быть может, увидим, как рождаются самые энергичные частицы Вселенной.

title: When Curvature Dictates Size: The Mechanism of Shape Sensing by Living Cells
oneliner: Physicists have proposed a model explaining how cells spontaneously change size depending on surface curvature — a key mechanism of morphogenesis.
description: On curved surfaces like embryonic tissues, cells are not uniform: in regions of high curvature they become larger. This pattern, predicted by a vertex model and confirmed on Drosophila embryos, arises from the competition between geometric constraints and mechanical equilibrium. The discovery sheds
abstract: A vertex model of cell tissue on surfaces of arbitrary Gaussian curvature has been developed. On ellipsoidal surfaces, a non-uniform cell size distribution spontaneously arises: in regions with high positive curvature, cells are consistently larger than in low-curvature areas. The cause is mechanical equilibrium governed by Riemannian geometry: curvature reduces the perimeter-to-area ratio, decreasing tension on cell boundaries; compensatory area increase restores force balance. This pattern is robust to changes in model parameters and matches experiments. Perimeter distribution, on the other hand, depends on the competition between geometric effect and deformation required for equilibrium, and reverses trend at a critical value of cell shape index. The results demonstrate that curvature-driven self-organization of cell size could serve as a universal physical mechanism for sensing spatial shape.
threads: Клетки на выпуклостях крупнее — не из-за генов, а благодаря кривизне ткани. Геометрия управляет размером, как гравитация — орбитами. Меняя изгиб каркаса, мы сможем направлять рост органов без химии.

title: Weakly Supervised Learning for Anomaly Detection in the Gamma-Ray Sky
oneliner: A background-versus-mixture approach identifies unusual gamma-ray source spectra without detailed signal models.
description: This work explores the potential of weakly supervised machine learning for less model-dependent searches of new phenomena in gamma-ray spectra. Across three scenarios—separating pulsars and active galactic nuclei, searching for dark matter subhalos, and detecting spectral distortions from axion-phot
abstract: This study tackles the classification of gamma-ray sources caught by the Fermi LAT telescope, many of which remain a mystery. They introduced a weakly supervised learning approach that doesn't demand neatly labeled data—the classifier learns from samples with varying splashes of signal mixed into background. They tested it on three fronts: separating pulsars from active galactic nuclei (a calibration run), hunting for dark matter subhalos, and picking up spectral quirks from axions oscillating into photons. They explored how the signal share and the makeup of the training mix affect classification chops. Turns out, weak supervision can pull out oddball or signal-like data clusters without leaning on detailed templates, and when the stars align, it gets nearly as good as a fully supervised champ. This method really shines when a precise signal model is hazy or only partly known—offering a handy sidekick for candidate sifting and anomaly ranking in gamma-ray astronomy.
threads: Телескоп Fermi накопил тысячи спектров гамма-источников, и почти треть из них — загадочные объекты без опознавательных знаков. Выудить среди них сигнал тёмной материи или аксионов — задача, требующая отказа от привычных шаблонов. Новый подход учится на контрасте двух выборок: чистое фоновое «звучание» и смесь, где может прятаться аномалия. Классификатор сам находит диссонанс, не нуждаясь в готовых примерах. Это превращает астрофизические данные в бескрайнее поле для автоматич

title: Atoms Get Entangled in Space: A New Kind of Quantum Link
oneliner: Scientists have for the first time entangled the positions of two atoms separated by hundreds of microns.
description: Using Rydberg blockade, physicists linked the motion of two atoms in space: when one received a light push and moved, the other stayed put. This quantum connection opens a path to complex quantum systems for computing and simulation.
abstract: Entangling two spatially separated atoms is usually achieved through their internal states. This work shows that in a system of two neutral atoms, separated in space, Rydberg blockade and photon recoil from Rydberg excitation can displace one atom by several microns if the second atom blocks the excitation. After recapturing the atoms with optical tweezers, an entangled state forms where their spatial positions are correlated. The resulting state is a Bell state of two atoms, each in a superposition of two locations separated by up to hundreds of microns. This approach enables the creation of macroscopic entangled states, valuable for quantum information processing.
threads: Два атома играют в квантовую чехарду: один получает световой пинок и отскакивает на сотни микрон, но только если второй разрешит. Так рождается запутанность положений — новый трюк для квантовых компьютеров будущего.

title: Quantum Boomerang in Time Crystals
oneliner: The temporal analogue of the quantum boomerang effect demonstrates the return of a wave packet to the initial moment in time due to disorder.
description: A team of physicists theoretically showed that the quantum boomerang effect—a dynamical signature of Anderson localization—can manifest in the time domain in systems with time crystals. Using a periodically kicked particle in a one-dimensional box, they constructed an effective tight-binding model w
threads: Время — не равнодушная стрела. В квантовом мире его можно свернуть в кольцо. Представьте: вы периодически встряхиваете частицу, добавляете каплю хаоса — и её волновая функция, как квантовый бумеранг, уходит в будущее и возвращается. Это не затухающее эхо, а новая структура реальности. Открывается дверь к квантовой памяти на временных кристаллах — где информация будет храниться не в железе, а в самом ритме времени.

title: Cosmic Acceleration in Question: Why DESI Sees Deceleration but SDSS Doesn't?
oneliner: Different surveys of baryon acoustic oscillations paint a contradictory picture of the current expansion of the universe, and the problem lies in the redshift depth.
description: A new analysis of DESI DR2 and SDSS DR16 data shows that without a reliable “anchor” at low redshifts, conclusions about present-day acceleration may be wrong. The combination of DESI with cosmic microwave background data gives a median deceleration parameter q0 ≈ +0.10, which formally indicates dec
abstract: Analysis of baryon acoustic oscillations (BAO) from DESI DR2 data (over 14 million galaxies and quasars) combined with CMB radiation and type Ia supernovae reveals a preference for time-varying dark energy. Comparison with SDSS data shows: DESI+Planck yields $w_0 = -0.41^{+0.21}_{-0.22}$ and $q_0 = 0.10^{+0.21}_{-0.23}$, while SDSS+Planck gives $w_0 = -0.71^{+0.19}_{-0.18}$ and $q_0 = -0.22^{+0.20}_{-0.21}$. The reason lies in the different minimum effective redshifts: $z_{\rm eff}\approx0.295$ for DESI and $\approx0.15$ for SDSS. Present-day parameters $w_0$ and $q_0$ are sensitive to data at $z\approx0$; high $z$ require CPL parameterization extrapolation. DESI, lacking data at $z<0.295$, is forced to extrapolate, shifting $q_0$ into positive territory and $w_0$ above $-1$. Pantheon+ restores low-redshift data and returns $q_0$ to negative values, relieving the tension with ΛCDM. Thus, the anomaly is a sample artifact, not new physics; split tomography is proposed for further testing.
threads: Вселенная — оркестр. Но её басы выпали из партитуры. DESI, не видя ближайших галактик, не может решить: ускоряется ли космос или затихает. SDSS слышит низкие ноты — и с ним Вселенная несётся быстрее. Уберите бас у SDSS — и он тоже зазвучит минорно. Разгадка не в физике, а в глубине тона. Настройка томографии вернёт утраченную ноту, и мы узнаем, куда движется космос.

title: How generalist neural networks find fast radio bursts: a zero-shot test
oneliner: General vision-language models, trained on everyday images, can recognize mysterious fast radio bursts without extra training, matching specialized detectors.
description: Fast radio bursts (FRBs) are millisecond-duration radio signals of cosmic origin, traditionally detected using complex dedispersion algorithms. In a new study, scientists tested whether compact, open-source multimodal models (VLMs) running locally could detect FRBs from dynamic spectrum images in a
threads: За тысячную долю секунды далёкая галактика выбрасывает энергию, сравнимую с недельным светом Солнца. Этот радиовсплеск на графике выглядит как каллиграфический росчерк — изогнутая линия, зашифровавшая путь сквозь плазму. Нейросеть, учившаяся на котиках и городах, без всякого натаскивания распознала этот почерк точнее профильных детекторов. Мы вручаем ИИ не готовые инструкции, а чувство прекрасного — и он слышит музыку сфер.

title: The SETI Blind Spot: How Technological Progress Makes Alien Civilizations Invisible
oneliner: Rapid technological advancement squeezes the window for detecting alien signals to mere decades, demanding new search strategies.
description: Traditional searches for extraterrestrial intelligence (SETI) focus on narrowband radio signals, but our own technological evolution shows such signals are just a passing phase. A model of exponential technological growth predicts that the duration of a civilization’s detectable technosignature phas
abstract: Traditionally in SETI, the key parameter is L (from the Drake equation)—the duration of a civilization’s communicative phase. This work argues that a more critical quantity is τ_d—the period during which a civilization produces technosignatures actually detectable by our current instruments. By modeling technological progress as an exponential process, the expression obtained is: τ_d = α^{-1} ln(K_max/K_min), where α is the rate of technological acceleration, and K_min and K_max are the minimum and maximum technology levels accessible to observation. As α increases, τ_d can shrink to mere decades, sharply narrowing the window of mutual technological overlap. This “technological dissonance” points to the need for broadband, technology-neutral search strategies, along with anomaly analysis in multi-wavelength and multi-channel surveys.
threads: Радиоголос Земли слабеет. В 1960-х мы кричали в космос аналоговым ТВ, а сегодня шепчем цифровыми пакетами. Так же могут вести себя иные цивилизации: их техносигнатуры — лишь короткая вспышка на шкале эволюции. Мы ищем не вечный шум, а мимолетный аккорд. К чему приведёт охота за такими призраками?

title: The Search for Extraterrestrial Life: From Smoke to Gardens
oneliner: Scientists suggest looking for green alien technologies, not industrial smog.
description: We've been searching the skies for factory chimney smoke, but we should be looking for blooming gardens. A new approach in astronomy suggests shifting focus from pollution to ecological harmony.
abstract: Most proposed technosignatures rely on detecting deviations from natural signals — essentially, searching for pollution. Following the work of indigenous scholars, pollution is considered a form of colonization, even on an interstellar scale. Thus, current searches aim to detect colonial societies that mirror Earth's own, which may shed light on the Fermi paradox: we scan for highly polluting and potentially destructive systems, while civilizations with minimal environmental impact are overlooked. As an alternative, the concept of technosignatures that sustain natural ecosystems is proposed — technologies reflecting harmonious relationships with nature, functionally converging with biosignatures.
threads: Поиск инопланетян по загрязнению похож на поиск колонизаторов. Разумные цивилизации могут жить в гармонии с природой, не оставляя грязных следов. Так можно ответить на парадокс Ферми.

title: The Hidden Invariant of Magnetic Oceans: Unraveling the Planetary Dynamo
oneliner: A newly discovered adiabatic invariant in magnetohydrodynamics of a rotating fluid explains energy accumulation in large-scale toroidal magnetic fields—a key mechanism of the dynamo.
description: This work investigates magnetohydrodynamics in a conducting fluid layer on planets and stars, where Coriolis, buoyancy, and magnetic forces are all important. Against an equilibrium with a toroidal magnetic field, an 'extra invariant' was found—a quantity conserved adiabatically, a rarity for wave s
abstract: The existence of an additional invariant has been established in magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) of a rotating and stratified fluid. This invariant is conserved adiabatically, meaning approximately over long timescales. Such exact conserved quantities are extremely rare in dissipative systems, making the discovery noteworthy in itself. Moreover, the discovered invariant appears to be connected to the dynamo mechanism — the phenomenon responsible for generating and sustaining magnetic fields in planets and stars. This connection opens new avenues for studying the long-term evolution of magnetic fields in geophysical and astrophysical objects.
threads: Магнитное поле планеты — это симфония, но за кулисами стоит дирижёр-инвариант. Он направляет энергию в тороидальное поле, как река впадает в океан. Этот скрытый закон объясняет, почему у Земли есть магнитосфера, а у Марса нет — и однажды, возможно, прольёт свет на загадку мыслящих океанов в духе «Соляриса».

title: Stellar J-Harvesting: A New Path to Extraterrestrial Technosignatures
oneliner: Star spin as a clue: a pilot search for anomalously slow rotators among 6725 Kepler stars opens a new window for SETI, free from infrared noise.
description: The concept of Stellar J-Harvesting (SJH) proposes searching for technological civilizations by anomalously slow stellar rotation. Unlike a Dyson sphere, this method does not require detecting an infrared excess and relies on comparing a star's rotation period with population norms. A pilot search o
abstract: The concept of Stellar J-Harvesting (SJH) is introduced — a technosignature where an artificial system extracts rotational angular momentum from a star. Unlike a classic Dyson sphere, such a system does not necessarily produce an excess in the mid-infrared; its main indicator is anomalously slow rotation compared to stars of the same type. The energy dependence on period is derived, possible interaction channels are outlined, and then a search for relatively slow rotators among Kepler stars is performed using color–surface gravity bins. After eight false-positive filters, the clean sample contains 6,725 main-sequence stars of spectral classes F, G, K. Two slow rotators with >4σ deviation were found, but Gaia DR3 and WISE data point to more mundane causes: unresolved binary systems and low metallicity. Therefore, no discovery claim is made; a conservative pilot upper limit on the frequency of strong SJH-like signals is set at f_SJH < 4.5×10⁻⁴.
threads: Космический маховик замедлился? Две звезды в каталоге Kepler крутились в 10 раз медленнее аналогов, но оказались обманками: спутник-невидимка и бедный металлами состав. Метод не сломлен: если кто-то в Галактике тормозит светила магнитным захватом, мы это увидим. Охота на невидимых инженеров только начинается — с новыми данными Gaia и радиоглазами.

title: Noise Gives Birth to Quantum Order
oneliner: Noise, which usually destroys everything in its path, can line up particles into a perfect one-way wave.
description: Physicists have discovered that coordinated noise creates a stable pattern of particles moving strictly in one direction. It resembles a stadium wave frozen in one direction. The finding overturns the idea that interference always ruins quantum effects: noise can be the architect of order.
abstract: Decoherence is typically viewed as an obstacle to realizing topological phases. This work shows that it can induce topological phenomena. Using a lattice system subject to phase noise, it demonstrates that the averaged dynamics, described by an interacting quantum master equation, realizes a topological phase characterized by a winding number and the non-Hermitian skin effect.
