The dynamical consequence is striking: correlated stochastic noise generates asymmetric diffusion, the direction of which is fixed by the winding number and reversible only through a topological phase transition. This effect is purely interaction-induced, distinguishing it from studies of free systems. It vanishes upon postselection of measurement outcomes, confirming it as a genuinely open quantum phenomenon. Notably, the model remains analytically solvable. The results establish correlated quantum noise as a pathway to topology in open many-body systems, going beyond free-particle and non-Hermitian paradigms.
threads: Что, если шум не враг, а создатель? Учёные показали, что квантовый беспорядок может выстроить частицы в одностороннюю волну — словно стадионная «мексиканская волна» зафиксирована в одном направлении. Так рождается топологическая материя.

title: Ionized Nebulae Hide a Wide Range of Gas Densities
oneliner: Different spectral density indicators in ionized nebulae yield varying values because each is sensitive to its own part of a broad density distribution, not to a single value.
description: Traditional methods for determining electron density in star-forming regions and galaxies rely on forbidden emission lines, but different indicators give values that differ by orders of magnitude. It turns out this is not an error in atomic data nor a consequence of ionization stratification; instea
abstract: Discrepancies in determining electron density in ionized gas via emission lines, reaching two orders of magnitude, were usually attributed to errors in atomic data or ionization stratification. It has been shown that the reason is more fundamental: each diagnostic line is sensitive to its own density range, and in nebulae with a broad density distribution, the lines register only the regions they are tuned to. A simple relationship was discovered between the density returned by a line and the density of its maximum sensitivity; this relationship is confirmed from HII regions to entire galaxies. Therefore, there is no single value for electron density—nebulae have a broad distribution containing far more dense gas than any single indicator showed. Estimates of masses, pressures, composition, and energetics, based on the assumption of a single density, require revision for star-forming regions and galaxies throughout the Universe.
threads: Спектры туманностей — как старые пластинки, где каждый трек — своя история о плотности. Но пластинка одна, а песни разные. Линии серы поют о разреженном газе, линии хлора — о плотных сгустках. Десятилетиями астрономы спорили, кто прав. Новые данные SDSS-V показали: правы все. Туманность — не однородный суп, а смесь фаз, от вакуума до почти твёрдого состояния. Десять процентов излучения идёт из сверхплотных капель, которые низкоплотностные индикаторы не замечают. Это меняет вс

title: Dark Energy's Seesaw: A New Explanation for a Strange Signal
oneliner: Dark energy fluctuations explained without new physics: particles within it temporarily cluster, and galaxy clusters amplify this, causing sharp surges in cosmic expansion.
description: The mysterious force accelerating the universe turns out to be fickle. In a new model, dark energy is like steam that partially condenses into 'droplets' when cooled. Massive galaxy clusters act as refrigerators, their gravity creating pressure differences. This solves recent anomalies in supernova
abstract: A new realization of a low-redshift phantom transition is proposed, using only well-known ingredients: fermion condensation and general relativity. The key idea is the mutual influence of effective quintom dark energy and the backreaction from the formation of nonlinear structures. Cosmological evolution remains close to ΛCDM up to small redshifts, where backreaction triggers a phase transition. The total equation of state of dark energy crosses wDE = –1 first from top to bottom, and for certain parameters later from bottom to top, as observed. For a characteristic value of the backreaction density parameter Ω_BR (z=0) = 0.0572, the CPL parameterization yields: transition redshift z* ≈ 0.35, w0 ≈ –0.76, wa ≈ –0.93. The result is consistent with the joint analysis of DESI+CMB+SNIa data (datasets DESY5, PantheonPlus, Union3).
threads: Вселенная расширяется с ускорением из-за загадочной тёмной энергии. Но недавние наблюдения показали: её «напор» словно колебался — сначала усилился, потом ослабел. Новое объяснение, использующее физику конденсации частиц и неравномерности космоса, обходится без экзотических полей.

title: How LISA Will Unveil the Secrets of Ultralight Dark Matter with Quadratic Coupling
oneliner: The space-based detector LISA will be able to pick up signals from ultralight dark matter thanks to its quadratic interaction with ordinary matter, sidestepping the screening effects on Earth.
description: Researchers have assessed the sensitivity of the future space-based gravitational-wave observatory LISA (launching in 2035) to ultralight dark matter, whose particles interact with Standard Model fields via quadratic coupling. This mechanism arises in many extensions of the Standard Model, including
abstract: Ultralight dark matter interacts with Standard Model particles gravitationally and non-gravitationally, which can produce characteristic signals in gravitational-wave experiments. Signals induced by quadratic coupling are studied in the LISA detector. Due to the quadratic nature of the coupling, the signal appears at two frequencies: twice the dark matter mass and frequencies below its typical kinetic energy. The analysis showed that LISA outperforms current limits from ground-based and astrophysical methods in certain mass ranges. A key advantage is the absence of shielding effects, which severely limit the sensitivity of Earth-based experiments.
threads: Тёмная материя не просто безмолвна — она поёт на двух нотах. Высокая — эхо квантовых осцилляций, низкая — гул первобытных флуктуаций. Будущая обсерватория LISA станет первым инструментом, способным подслушать этот дуэт. Квадратичная связь частиц заставляет сигнал звучать вдвое выше ожидаемого, а космическое базирование избавляет от земных помех. Если мы научимся слышать музыку скрытой массы, то сможем заглянуть за грань Стандартной модели и составить карту невидимого.

title: Quantum-like Theater of Consciousness: A Non-Hermitian Model of Sensory Stimulus Awareness
oneliner: A new mathematical model inspired by quantum mechanics explains the hierarchy of subconscious, preconscious, and conscious information processing in the brain using non-Hermitian potential landscapes and cloud functions.
description: Scientists have proposed a phenomenological model of the Global Neuronal Workspace (GNW), in which early sensory processing generates an effective complex-valued landscape. This landscape governs the dynamics of high-level stimulus representations—cloud functions—whose evolution is described by a no
abstract: A model of the global neuronal workspace (GNW) is proposed, in which early sensory processing creates a complex-valued landscape that governs the dynamics of high-level representations, unifying sensory encoding and conscious access. Representations are encoded as a cloud function in the Hilbert space of perceptual states, combining the holistic nature of images with neural implementation. The dynamics are governed by a nonlinear Schrödinger-type equation in imaginary time with a non-Hermitian non-normal Hamiltonian and a Lotka–Volterra-type nonlinear term that preserves the norm and allows nonlocal interactions. The Hermitian part accounts for recognition (dissipative localization near minima), while the anti-Hermitian part accounts for information broadcasting (spatial propagation). The hierarchy is reproduced: subthreshold → preconscious → conscious. Conscious access arises as a bound state only when thresholds of landscape depth and top-down attention are exceeded. The approach provides a unified dynamical picture linking sensory processing, attention, and conscious access.
threads: 200 миллисекунд — миг, в который мозг собирает мир. Но почему один стимул врывается в сознание, а другой тонет в шуме? Физики предложили квантовую сцену: мысль — облако в тумане потенциального ландшафта. Прожектор внимания вырывает её из суперпозиции, и она застывает схлопнувшимся образом. Убери луч — растает, как предчувствие. Так рождается осознанный кадр. Когда-нибудь этот театр научится репетировать без стимулов — чистая игра памяти, где воскрешённые тени сами зажигают св

title: A sonic fingerprint of superfluidity: The Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless transition in excitonic bilayers
oneliner: The collapse of the Anderson-Bogoliubov sound speed at the BKT transition serves as a direct detector of the neutral superfluid phase.
description: In neutral excitonic condensates, there is no Meissner effect, making direct detection a challenging task. The authors propose using the Anderson-Bogoliubov collective mode, whose speed abruptly drops to zero at the Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless phase transition. Using a finite-dimensional functio
abstract: Exciton superfluidity in electron-hole bilayers at zero magnetic field is investigated. The electrically neutral condensate hinders direct measurement of phase coherence. A dynamic signature is proposed—the Anderson–Bogoliubov sound velocity. Across the BCS–BEC crossover at the Berezinskii–Kosterlitz–Thouless (BKT) transition point, the velocity exhibits a jump to zero, with the magnitude strongly dependent on density. Using temperature screening and renormalization group methods, the BKT temperature is determined. An experimentally accessible temperature window is found where vortex fluctuations strongly renormalize both the sound velocity and the transition temperature.
threads: В хоре экситонов каждый поёт свою партию, но настоящая музыка рождается, когда голоса сливаются в унисон — это и есть сверхтекучесть. Когда порядок разрушается, мелодия обрывается. Удивительно, что эта тишина слышна в лаборатории: теоретики предсказали, что в двойном графене обрыв будет резким, как падение занавеса. Возможно, так мы научимся не только слушать квантовый мир, но и дирижировать им.

title: Self-learning Wave Functions: How Neural Networks Conquer the Electron Gas
oneliner: Self-attention neural networks accurately reproduce quantum behavior of electrons at scales approaching the thermodynamic limit.
description: Researchers applied the self-attention architecture from machine learning to construct variational wave functions for a two-dimensional homogeneous electron gas with a record number of particles—up to 169. This approach not only outperformed the gold-standard diffusion Monte Carlo methods in accurac
abstract: Neural network variational ansätze with a self-attention mechanism surpass traditional ones in expressivity, but their computational complexity raises questions about scalability. When applied to a two-dimensional uniform electron gas for systems of up to N=169 particles, energies obtained are systematically lower than those from cutting-edge diffusion Monte Carlo calculations. Direct access to the ground-state wave function enabled the reconstruction of the full dispersion of collective modes in the liquid phase: from the plasmon branch at small q to the roton minimum near q=2k_F. The observed quantities for N=91 and N=169 are in near-perfect agreement, indicating convergence to the thermodynamic limit.
threads: Электронный газ — вовсе не газ, а податливая жидкость, которая при остывании норовит закристаллизоваться. Нейросети с самовниманием впервые позволили увидеть этот переход в мельчайших деталях. Они работают как джазовый ансамбль: каждый электрон-музыкант вслушивается в соседей, и из этого хаоса рождается точнейшая волновая функция. Когда-нибудь такие модели станут «квантовым ChatGPT», проектируя сверхпроводники с комнатной температурой. Мы на пороге эры, где самое сложное веще

title: Lack of quantum advantage in approximate optimization of spin glasses
oneliner: A quasiclassical analysis of the QAOA algorithm on the Sherrington–Kirkpatrick model showed that its performance does not surpass classical methods.
description: Researchers applied the Truncated Wigner Approximation (TWA) to the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) for a spin glass problem. It turned out that the energy achieved by the algorithm converges to the exact Parisi value as log(p)/p, which matches the behavior of classical heuristics.
abstract: A semiclassical analysis (truncated Wigner approximation) of the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) on the Sherrington–Kirkpatrick model in the large-spin S limit. With fixed QAOA angles optimized for S=1/2, a nonmonotonic dependence of the final energy on spin magnitude is found. Small S are limited by dominant quantum noise, large S by exponential growth of initial fluctuations. For QAOA of depth p, an optimal compromise is achieved at S on the order of p, leading to convergence of energy to the Parisi value as log(p)/p. The semiclassical approach slightly outperforms the exact spin-1/2 QAOA, but both show the same convergence pattern. Eliminating initial noise and re-optimizing parameters yields an excellent result with convergence 1/p.
threads: Старая альпинистская мудрость гласит: «Лёд не прощает самонадеянности». QAOA убедился в этом на собственном опыте: в задаче о спиновых стёклах его эффективность упала до log(p)/p, тогда как классический спуск без шума даёт 1/p. Квантовые флуктуации здесь — не магия, а досадная тряска, сбивающая с пути. Возможно, истинное квантовое превосходство ждёт нас не в универсальной оптимизации, а в симуляции квантовых миров — там, где классический разум пасует.

title: Quantum Engine Outwits Carnot's Law: High Efficiency Without Sacrificing Power
oneliner: Japanese physicists have proposed a quantum heat engine, built on superconducting chips, that approaches Carnot efficiency while maintaining finite power, thanks to collective photon exchange.
description: According to classical thermodynamics, any heat engine reaching the maximum possible efficiency (the Carnot efficiency) must operate infinitely slowly, reducing its power to zero. This fundamental trade-off was rigorously proven as the Shiraishi–Saito–Tasaki (SST) inequality for systems with local i
abstract: A fundamental question in finite-time thermodynamics is whether a heat engine can achieve Carnot efficiency at finite power. In classical Markovian engines with local interactions, the trade-off between power and efficiency prohibits asymptotic approach to the Carnot limit. It has been theoretically shown that in quantum systems, degeneracy, symmetry, and collective transitions can circumvent this constraint. In this work, a heat engine implementation using superconducting circuits is proposed, emulating collective enhancement of dissipative processes. Such a scheme allows asymptotically reaching Carnot efficiency while maintaining finite power. The result demonstrates that enhanced dissipation can overcome the classical trade-off, and paves the way for designing quantum devices using collective dissipative phenomena on the platform of circuit quantum electrodynamics.
threads: Классический тепловой двигатель, стремясь к идеалу, замедляется до нуля. Но японские физики предложили схему, где фотоны действуют как кордебалет, усиливая перенос энергии. Теперь можно одновременно получить почти предельный КПД и высокую мощность. Это открывает дорогу к энергоэффективным квантовым технологиям — от охлаждения процессоров до сверхбыстрых квантовых батарей.

title: The Safe at the Edge of the Universe
oneliner: Like a safe with a timer, the cosmological horizon doesn't release information immediately. Physicists have calculated the exact moment when this happens.
description: Using a simplified model, researchers determined the delay with which information emerges from behind the cosmological horizon. Quantum particles born near the horizon carry data not instantly: first, a characteristic time passes — roughly 1/8 of the horizon’s traversal period. This discovery helps
abstract: The onset of information leakage from the de Sitter cosmological horizon via radiation from a single Hawking pair is studied. In a class of two-dimensional flowing geometries interpolating between AdS2 and dS2, probe states are constructed using local operators and modular conjugates. The operator algebra (centaur algebra) is extended to a type II∞ factor via the crossed product. This enables the computation of the entropy difference between the thermofield double (reference state) and the state with a pair. The resulting dependence describes a mini-Page curve with a minimum at τ≈β/8, interpreted as the time when quantum information begins to exit the horizon. In the microcanonical ensemble, the algebraic entropy coincides with the generalized entropy of the entanglement wedge cut tracking the emitted particle. The relative modular flow between states yields a Lyapunov exponent λ=2π/β, defining the scrambling time—the scale at which the pair's information becomes accessible to an observer in the static patch. The result quantitatively links information leakage to horizon dynamics and scrambling.
threads: Представьте дым над чашкой кофе: каждая струйка уносит информацию. Физики выяснили, в какой момент информация начинает утекать из космологического горизонта — как в испаряющейся чёрной дыре. Расчёт показал: это происходит через 1/8 характерного времени после рождения пары частиц.

title: Fractional anomalous Hall crystals in rhombohedral graphene: energetics and stabilization mechanism
oneliner: Harvard physicists have shown that five-layer graphene can spontaneously form a crystal lattice with fractional topological charge, merging the physics of the Wigner crystal and the fractional quantum Hall effect.
description: Fractional anomalous Hall crystals (FAHC) — hypothetical states combining topological order and spontaneous breaking of translational symmetry — have been studied for the first time in a realistic model of rhombohedral graphene. Scientists from Harvard used a variational approach and numerical Monte
abstract: Fractional anomalous Hall crystals (FAHC) replicate the topological order of the fractional quantum Hall effect without a magnetic field, spontaneously breaking translational symmetry with a fractional number of electrons per unit cell. Their realization in rhombohedral five-layer graphene (R5G) was explored using variational wave functions and Monte Carlo methods, incorporating realistic dispersion and screened Coulomb interactions. It was shown that FAHC energetically compete with integer anomalous Hall crystals and Fermi liquids. Stability is ensured by mapping to a parent quantum Hall liquid, which pins the interaction energy, and kinetic energy that favors periods matching the 'Mexican hat' dispersion minimum in R5G. A weak periodic field selectively lowers the energy of commensurate fractional crystals. Predictions of stability windows upon varying twist angle and displacement field agree with experiments, hinting at fractional anomalous Hall states emerging from the continuum and interactions.
threads: Дробный квантовый холловский кристалл — это танец электронов на ободе «мексиканской шляпы». Ритм задаёт сама форма дисперсии, а подложка лишь шепчет, какой следующий шаг сделать. Так рождается топологический порядок без магнитного поля. Когда-нибудь такие кристаллы станут кубитами в квантовых компьютерах.

title: Monopole Plasma Resonance: A Key to Detecting 3D U(1) Quantum Spin Liquids
oneliner: Electrically charged magnetic monopoles form a plasma inside an insulator, creating a resonance at extremely low frequencies that could serve as a clear signal of a quantum spin liquid.
description: In certain three-dimensional quantum spin liquids (QSLs), emergent magnetic monopoles arise that carry an electric charge. This work explores the electrical conductivity of such a medium; despite insulating behavior under direct current, a sharp plasma resonance—akin to that in metals—appears at fin
abstract: In three-dimensional U(1) spin liquids, such as dipole quantum spin ice, emergent monopoles generate an emergent magnetic field that under symmetry transforms akin to electric polarization. As a result, the monopole cores concentrate real electric charge, and at low temperatures they form a plasma. Owing to coupling with the emergent gauge field, the system remains a DC dielectric yet exhibits a sharp plasma resonance at very low frequencies, reminiscent of a metal. Such a resonance provides a crisp experimental signature for detecting these states. Optimal conditions for observing this phenomenon in the candidate Ce₂Zr₂O₇ are discussed.
threads: В кристалле пирохлора, при 30 милликельвинах, безмолвно ведут свой танец магнитные монополи. Их коллективное движение порождает резонанс — электрический отклик на частоте 600 мегагерц, где обычно царит радиомолчание. Это не просто экзотика: такие спиновые жидкости могут стать основой топологических кубитов. Возможно, будущие квантовые компьютеры будут построены из вещества, где заряд переносят не электроны, а призраки магнитного поля.

title: Internal Conversion in ThO2: The Key to Solid-State Nuclear Clocks
oneliner: Ab initio calculations reveal how the band gap governs the lifetime of the thorium-229 nuclear isomer, opening the door to optimizing next-generation nuclear clocks.
description: An international team of scientists performed first-principles calculations of the internal conversion rate of the 229Th isomeric transition in a ThO2 crystal. Using the FP-LAPW+lo method, they directly computed the hyperfine interaction matrix elements at the thorium nucleus, enabling them to deter
abstract: A first-principles calculation of the interband internal conversion rate for the 8.35 eV isomeric transition in ThO₂ has been performed. The transition energy lies above the band gap, allowing the isomer to decay nonradiatively by resonantly transferring a valence electron into the conduction band. The process is described as a sum over the Brillouin zone of vertical transitions weighted by hyperfine matrix elements on thorium, derived from all-electron LAPW spinors. Finite nuclear magnetization is included, regularizing the short-range behavior and the Bohr–Weisskopf effect. Applying scissor corrections to the experimental band gap widths of ThO₂ yields lifetimes of 1–16 µs. The value sharply increases as the band gap approaches the transition energy due to the shrinking phase volume. For large band gaps, the calculated lifetime is comparable to that measured for the conversion Mössbauer line. Conclusion: solid-state nuclear clocks with electronic readout are optimal when choosing a matrix with a band gap slightly below 8.35 eV.
threads: Ядерный шёпот: ядро тория-229 доверяет свою тайну электронам. В кристалле с узкой запрещённой зоной шёпот быстро захлёбывается — электроны как ненасытная аудитория впитывают энергию. Но расширьте «звукоизоляцию» до 7 эВ, и изомер замрёт на десятки микросекунд, будто эхо в безэховой камере. Мы осваиваем искусство настройки кристаллической решётки, чтобы однажды её ядерное эхо стало самым чутким камертоном реальности — от дрейфа фундаментальных констант до гравитационных волн.

title: Structural Origin of Water's Anomalous Heat Capacity
oneliner: Quantum effects merely dampen water's heat capacity, while its enigmatic maximum upon supercooling arises from rearrangements in the hydrogen-bond network.
description: An international team of scientists, using machine-learned potentials and molecular dynamics methods (both classical and quantum path-integral formulation), demonstrated that nuclear quantum effects are not responsible for the temperature anomaly in water's heat capacity. Instead, structural fluctua
abstract: The isobaric heat capacity of water is anomalously large under ambient conditions and exhibits a sharp maximum upon supercooling. Using classical and quantum-statistical molecular dynamics with accurate machine-learned interatomic potentials, it is shown that nuclear quantum effects primarily suppress high-frequency vibrations, while the anomalous temperature dependence of heat capacity is due to structural fluctuations. These are quantitatively described by an order parameter characterizing the insertion of second solvation shell molecules. A simple two-level mapping reveals an effective enthalpy scale of about 4 kJ/mol, associated with interconversion between low- and high-density local structures. This provides a microscopic link between changes in their populations and the excess heat capacity from the supercooled regime to ambient conditions.
threads: Вода — великий теплохранитель: её океаны вбирают энергию целых цивилизаций. Секрет её аномальной теплоёмкости кроется в непрерывном метании молекул между двумя типами локального порядка — словно танцпол, где чопорный вальс сменяется буйным джиттербагом. При переохлаждении эти метания становятся особенно затратными, порождая пик теплоёмкости. Разобравшись в этом молекулярном вальсе, мы приближаемся к разгадке фазовых переходов жидкость–жидкость, что сулит прорывы в климатическ

title: Controlled Criticality: How Screening Changes the Rules of Quantum Phase Transitions
oneliner: Physicists have separated the spatial and temporal aspects of the quantum Hall transition, showing that screening of the Coulomb interaction changes dynamics but not structure.
description: In strongly interacting quantum systems, phase transitions are often described by universal critical exponents. However, until now it remained unclear how screening affects the individual components of critical behavior—spatial and temporal. A team of scientists from India, Japan, and Israel used du
abstract: In continuous electronic phase transitions, Coulomb interactions alter the relationship between length, energy, and temperature, making it difficult to isolate their impact on spatial and dynamic criticality. Two improvements are proposed: joint temperature and current scaling to separately extract the dynamic exponent z and the localization length exponent γ, and the use of graphene devices with a double graphite gate, where the effective screening radius is tuned geometrically via the ratio of magnetic length to gate distance. Temperature scaling yields a combined exponent κ ≈ 0.21 in the screened regime and ≈ 0.41 in the unscreened regime; combining it with current scaling shows that z changes from ≈1 to ≈2, while γ remains around 2.4. Thus, gate-controlled screening selectively modifies the dynamic sector of the transition without affecting spatial criticality. Geometric screening becomes a universal tool for controlling interactions and separating disorder and correlation effects in two-dimensional systems, including the fractional quantum Hall effect and moiré materials.
threads: Оказывается, в квантовом мире пространство и время можно настраивать порознь. Физики научились менять темп электронного танца, не касаясь его фигур — словно хореограф ускоряет ритм, сохраняя па. Такой контроль открывает путь к точной инженерии квантовых материалов и, возможно, к созданию «реостатов» для самой реальности.

title: Time crystal on Rydberg atoms lives 17 hours
oneliner: Chinese physicists have created a continuous time crystal in an ensemble of Rydberg atoms, achieving a record lifetime of 16.95 hours.
description: Researchers from USTC observed ultra-long phase coherence in a nonequilibrium phase that spontaneously breaks continuous time-translation symmetry. Using three-photon excitation and radiofrequency modulation in cesium vapor, they stabilized a limit cycle, suppressing dissipation to record levels. A
abstract: Continuous time crystals are a nonequilibrium quantum phase that spontaneously breaks time-translation symmetry without periodic driving, manifesting as stable, long-lived oscillations. Their lifetime is typically limited by the instability of the limit cycle at the edge between nonlinear feedback and dissipation. We experimentally realized an ultralong-lived time crystal using Rydberg atoms in a controlled dissipative many-body system. Long-range interactions and a specially engineered dissipative environment suppress heating and decay. The key factor is closing the Liouvillian gap and achieving a nearly zero real part of the Liouvillian spectrum. Oscillation duration exceeded 16.95 hours—orders of magnitude longer than all known counterparts. This result provides a robust platform for exploring autonomous nonequilibrium phases and opens prospects for quantum sensing and continuous quantum information processing.
threads: Ритм, не стихающий 17 часов — дольше светового дня. Этот квантовый метроном бьётся, словно сердце, нашедшее резонанс с самим пульсом космоса. Мы учимся создавать память, которая не забывает, и сенсоры, чувствующие дыхание невидимых миров.

title: Neutrino Growth of Primordial Black Holes: Revisiting Mass Evolution in the Early Universe
oneliner: The study shows that primordial black holes can absorb neutrinos and significantly increase their mass during the radiation era, affecting their observability.
description: The classical view that primordial black holes (PBHs) do not gain mass in a radiation-dominated universe has been revised. An analysis of the primordial plasma kinetics revealed that neutrinos can be absorbed by PBHs with masses from 10^3 to 10^9 solar masses when the neutrino mean free path exceeds
abstract: A new picture of primordial black hole mass evolution via neutrino absorption is proposed. Using a semiclassical approach and analysis of early plasma kinetics, the thermal neutrino absorption by a population of primordial black holes in the mass range of 10^{-3} to 10^9 solar masses is recalculated. A significant mass gain is shown for intermediate and supermassive holes, altering the predicted peak of electron-positron pair annihilation in the universe's thermal history. Depending on the collapse fraction, an additional peak in the mass distribution may appear at intermediate values. Since black holes accrete thermal neutrinos, the fraction of dark matter contained in primordial black holes is also revised. These results update previous notions and are essential for interpreting observational dark matter data.
threads: Нейтрино — космические фантомы, проходящие сквозь световой год свинца как сквозь туман. Но в кипящем котле ранней Вселенной их незримый ливень был столь густ, что утолял голод первичных чёрных дыр, превращая их из песчинок в горы. И возможно, именно эти древние исполины — та самая тёмная материя, что прячет лицо мироздания.

title: How Machine Learning Accelerates Self-Consistency in Electronic Structure: A Warm Start for DFTB
oneliner: Using element-specific models, researchers cut self-consistency iterations in DFTB by up to 84%.
description: Self-consistent charge calculations in semi-empirical methods like DFTB often suffer from slow convergence, especially for complex systems. A team from the Fritz Haber Institute applied machine learning to accurately predict initial atomic charges using local environment descriptors and kernel ridge
abstract: The semi-empirical DFTB (Density-Functional Tight-Binding) method is effective for modeling molecules and materials while retaining access to electronic properties, but charge self-consistency (SCC) can require many iterations, especially for complex systems. A machine learning method is proposed that predicts initial atomic charges to accelerate SCC convergence. Separate models are trained for each element using the SOAP (Smooth Overlap of Atomic Positions) descriptor and kernel ridge regression, based on reference calculations. Testing on organic molecules, biomolecules, water clusters, transition metal oxides, and solid electrolytes showed that ML-predicted initial charges consistently and significantly reduce the number of iterations. The approach lowers the computational barrier for large-scale screening and dynamic simulations, making DFTB more practical for high-throughput tasks.
threads: Атомные заряды — как настроечные колки в молекулярном оркестре. Без верной инициализации самосогласование тянет бесконечную какофонию. ML учит каждый элемент играть с листа: для оксидов никеля время «настройки» сократилось на 84%. Это шаг к тому, чтобы симуляции материалов стали почти мгновенными, превратив дизайн катализаторов и батарей в рутинную задачу.

title: The Scalar Charge of Black Holes in the Dance of Gravitational Waves: What LISA Will See
oneliner: Neglecting post-adiabatic corrections distorts system parameters, but doesn't prevent measuring the scalar charge at moderate mass ratios.
description: Bayesian recovery analysis of LISA signals for systems with intermediate and extreme mass ratios showed that the first post-adiabatic order (1PA) in the gravitational sector is critical for estimating masses and the orbit, while the scalar charge remains robust for ϵ ≲ 10⁻⁴. Using purely Einsteinian
abstract: We constructed the first signal model for intermediate and extreme mass-ratio inspirals in theories with scalar fields, including post-adiabatic orbital evolution based on self-force. For quasi-circular inspirals into a non-rotating massive black hole, the gravitational sector at 1PA order is combined with leading scalar effects. Bayesian analysis of injections under LISA conditions showed that neglecting 1PA corrections biases the binary parameter estimates, but the scalar charge remains robust across a wide mass range. Applying pure GR templates to signals with a charged secondary body causes strong biases and underestimated uncertainties due to unaccounted correlations. The spin of the secondary body, down to a mass ratio of $10^{-4}$, is unconstrained even without scalar fields, contrary to previous work. Scalar emission at leading dipolar post-Newtonian order introduces negligible systematic errors compared to full relativistic fluxes.
threads: 100 тысяч витков — словно граммофонная пластинка, на которой медленно проступает скрытая дорожка. Игнорируя обертоны, мы теряем детали оркестровки, но основной мотив остаётся чистым. Скалярный заряд чёрных дыр — это тихий шёпот новых измерений; LISA сможет его уловить даже в несовершенной записи. Когда-нибудь так мы настроимся на тёмную энергию, как на забытую радиостанцию.

title: The Rocket Effect of Domain Walls: Vacuum Mass Asymmetry Changes the Picture
oneliner: A mass difference in the scalar field across vacuums propels domain walls like rockets, accelerating the decay of their network.
description: New research shows that domain walls — topological defects separating regions with distinct vacuum states — can emit scalar radiation anisotropically if the excitation masses in the two vacuums differ. This 'rocket effect' generates a recoil force, pushing the walls toward the heavier vacuum and hel
abstract: The dynamics of domain walls in scalar field theories with degenerate vacua, where the scalar field's mass depends on the vacuum state, is investigated. Through analytical arguments and numerical simulations, it is shown that this dependence leads to anisotropic emission of scalar radiation from walls—predominantly into the region with lower field mass. The resulting recoil effect (reactive acceleration) creates a dynamical bias in the evolution of cosmological domain wall networks, favoring the vacuum with lower mass and promoting network decay. It is demonstrated that the mass dependence on the vacuum, rather than potential barrier asymmetry, is the main factor driving the biased evolution of walls in theories with degenerate vacua. In the more general case of non-degenerate vacua, this recoil mechanism acts as an additional source of dynamical bias, capable of accelerating or decelerating network decay compared to standard predictions based solely on vacuum energy density differences.
threads: Невидимые плёнки толщиной с атомное ядро могли бы разорвать Вселенную. Но природа включила ракетный двигатель: если массы квантов по разные стороны отличаются, стенка испускает асимметричное излучение и дрейфует, как ракета, расширяя лёгкий вакуум и уничтожая сеть. Гравитационные волны от этих катаклизмов донесут до нас информацию о физике за пределами Стандартной модели.

title: Neutron Force on Proton Vortices in the Cores of Neutron Stars
oneliner: Taking into account the Fermi-liquid interaction between neutrons and protons reveals a new force component acting on proton vortices in superconducting neutron stars.
description: In the cores of neutron stars, protons transition into a superconducting state, forming quantum vortices that carry magnetic flux. Traditionally, it was thought that the force on these vortices comes from electron scattering off the magnetic field. This work shows that the normal neutron component a
abstract: In the superconducting matter of neutron stars, which consists of neutrons, protons, and electrons, the forces acting on a proton vortex are studied. Alongside the well-known force due to electron scattering by the vortex's magnetic field, an additional effect from normal neutrons is discovered, caused by Fermi-liquid interactions in the neutron-proton subsystem. Using a kinetic approach based on Landau's Fermi-liquid theory, it is shown that neutron quasiparticles scatter off the proton vortex via the spatially varying condensate momentum, creating a longitudinal force proportional to the relative velocity between neutrons and the vortex. Unlike the electron contribution, this force has no transverse component and vanishes in the absence of neutron-proton Fermi-liquid interactions. Within a simple model, the main properties of the force are analyzed, and physically justified estimates of its magnitude are provided.
threads: Представьте протонные вихри сёрферами на магнитных волнах. Раньше считалось, что их толкают только электроны. Но теперь открылся попутный ветер — нейтроны дуют в спину. Эта тихая сила может объяснить загадочные вспышки магнитаров и дрожь пульсаров. Кто знает, куда заведёт нас эта космическая гидродинамика?

title: Hunting for Heavy Charged Relics in Earth's Depths
oneliner: A method is proposed to detect heavy charged particles (CHAMPs) accumulated in Earth's rocks, water, and ice, with sensitivity down to minuscule fractions of dark matter density.
description: Heavy charged particles (CHAMPs) are predicted in many extensions of the Standard Model and could make up a fraction of the Universe’s hidden mass. This work proposes a revolutionary search approach: analyzing the accumulation of such relics in Earth’s near-surface layers—water, ice, and geological
abstract: A detection method for heavy charged particles—with masses between 1 and 10¹² TeV—that might constitute a tiny fraction of local dark matter is put forward. These particles, upon reaching Earth, slow down and get trapped, accumulating over time in high-exposure targets like water and rock. Concentration by centrifugation or gravitational settling, followed by mass spectrometry, is explored. The technique’s sensitivity can reach f_X ~ 10⁻²⁰ for the lightest particles, which is an incredibly small admixture to dark matter. A pilot experiment with merely a liter of water and a single centrifuge (or ≈1 m³ of rock without a centrifuge) over a month could achieve f_X ~ 10⁻¹⁰ and probe previously uncharted territory.
threads: Миллиарды лет Земля, как архив, хранила в своей коре и льдах заряженные реликты тёмной материи. Сегодня простая центрифуга и масс-спектрометр способны извлечь их из литра воды или гранита, открывая путь к разгадке природы скрытой массы Вселенной. Крошечный образец способен приблизить нас к новой физике больше, чем огромный коллайдер.

title: Neural Networks vs. Dark Matter: A New Method for Analyzing Weak Lensing
oneliner: The neural posterior estimation method turns astronomical images into probability distributions of the shear field, cutting out multi-step calibrations.
description: Traditional weak gravitational lensing measurement methods require detecting galaxies, estimating their ellipticities, and calibrating to account for noise and systematics. The authors propose an alternative approach—neural posterior estimation (NPE)—training a deep neural network to directly map si
abstract: The standard approach to shear estimation in weak gravitational lensing involves detecting galaxies, measuring their ellipticities, and calibrating to correct for noise and systematic errors, which complicates uncertainty propagation. An alternative method is proposed—neural posterior estimation (NPE), a form of simulation-based inference. A deep neural network is trained on multi-band simulations to map an image directly to a variational distribution of the shear field, combining detection, object separation, measurement, and calibration into a single step of implicit inference. In experiments with constant shear and increasingly complex effects (overlapping galaxies, a spatially varying point spread function, stars, detector artifacts), NPE yields accurate and well-calibrated approximations of posterior distributions for both shear components. The results confirm the method's viability under conditions where all relevant features can be reproduced in simulations—a requirement that will become increasingly attainable as simulation fidelity improves.
threads: Ночное небо — многослойный палимпсест, и нейросеть научилась читать его скрытые строки. Тёмная материя пишет гравитационным линзированием, а мы раньше расшифровывали букву за буквой. Новый метод видит весь лист разом и честно признаётся, когда не уверен. Через пару лет так составят самую точную карту невидимой Вселенной — возможно, открыв природу тёмной энергии.
authors: the LSST Dark Energy Science Collaboration

title: AT 2019ijn: Off-Axis Relativistic Jet from a Tidal Disruption Event
oneliner: The unique radio transient AT 2019ijn, unearthed in the VLASS survey, hints at an ultra-rare event: a star torn apart by a black hole, launching a powerful jet we see off-axis.
description: AT 2019ijn is a bright optical flash and a long-lived radio source tied to a star-forming dwarf galaxy. The optical outburst—rapid rise, slow fade—is paired with delayed radio emission explained as an off-axis jet packing ~2×10⁵² erg. The most likely culprit: a tidal disruption event (TDE) by an int
abstract: We present transient AT 2019ijn, discovered in the radio band. It is associated with a powerful relativistic jet observed off-axis and a luminous optical flare (νLν,opt ~10⁴⁴ erg/s). The source resides in a star-forming dwarf galaxy at z=0.273. The optical light curve shows a fast rise (t_rise,rest ~7 days) and slow decline (t_dec,rest >38 days). A year later, a radio counterpart was detected with energy ~2×10⁵² erg, persisting for over 6 years. The combination of properties excludes known classes of core-collapse explosions. Possible scenarios include an exotic black hole–star merger or a tidal disruption event (TDE) of a star by a black hole of 10⁴–10⁶ M⊙ with jet launching. TDE is favored. The low redshift allows us to constrain the late-time evolution, providing new insights into the occurrence rate of such jets. Future radio surveys will open a new window for finding similar off-axis relativistic transients.
threads: Каждый день чёрные дыры разрывают звёзды и выбрасывают лучи энергии. Но мы видим лишь те, что направлены на нас. AT 2019ijn — редкий случай, когда прожектор смотрел мимо, и мы услышали радиоэхо. Это словно уловить шёпот, когда кто-то кричит в другую сторону. Научившись ловить такие события, мы составим карту невидимых катастроф. А может, и услышим внеземные сигналы.

title: Self-Assembly of Dodecagonal Quasicrystals in Dipolar Bose–Einstein Condensates with Optical Feedback
oneliner: Dipolar Bose–Einstein condensates with optical feedback spontaneously form dodecagonal quasicrystals boasting twelve-fold symmetry.
description: This study proposes and theoretically backs a method for creating self-assembling quasicrystals in a dipolar Bose–Einstein condensate. By pairing up intrinsic dipole-dipole forces with photon-mediated interactions from a single-mirror Fabry–Pérot optical feedback setup, two roton minima emerge in th
abstract: Competing interactions with incommensurate characteristic lengths in a dipolar Bose-Einstein condensate can give rise to quasicrystalline structures lacking translational periodicity. It is shown that combining direct dipole-dipole interaction and photon-mediated interaction, induced by coupling to an excited state and precisely tuned optical feedback, creates two roton minima in the Bogoliubov excitation spectrum. This leads to the emergence of a stable phase of a dodecagonal quasicrystal with rotational symmetry of order 12, achievable under realistic experimental parameters. Additionally, a dynamic protocol for obtaining such states and a universal numerical method for calculating their collective excitations have been developed.
threads: Представьте гобелен, который никогда не повторяется, но излучает совершенный порядок. В 1984 году такие узоры обнаружили в сплавах; теперь их выращивают в квантовом газе. Два ротона — наследие Ландау — ведут атомы диспрозия в танце с фотонами, рождая кристалл с симметрией 12, запрещённой для обычной материи. И он течёт, оставаясь сверхтекучим. Первый шаг к рукотворным квазивселенным.

title: The Role of Wide Stellar Pairs in the Formation of Hot Jupiters around M Dwarfs
oneliner: Statistical analysis shows that having a distant stellar companion increases the odds of finding a hot Jupiter around a red dwarf sixfold, pointing to the key role of high-eccentricity migration.
description: The discovery of giant planet TOI-5628Ab with a 4.34-day period orbiting an M dwarf with a white dwarf companion at ~2500 au is reported. A systematic search for co-moving stellar companions around all M dwarfs with confirmed short-period giants revealed a multiplicity of 34.2±9.5%, six times higher
abstract: The influence of wide-orbit stellar companions on the formation of hot Jupiters around M-dwarfs remains unclear. We present the discovery of TOI-5628Ab: a giant planet with a period of 4.34 days, a radius of 0.74±0.04 R_J, and an upper mass limit of 0.22 M_J (3σ) orbiting a star of 0.36 M☉, along with a white dwarf companion of 0.59±0.16 M☉ at a projected separation of ~2500 AU. Using Gaia DR3 data, we performed a systematic search for comoving companions (100–10,000 AU) for all M-dwarfs with confirmed short-period giants (P<10 d, R>0.7 R_J) and a matched control sample of field M-stars. The multiplicity fraction among planet hosts was 34.2±9.5%, roughly 6 times higher than among field stars (5.3±3.7%). These results indicate that wide companions promote the formation of short-period giants around M-stars with masses 0.21–0.64 M☉, with high-eccentricity migration being a likely key mechanism.
threads: Красный карлик и его мёртвый близнец управляют планетой-гигантом, словно марионеткой. Гравитационный дирижёр заставляет планету нырять к звезде, раскачивая орбиту до чудовищного эллипса. Шансы найти такую систему возрастают в шесть раз, когда есть «кукловод». Roman скоро позволит увидеть тени других невидимых дирижёров — и мы, возможно, обнаружим множество двойных миров с мёртвыми солнцами.

title: Training dynamics of autoencoders: transient scaling and emergent concepts in the Ising model
oneliner: Unsupervised neural networks uncover magnetization and energy in spin configurations, revealing two learning regimes controlled by hyperparameters.
description: The study reveals how autoencoders trained on microscopic spin configurations of the Ising model autonomously extract macroscopic variables. Analysis at different spatial scales uncovers two dynamical regimes: early dominance of magnetization and a later shift to an energy regime. Network depth, wid
abstract: It is investigated how unsupervised autoencoders, trained on microscopic spin configurations of the Ising model, extract macroscopic variables relevant to physical theory. Without prior domain knowledge, learning was studied at different spatial scales. Two dynamical regimes were identified, governed by the main hyperparameters (depth, width of network, learning rate): a magnetization-dominated regime — transient, with dynamic scaling and scale-ordered fluctuations; and an energy-dominated regime — gradually shifting resolution to smaller scales. Deep models at moderate and high rates 'stall', failing to reach these regimes. Through analysis of recursive dynamical trajectories, it is shown that prediction errors generate flow fields with common topology across all representation spaces. A dynamical viewpoint on learning is advanced: a process driven by fluctuations in training data and optimizer far from equilibrium, providing an interpretive framework connecting the physical world and machine models.
threads: Нейросеть учится на вихрях спинов, словно археолог в пустыне. Сперва проступают контуры — намагниченность. Потом, слой за слоем, — тонкие корреляции энергии. Но глубокие модели, как нетерпеливый копатель, застывают на полпути. Так рождаются концепты: сначала грубый эскиз, затем детали. Возможно, и наш мозг строит картину мира точно так же — от крупных форм к нюансам.

title: Evolution of AI in Nanoparticle Microscopy: From Interpretation to Scientific Inference
oneliner: Machine learning turns electron microscopy into a predictive materials science tool.
description: Overview of modern artificial intelligence methods for electron microscopy of nanoparticles. Covers detection, segmentation, atomic-resolution restoration, and 3D structural reconstruction. Shows how deep learning is moving from image analysis to extracting physically meaningful information, acceler
abstract: The review examines artificial intelligence methods for nanoparticle characterization using electron microscopy: TEM, HRTEM, STEM, and in situ TEM. It analyzes key tasks: detection, segmentation, quantitative morphology assessment, atomic resolution restoration, defect identification, transition from 2D images to 3D structures, and analysis of dynamic processes. Computational approaches are covered from classical machine learning and convolutional neural networks to transformers, self-supervised learning, foundation models, multimodal AI, and physics-informed learning. Integration of microscopy data with simulations, metadata, and autonomous experiments is considered for linking structure, dynamics, synthesis conditions, and functional properties. The advantages, limitations, and data requirements of existing methods are critically evaluated. Perspectives on foundation models, AI-driven microscopy, and closed-loop experiments for autonomous materials discovery are discussed.
threads: Алгоритм за секунду находит сотни наночастиц — у человека ушли бы часы. Электронный микроскоп становится дирижёром атомного оркестра: нейросети извлекают из дрожания пикселей партитуру скрытых сил. На горизонте — автономные приборы, которые сами решают, куда направить пучок, и синтезируют материалы быстрее, чем выходят научные статьи.

title: Photon Decay into Neutrinos: New Frontiers of Lorentz Invariance
oneliner: Superluminal photons from the Crab Nebula might decay into neutrinos, paving the way to test a fundamental symmetry.
description: Astrophysical observations of petaelectronvolt gamma rays by the LHAASO observatory allow testing for Lorentz invariance violations. The decay of a superluminal photon into a neutrino-antineutrino pair, forbidden in standard theory, becomes possible if the photon acquires an effective mass due to a
abstract: We consider the vacuum decay of a photon into a neutrino-antineutrino pair under Lorentz invariance violation (LIV). LIV corrections to the photon dispersion are set by an effective invariant mass, which kinematically allows the normally forbidden γ→νν̄. The decay proceeds through a one-loop electromagnetic neutrino vertex in the Standard Model and is highly suppressed. Using the anapole form factor (small q²), the rate is computed for TeV-PeV photons. Results: below the e⁺e⁻ threshold, the neutrino channel is open but too rare to improve constraints. Above the threshold, if e⁺e⁻ production is suppressed by the relative photon-electron LIV parameter, the neutrino decay gives an independent bound on the photon-neutrino LIV coupling parameters.
threads: Фотоны с энергией в миллиард раз выше видимого света могут незаметно обгонять сами себя и распадаться на пару нейтрино. Это будто свет отбрасывает тень, которая крадёт его энергию. Телескоп LHAASO уже ловит такие кванты из Крабовидной туманности. Возможно, скоро мы заметим «пропажу» фотонов — и тогда лоренц-инвариантность, фундамент теории Эйнштейна, даст первую трещину.

title: Growth, Bending, and Swirling: How Polymerizing Filaments Generate Motion
oneliner: Theory shows that the growth of biopolymers on a microparticle surface makes it swim, rotate, or move in a spiral—without any molecular motors.
description: In the microworld, where viscosity dominates over inertia, microorganisms use clever tricks for locomotion. One such trick is the polymerization push: the growth of filaments anchored to the cell surface creates forces that propel the organism forward. Researchers developed a mathematical model of a
abstract: A continuum model has been developed for motion at low Reynolds numbers, where active forces emerge self-consistently from nucleation, growth, catastrophes, and hydrodynamic interactions of polymerizing surface filaments. It is analytically shown that polymerization-induced compressive forces trigger a long-wavelength buckling instability, leading to spontaneous symmetry breaking of the filament carpet and large-scale flows. When the model is coupled to a force- and torque-free spheroidal body, diverse regimes appear—spontaneous rotation, directed motion, and chiral swimming—selected by the spatial arrangement of growing filaments. These results establish a general theoretical framework for motility driven by the collective dynamics of polymerizing filaments and suggest new principles for designing synthetic microswimmers.
threads: В микроскопическом мире, где вода густая как мёд, бактерии придумали двигаться, просто отращивая хвосты. Но настоящая магия начинается, когда тысячи таких хвостов на поверхности сферы начинают изгибаться и закручивать воду в вихри. Так сфера превращается в крошечный летающий ковёр, который может вращаться, плыть прямо или ввинчиваться в среду — и всё без единого мотора. Это открывает путь к программируемым микророботам и, возможно, к поиску жизни на других планетах по следам

title: Explosive Molecular Flows: Traces of Dynamic Catastrophes in the Birth of Massive Stars
oneliner: The discovery of a new class of explosive-like molecular outflows points to dramatic collisions and mergers of protostars in dense clusters.
description: About 15 years ago, astronomers confirmed the existence of extreme molecular outflows, dubbed explosive. Unlike classical bipolar jets, they consist of many thin straight filaments flying apart almost isotropically with kinematics resembling the expansion of the Universe. The energy of these events
abstract: About 15 years ago, a new type of extreme molecular outflow was confirmed, with kinetic energy ~10⁴⁷⁻⁴⁹ erg, associated with very bright (>10⁵ L⊙) and massive (~10³ M⊙) young clusters — explosive molecular outflows. Unlike bipolar protostellar flows, they exhibit an almost isotropic distribution of many narrow, straight filamentary streamers with clear Hubble-like expansion. These filaments point toward the center of expanding molecular or ionized shells with velocities of 10–50 km/s, but young massive stars are not observed there — they have likely shifted away. The characteristics indicate a short duration and origin from a single powerful destructive event. The most modern model explains them by the disruption of non-hierarchical massive protostellar systems, where components can either form a close binary (separations of a few AU) or merge into a single massive star, as recently proposed for the nearest star-forming region, Orion BN/KL.
threads: Пятьсот лет назад в туманности Ориона столкнулись две (или больше) протозвёзды. Удар породил веер из молекулярных струй, которые до сих пор летят со скоростью 350 км/с — и, словно галактики после Большого взрыва, ускоряются по мере удаления от центра. Энергию дала гравитация. Такие космические ДТП случаются раз в 140 лет и, возможно, объясняют, как зажигаются самые массивные звёзды.

title: Quantum Membrane: How Partons at the Horizon Transform Black Hole Physics
oneliner: A microscopic model turns the classical black hole membrane into a dynamic quantum system, explaining its electrical response.
description: A new work proposes a quantum-mechanical model where the black hole horizon is described as a 'fuzzy sphere' with a half-filled Fermi sea of partons. These degrees of freedom not only reproduce the Bekenstein–Hawking entropy but also generate real electric currents under the influence of external fi
abstract: Within matrix quantum mechanics, a microscopic quantum membrane paradigm for black holes is constructed. The horizon is described as a noncommutative sphere with a half-filled fermionic parton sea. The sphere's topology induces a Berry monopole, causing partons to transition into lowest Landau level (LLL) states, and their guiding center dynamics produce ohmic, Hall, and polarization currents. The external electromagnetic field is coupled via a two-block matrix configuration with bifundamental links: tachyonic condensation of off-diagonal modes ties the horizon's gauge field to the boundary value of the external field, turning the parton currents into a boundary source. The construction replaces the classical fictitious membrane with a dynamic quantum membrane with LLL degrees of freedom. The resulting boundary condition generalizes the classical absorbing membrane condition and contains explicit corrections depending on the frequency and helicity of radiation, opening a path to probing the microscopic quantum structure of the horizon.
threads: На горизонте чёрной дыры работает закон Ома. Без метафор: реальная проводимость 377 Ом на квадрат — как у вакуума. «Пушистая сфера» квантовой геометрии превращает горизонт в жидкое зеркало, которое избирательно отражает свет и оставляет после слияний электромагнитное эхо. Поймать такой сигнал — значит дать квантовой гравитации путёвку из гипотезы в реальность.

title: Dark Matter and MHz Gravitational Waves: A Unified Early Universe Scenario
oneliner: A single peak in the primordial perturbation spectrum explains the abundance of superheavy dark matter and predicts a gravitational wave background at megahertz frequencies.
description: Deep within the early Universe lies the key to unraveling the nature of dark matter and gravitational waves. New research shows how a single peak in the primordial perturbation spectrum can simultaneously give rise to superheavy dark matter particles and a background “hum” of gravitational waves at
abstract: A localized enhancement in the spectrum of primordial curvature creates two relics: gravitationally produced dark matter of conformal fermions and a stochastic gravitational-wave background induced by scalar perturbations. It is shown that the dark matter density fixes the normalization of the scalar spectrum via its cubic moment, while the tensor signal is determined by a quadratic convolution, removing the normalization freedom in templates and linking the MHz signal to particle mass, peak scale, and width. A specific single-field realization with Mukhanov–Sasaki evolution yields a broad MHz background below the threshold of Gaussian primordial black hole formation. In this scenario, a null result from high-frequency searches sets a lower bound on the conformal fermion mass, while a detection should reproduce the measured dark matter abundance, peak frequency, amplitude, and width from a single primordial perturbation. Thus, a testable connection is established between small-scale inflationary structure, ultramassive dark matter, and laboratory searches for MHz-range gravitational waves.
threads: Тот самый толчок, что породил невидимый каркас галактик, всколыхнул и ткань пространства-времени. Поймав мегагерцевый звон, мы узнаем массу частиц тёмной материи — без подземных детекторов. Как по эху выстрела вычисляют калибр ружья, так по гравитационному шуму мы взвесим невидимое.

title: Recognizing topological quantum phases from small subsystems
oneliner: A new machine learning method with a quantum kernel enables classification of quantum phases of matter from data of just a few sites.
description: Researchers have proposed a machine learning method that can distinguish quantum phases, including topologically protected ones, from data of just a few sites. The key idea is to use a quantum kernel built from reduced density matrices of a small subsystem, which is then processed by a classical sup
abstract: Characterizing quantum topological phases typically requires nonlocal string order parameters, which are accessible only for the entire system, making experiments challenging. A data-efficient supervised learning scheme is proposed that identifies phases from small subsystems (1–4 nodes). It leverages a quantum kernel based on the reduced density matrices of these subsystems, which can be practically measured in experiments. The method is tested on the phase diagrams of two spin chains: the spin-1/2 generalized cluster-Ising model and the spin-1 anisotropic Haldane chain. By restricting to local data from just a few nodes, high classification accuracy is achieved; a model trained on short chains successfully generalizes to longer ones. Thus, local reduced density matrices preserve key signatures of global topological phases, paving a practical path for characterizing rich phase diagrams of quantum many-body systems.
threads: Один-единственный спин — и в нём спрятана вся фазовая диаграмма. Оказывается, крошечный фрагмент квантового мира вбирает аромат глобального порядка, словно капля духов хранит форму цветка. Метод машинного обучения с квантовым ядром уже сейчас позволяет восстановить полную картину по нескольким узлам. А завтра так мы будем диагностировать материалы прямо в квантовых симуляторах, не вскрывая систему. Крохотный ключ открывает огромные двери.

title: Life in Cramped Quarters: Mutual Dynamics of Bacteria and Soil Across Scales
oneliner: Bacteria in soil actively reshape their environment, while the environment, in turn, dictates their movement, growth, and collective behavior, creating a complex physics of feedback loops.
description: Soil is the largest reservoir of bacterial life on Earth, with up to a billion cells per gram governing fertility, carbon and nitrogen cycling. Yet understanding their activity is tricky: soil is optically opaque, structurally heterogeneous, and bacteria not only respond to their surroundings but co
abstract: Soil holds a huge share of Earth's bacterial biomass. Bacterial activity drives plant productivity, carbon and nitrogen cycling, and ecosystem responses to climate change. Studying this activity is hindered by soil's structural-chemical patchiness and its optical murkiness, plus a two-way feedback: bacteria don't just react to their microenvironment, they actively modify it—something usually ignored in idealized lab experiments and theories. The review spotlights how this dynamic feedback governs the physics of bacterial movement, growth, and chemical sensing in soil across three scales: single pores, mesoscale pore networks, and the landscape level.
threads: В каждой чайной ложке почвы — своя подземка, где бактерий больше, чем людей на планете. Они не просто ездят: прокладывают рельсы, меняют атмосферу и, задыхаясь, мигрируют к свежим «выходам». Такая «планетарная инженерия» снилась Герберту в «Дюне», а сегодня мы учимся запускать её по заказу — прямо под ногами.

title: Stellar Halo Memory: A New Perspective on Milky Way Archaeology
oneliner: Scientists have proposed measuring the memory of the Galaxy's assembly through excess mutual information between the dynamic and chemical properties of stars.
description: Astronomers have developed an information-theoretic method to quantify how much information about past mergers and star formation remains in the Milky Way's stellar halo. Using data from the APOGEE spectroscopic survey and Gaia astrometry, they identified three types of memory: dynamic, chemical, an
abstract: The Galactic stellar halo preserves fossil records of its assembly, but a unified framework for quantifying the surviving information was lacking. A theoretical-information method is proposed that defines the halo's 'memory' as an observable quantity. Using APOGEE DR17 data, the excess mutual information between the dynamic and chemical parameters of stars was computed, allowing the extraction of dynamic, chemical, and cross contributions. Radial memory profiles were constructed, and dimensionless diagnostics were introduced — a dominance coefficient and coupling efficiency. It is shown that up to ~20 kpc, memory of different types evolves in distinct ways, and then all profiles converge to a common statistically significant residual. The measured memory exceeds the random background by many times, confirming its astrophysical nature. The surviving information is predominantly dynamic, with a finite preserved chemodynamic coupling. The results indicate that phase mixing redistributes rather than erases the memory of the galaxy's formation, and introduce halo memory as a new tool for galactic archaeology, providing a unified statistical framework for observations and cosmological simulations.
threads: Оказывается, звёздное гало не забывает. Гравитационное перемешивание не стирает, а перераспределяет информацию о слияниях, будто переписывает старую мелодию в новом ритме. Избыточная взаимная информация позволяет услышать исходную тему — и она звучит даже на окраинах. Когда-нибудь этот подход поможет восстановить симфонию других галактик, приближая разгадку тёмной материи.

title: Neural Network Extracts Spin and Orbital Moments from XMCD X-ray Spectra
oneliner: Using deep learning, physicists have learned to directly recover spin and orbital angular moments from the full line shapes in X-ray spectroscopy.
description: Traditional sum-rule analysis requires integrating intensities and is sensitive to background. In this new work, the analysis is framed as an inverse problem solved by a neural network trained on data from multiconfigurational calculations. The method accurately recovers the expectation values of sp
threads: В каждом рентгеновском спектре звучит музыка электронов. Глубокое обучение научилось различать партии спинов и орбит, словно дирижёр, выделяющий голоса из хаоса. Нейросеть, натренированная на виртуальных симфониях, с удивительной точностью восстанавливает магнитные моменты. Это не просто автоматизация — это способность слышать больше, чем позволяли старые правила. Путь к экспресс-диагностике магнитных материалов открыт.

title: Laser trap births axions: key to dark matter and the strong CP problem
oneliner: A tabletop experiment has for the first time recorded the conversion of photons into hypothetical axion particles directly in air, without strong magnetic fields.
description: Using a three-dimensional optical spindle trap (OST) created by a laser beam, researchers observed a deficit of photons in the central region with subsequent recovery, consistent with a photon-axion-photon conversion process. Under energy conservation, the disappearance of photons is attributed to t
abstract: The axion is a hypothetical particle that could solve the strong CP problem in quantum chromodynamics and explain the nature of dark matter, yet it has not been detected in free-space experiments. In this work, a laser system was designed and built that generates a three-dimensional closed trapping potential with a central region of zero intensity—an optical spindle trap (OST). Along the propagation axis, the photon population first decreases and then recovers to its original level, analogous to the photon-to-axion conversion expected in 'light shining through a wall' experiments. Photon behavior was recorded with a single-photon counter (below saturation threshold) and confirmed by CCD imaging at ultra-low optical powers, ruling out detector artifacts. Within the law of energy conservation, the photon deficit is attributed to conversion into axions, which are not detected by the instruments. The proposed mechanism is spin-coupled axion-photon interactions.
threads: Свет исчезает прямо в воздухе — лазерная воронка на столе превращает фотоны в невидимые аксионы, уносящие энергию в никуда. Это словно миниатюрный водоворот в стакане, где вода на миг становится паром. Но здесь рождаются частицы, из которых, возможно, соткана тёмная материя. Управляя этим превращением, мы откроем путь к лабораторному получению тёмной субстанции и, кто знает, к субпространственным коммуникациям.

title: Weighing the Graviton: Stellar Orbits vs. Quantum Gravity Mass
oneliner: Analysis of bright stars' motion near the supermassive black hole at the Galactic center has placed new constraints on the mass of the graviton, a key candidate in quantum gravity theory.
description: Using years of observations of stars S2 and S38 near Sagittarius A*, scientists applied two methods to estimate the graviton mass. The first relies on the measured orbital precession and its deviation from general relativity predictions; the second on direct trajectory fitting in an extended PPN for
abstract: Theorists have developed versions of massive gravity free from the flaws of earlier models. Astrophysicists discuss constraints on the graviton mass from astronomical data. From analyzing the shape of the gravitational-wave signal from binary black hole mergers detected by LIGO, an upper limit has been set. Constraints also come from tracking the motion of the bright star S2 near the Milky Way’s center using data from GRAVITY and Keck. Other astronomical methods for constraining it are briefly described. These observations impose ever tighter limits on gravity theories.
threads: Тишина центра Галактики нарушается беззвучной музыкой — это орбиты звезд, словно струны гигантской арфы, колеблются в такт гравитации. Если гравитон, квант этой силы, обладает массой, то мелодия слегка расстраивается. Телескопы уловили эту дисгармонию: гравитон легче, чем 10⁻²² эВ/c². Мы учимся слушать космос — и, возможно, скоро расслышим то, что скрыто от глаз: тёмную материю, тёмную энергию, само квантовое дыхание пространства.

title: Dark Timbre: How Gravitational Waves Reveal Invisible Dark Matter Halos
oneliner: Stochastic diffraction of gravitational waves on an ensemble of light dark matter halos will enable the LISA detector to map invisible structures with masses up to 10^4 M⊙.
description: A new study proposes a method for detecting the population of low-mass cold dark matter halos predicted by cosmological simulations but so far elusive to observations. Passing through unresolved clouds of dark matter, gravitational waves from black hole mergers experience frequency-dependent amplitu
abstract: Cold dark matter predicts many lightweight halos that have not been directly detected. They can be found through the diffraction of gravitational waves on clusters of such halos along the line of sight. Statistical analysis of stochastic distortions reveals an orthogonal basis of 'dark timbre' — characteristic tones that are not degenerate with the source parameters. LISA is sensitive to halos of 10–10⁴ M⊙; accumulating 50–500 bright events can achieve a significance of (2–5)σ (from ∼0.2 to ≳4σ for realistic merger rates and concentration models). The signal amplitude in a single event is ∼10⁻³, which requires improved waveform accuracy and processing methods. The method provides tight constraints for models with enhanced small-scale structure (axion miniclusters, primordial black holes).
threads: Вселенная похожа на концертный зал: невидимые облака тёмной материи искажают тембр гравитационных волн, словно реверберация выдаёт скрытую архитектуру. Стохастическая дифракция становится акустическим паспортом невидимых структур. Космический интерферометр LISA за десятилетие накопит достаточно сигналов, чтобы нанести на карту мини-гало массами в тысячи солнц. Гравитационно-волновая астрономия станет точным инструментом микрофизики тёмного сектора.

title: Stochastic Tsunamis: Diffuse Scalar Background from Black Hole Formation
oneliner: Ultralight scalar fields, released during the collapse of massive stars into black holes, accumulate across the universe, forming a stochastic diffuse background detectable by future detectors.
description: A new mechanism for generating a relic background of scalar radiation is proposed. Massive astrophysical objects (stars) create a static scalar field configuration, which, upon collapsing into a black hole, loses its source and propagates as a burst — a 'scalar tsunami'. The superposition of many su
abstract: Massive astrophysical objects can sustain static configurations of the scalar field. When they collapse into black holes (e.g., during a core-collapse supernova), the field loses gravitational support and transitions into a dynamic state, producing a brief scalar burst—a 'scalar tsunami'. The ensemble of such events over cosmological history forms a stochastic diffuse scalar background, with its spectrum peaking in the 1–1000 Hz range. A new mechanism for generating this background is proposed, its spectrum is computed, and sensitivity comparisons with planned experiments are performed. It is shown that this approach extends the experimental accessibility of scalar masses down to 10⁻¹³ eV, improving by ten orders of magnitude over methods relying on detecting single transient events.
threads: Каждую секунду во Вселенной схлопывается несколько массивных звёзд. Каждая из них, как удар по воде, рождает скалярное цунами. Накладываясь друг на друга, эти волны создают вечный шум — эхо коллапсов, заполняющее космос. Будущие детекторы, возможно, уловят этот гул, открыв дорогу к разгадке тёмной материи.

title: Searching for Biosignatures on Transiting Habitable Planets with ELT/ANDES
oneliner: Simulations show that water vapor and carbon dioxide are the easiest molecules to detect in the atmospheres of Earth-like planets around red dwarfs.
description: We analyze the feasibility of detecting key atmospheric molecules—H2O, CO2, CH4, and O2—on 18 transiting, potentially habitable exoplanets using the ANDES spectrograph on the Extremely Large Telescope (ELT). High-resolution transit spectroscopy simulations combined with Bayesian cross-correlation an
abstract: A simulation pipeline is presented for evaluating the detectability of CO₂, H₂O, O₂, and CH₄ via high-resolution transmission spectroscopy with the future ANDES spectrograph on the ELT. The modeling was performed for cloud-free Earth-like atmospheres with noise characteristics calculated for the seeing-limited regime using the ANDES exposure time calculator. A new Bayesian cross-correlation function (CCF) with molecule-specific kernels and an autoregressive model for accounting correlations was developed. 18 known transiting exoplanets in the potentially habitable zone were analyzed; the number of transits required for confident detection (log Bayesian factor ≥2) was determined. Water vapor is the easiest target: for TRAPPIST-1 planets, 10–19 transits are needed, for LHS 1140 b — 30. For CO₂, CH₄, and O₂, approximately 1.5, 3, and 4 times more are needed, respectively. These estimates serve as a lower limit assuming ideal observing conditions, absence of systematic errors, and perfect trend correction.
threads: Всего 10 транзитов — и ANDES выхватит из грохота TRAPPIST-1 хрустальную ноту воды. Кислород же — мираж, ускользающий вчетверо дольше. К 2030-м, возможно, мы услышим дыхание жизни в молекулярных аккордах.

title: Interstellar Laser Beacons: A New Strategy for the Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence
oneliner: Resource-limited civilizations likely use long-lived pulsed laser beacons, and modern technologies allow us to start searching for them in the microsecond range.
description: The article examines the hypothesis that extraterrestrial civilizations, striving to minimize costs and increase the chances of contact, would create interstellar laser beacons with milli- and microsecond pulses. It proposes the 'Cosmic Beacons' project — a full-sky survey with high temporal and spa
abstract: Under resource constraints, the sweet spot for long-range communication is long-lived pulsed beacons with micro- or millisecond flashes, stationed on interstellar orbits. Such beacons can be churned out with simple laser tech, skipping complex femtosecond systems. Current astronomical surveys are nearly blind to signals that brief. The convergence of three technologies—massively parallel computing architectures, ultrafast CMOS detectors, and mass-produced broadband diffractive-refractive lenses—lays the groundwork for a budget-friendly survey of the sky on microsecond timescales. This survey will not only push the astrophysics of rapidly varying sources but also, for the first time, build volume-complete constraints on interstellar beacons within twenty parsecs, even with modest telescopes.
threads: В радиусе 20 парсек от нас — 3000 звёзд. Если хотя бы одна цивилизация запустила дрейфующие лазерные маяки, мы можем заметить их не в радиошуме, а в ритмичном мерцании. Эти космические светлячки — микросекундные импульсы, затерянные в шуме неба. Новая стратегия SETI накапливает миллионы таких вспышек, выявляя искусственный пульс. Возможно, Великое Молчание — лишь наша глухота.

title: Probing the Solar System for Scalar Dark Matter
oneliner: Three new methods for detecting dark matter in the form of an ultralight scalar field use flares from collisions with Kuiper Belt objects, atomic clocks, and astrometric microlensing.
description: Three complementary methods for detecting scalar dark matter are proposed, based on observations within the Solar System and the local Galaxy. The first is a search for ADAF-like flares arising from collisions of compact clumps of the scalar field (e.g., boson stars) with Kuiper Belt objects. The se
abstract: Dark matter as a scalar field is a theoretically sound alternative to the particle-like model, especially for ultralight fields forming coherent oscillations or compact self-gravitating clumps. Three complementary detection methods have been developed: detecting ADAF-type flares when clumps collide with Kuiper Belt bodies, searching for fundamental constant oscillations with atomic clocks, and astrometric microlensing by compact scalar clumps. Sensitivity estimates and constraints on the scalar clump fraction, coupling constants, and compact lens abundance have been obtained. Results show that astrometry, akin to Gaia observations, can detect compact scalar clumps at the percent level for masses above 0.01 solar masses; future astrometric and clock experiments will cover lower masses and weaker couplings.
threads: 85% материи Вселенной — тёмная субстанция, которую мы не видим. Но ультралёгкое скалярное поле могло бы звучать сквозь саму ткань реальности, меняя свойства атомов и искривляя свет звёзд. Три новых метода — как три инструмента в оркестре невидимого: столкновения с кометами высекают вспышки-литавры, атомные часы служат камертоном, а гравитационное линзирование — это танец масс. Грядущие обзоры и сверхточные часы превратят Солнечную систему в гигантский детектор. Тишина темна.
