title: Quantum Entanglement in PET: A New Era of Medical Imaging
oneliner: Harnessing the quantum entanglement of annihilation photons paves the way for improved image quality and new diagnostic biomarkers.
description: Quantum Positron Emission Tomography (QE-PET) exploits the polarization entanglement of photons produced by electron-positron annihilation. Unlike standard PET, QE-PET detects the Compton scattering of both photons, enabling measurement of their degree of quantum entanglement. Recent experiments sho
abstract: Annihilation photons are quantum-entangled in polarization, a property unused in today’s clinical PET. We review the current state of research on harnessing this entanglement for medical diagnostics. The physics fundamentals and detector system development for future Quantum-Entangled PET scanners are explored—devices designed to extract entanglement via Compton scattering of photons off electrons. Experimental data on entanglement and decoherence are presented alongside theoretical insights. These methods aim to suppress random coincidences for cleaner PET images, employ entanglement degree as a biomarker for pathology and tissue oxygenation, and establish a pH-imaging technique. Whether this can reach clinical practice remains an open challenge, inviting the scientific community to drive this field forward.
threads: Каждая аннигиляция позитрона — это микровзрыв, рождающий пару танцующих гамма-квантов. Их поляризационный дуэт переживает столкновения, словно эхо квантового ритуала. QE-PET учится слышать эту музыку, чтобы различать здоровые и раковые ткани. Квантовая запутанность становится клиническим инструментом. Мы на пороге томографии, где изображение ткёт сама природа спутанности.

title: Disharmonized Harmonics Unravel Century-Old Mystery of the Blazhko Effect
oneliner: Analysis of pulsation harmonics in star V783 Cyg reveals that the quasi-periodic brightness modulation of the Blazhko effect is caused by changes in turbulent convection within the stellar envelope.
description: The century-old puzzle of the Blazhko effect—quasi-periodic modulation of amplitude and phase in RR Lyrae variable stars—has finally cracked under observational pressure. Using ultra-precise photometry from the Kepler space telescope, scientists uncovered a set of “disharmonized harmonics” whose beh
abstract: The Blazhko effect — a quasi-periodic modulation of pulsation amplitude and phase observed in all subtypes of RR Lyrae stars — lacked a physical explanation for over a century. Based on short-cadence Kepler photometry for the star V783 Cyg (type RRab), it is shown that some pulsation overtones, termed “disharmonized harmonics,” exhibit an anticorrelation of amplitude variations with the fundamental mode and lower harmonics. These harmonics correspond precisely to the base of the convective envelope, where the interaction between convection and pulsations is strongest. An interpretation is proposed for the Blazhko modulation as a consequence of quasi-periodic changes in turbulent convection that regulate the efficiency of energy transport and the thickness of the κ-excitation zone. Such a model naturally explains the prevalence of the effect among RR Lyrae subtypes and its absence when the convective envelope does not deeply penetrate the He I/H ionization zone. The results create an observational foundation linking the behavior of harmonics with convective dynamics.
threads: Вековая тайна мерцания звёзд разгадана благодаря «дисгармонизированным гармоникам». Оказывается, звезда пульсирует как колокол, но её звук то усиливается, то слабеет из-за турбулентного кипения плазмы в оболочке. Конвекция, словно капризный дирижёр, меняет громкость. Теперь эти гармоники станут инструментом для прослушивания недр других светил — возможно, мы научимся предсказывать космическую погоду.

title: Neutrino Signals from Superradiant Clouds around Primordial Black Holes
oneliner: Superradiance turns rotating primordial black holes into neutrino factories, allowing stringent constraints on their contribution to dark matter.
description: The study explores a scenario in which clouds of light scalar bosons form around rotating primordial black holes (PBHs) via superradiance. If these bosons couple to neutrinos, the clouds emit an almost monochromatic neutrino flux with energies of several MeV. By comparing predicted galactic and extr
abstract: Primordial black holes (PBHs) are a dark matter candidate, especially in the asteroid-mass window (10¹⁷–10²³ g). We explore a scenario with spinning PBHs, where superradiance builds boson clouds that emit a nearly monochromatic stream of neutrinos with energies of a few MeV. Both galactic and extragalactic contributions are calculated and compared with antineutrino data from Borexino, KamLAND, and Super-Kamiokande. It is found that for scalar bosons, constraints on the PBH fraction of dark matter cover a large part of the asteroid range and extend to higher masses. For instance, with spin a≈0.9, α_g=0.25, and Yukawa coupling g_{νφ}=10⁻⁴, the tightest limit f_PBH≈10⁻⁷ is reached at M_PBH≈2×10²² g, which is significantly stricter than lensing bounds. This approach complements neutrino searches for dark matter, differing from limits based on Hawking radiation.
threads: Крохотная чёрная дыра размером с протон и массой с астероид способна стать гравитационным усилителем, излучающим нейтрино на одной чистой ноте. Физики просканировали небо детекторами — и тишина сказала больше, чем сотни гипотетических сигналов, наложив невиданные ограничения на тёмную материю. Новые обсерватории вроде JUNO, возможно, уловят сольное выступление такой дыры — и тогда мы впервые напрямую услышим голос тёмного мира.

title: Machine Learning Predicts Neutrino Conversions in Compact Objects
oneliner: Neural networks learn to spot rapid flavor conversions of neutrinos in supernovae and neutron-star mergers from their angular moments.
description: Under the extreme conditions of collapsing stars and merging neutron spheres, neutrinos can undergo rapid flavor conversions that radically alter their properties, influencing explosions and element synthesis. Researchers trained machine learning models on synthetic data to determine, from a handful
abstract: In collapsing supernovae and neutron star mergers, fast flavor conversions (FFC) of neutrinos are possible when there is a zero crossing in the angular distribution of the electron lepton number (ELN). Machine learning methods have been applied to search for non-axisymmetric ELN crossings based on the zeroth and first angular moments of ν_e and ν̅_e. The models generalize well to most test data generated in different ways, but for an axisymmetric dataset from the discretized Boltzmann equation, accuracy improves only when symmetry is artificially broken. On flavor-equilibrium distributions, the model is ineffective if the crossings are determined by heavy lepton flavors; removing these restores performance. The results underscore the need for additional input parameters to enhance the ML approach and move toward incorporating FFC into large-scale simulations.
threads: На стадионе сто тысяч фанатов, каждый в своём ритме. Но стоит малой группе запустить волну — и весь стадион взрывается движением. Так и нейтрино в сверхновой: неуловимая флейворная конверсия захватывает всё ядро за миллионные доли секунды. Машинное обучение теперь предсказывает эту лавину по размытым снимкам толпы. Та же идея однажды поможет управлять термоядерной плазмой — предвидеть срывы до того, как они сожгут реактор.

title: Neural Network Engineering: How Machine Learning Decodes the Equation of State of Neutron Stars
oneliner: Physics-informed invertible neural networks enable direct recovery of central density and pressure of neutron stars from observed mass–radius contours, bypassing cumbersome modeling.
description: Using a hybrid architecture of conditional invertible neural networks (cINN) with physics-informed regularization, researchers have developed a method for fast and accurate determination of the equation of state (EoS) of nuclear matter at supranuclear densities. The model is trained on an ensemble o
abstract: A physically informed regularized conditional invertible neural network (cINN) has been developed, directly mapping posterior mass–radius distributions of neutron stars to central energy density and pressure, without explicit multidimensional sampling. Regularization ensures causality and thermodynamic stability, providing physically consistent predictions without direct modeling. The method is shown to accurately recover posterior equation-of-state distributions for data similar to NICER observations, preserving the connection between macro- and micro-properties of dense matter. A systematic optimization of 62,400 simulated mass–radius measurements was carried out to find the most informative targets. It was found that the constraining power strongly depends on the position on the mass–radius plane; the optimal strategy alternates between compact massive stars and extended stars of intermediate mass, reducing the uncertainty of the inferred equation of state to ∼9%–10% relative to current NICER data.
threads: Ядро нейтронной звезды сжато до предела, звук в нём готов обогнать свет, но закон неумолим. Представьте рояль, чьи струны не могут колебаться быстрее вселенского предела. Нейросеть-дешифровщик слушает космические аккорды и по ним восстанавливает партитуру — уравнение состояния. Возможно, скоро мы узнаем, есть ли в сердцевине таких звёзд кварковая материя.

title: Calibrating the internal shock model of gamma-ray bursts using a genetic algorithm
oneliner: Astrophysicists have for the first time optimized the internal shock model to reproduce the statistical properties of light curves of cosmic gamma-ray bursts.
description: Gamma-ray bursts are the most powerful explosions in the Universe, producing ultra-relativistic jets. A key problem is how the kinetic energy of the jet is converted into gamma radiation. In this work, the internal shock model, where emission arises from collisions of shells with different velocitie
abstract: To clarify the origin of gamma-ray bursts within the internal shock model, a parameter calibration was performed using light curves. A genetic algorithm minimizes a loss function based on six metrics (average post-peak profile, autocorrelation, duration distribution, SNR, number of peaks, peak flux, and fluence) using data from Swift/BAT, Fermi/GBM, CGRO/BATSE, taking into account the star formation rate versus redshift. The optimized model reproduces key properties. Constraints on the central engine: the number of shells follows a generalized Zipf's law (analogous to the Gutenberg–Richter law), and emission times follow a negative exponential distribution (stochastic ejection with constant probability). The model is suitable for interpreting variability and forecasting populations for future missions.
threads: Гамма-всплески — мощнейшие взрывы во Вселенной — подчиняются закону землетрясений. Их центральный двигатель, словно гигантский тектонический разлом, выбрасывает оболочки, а статистика выбросов ложится на кривую Гутенберга—Рихтера. Мы слушаем ритм этих космических перкуссий и, возможно, однажды предскажем, когда «тряхнёт» на другом краю Вселенной.

title: Genetic algorithms test the Hu–Sawicki f(R) gravity model against DESI and Pantheon+ data
oneliner: Current cosmological data allow only minimal deviations from ΛCDM within f(R) models reconstructed by genetic algorithms.
description: Using symbolic regression—genetic algorithms—the authors explored perturbations around the Hu–Sawicki model in f(R) gravity. The resulting functions were tested for theoretical viability (stability, chameleon screening) and compared with DESI DR2 baryon acoustic oscillations and Pantheon+ supernovae
abstract: Using genetic algorithms, the possibility of deviations from ΛCDM was explored within viable Hu-Sawicki type f(R) models. A pipeline was developed that combines the GA code GATO with the cosmological code CANDI: each analytic f(R) function was tested for stability, recovery of the matter-dominated era, general relativistic limit, and the 'chameleon' screening mechanism. The ansätze that met the conditions were then compared with DESI DR2 data on baryon acoustic oscillations and the Pantheon+ catalog of type Ia supernovae. The largest deviations were found at late times when curvature is small, and they quickly fade with increasing redshift. The Om(z) diagnostic shows only a slight departure from the constant behavior of ΛCDM, and the effective equation of state of dark energy weakly evolves from a quintessence-like to a phantom-like phase. Overall, current background data allow only limited deviations from the standard ΛCDM model within the class studied.
threads: Идеальный хамелеон найден: модифицированная гравитация маскируется так искусно, что данные DESI и Pantheon+ не отличают её от ΛCDM. Отклонение — стомиллионные доли. Это не провал, а триумф маскировки. Если тёмная энергия динамична, она играет в прятки на недосягаемом пока уровне. Ключ, возможно, не в расширении, а в росте структур.

title: Supernova Neutrinos and the Mirror of Life: How Molecular Asymmetry Is Born
oneliner: Streams of neutrinos from supernova explosions could have set off a mechanism that led to the chiral purity of biomolecules—a key property of all life on Earth.
description: The study proposes a model in which neutrinos from supernovae, interacting with organic molecules in interstellar clouds, create a tiny energy preference for one of the mirror-image isomers. This effect is amplified by autocatalytic reactions and stochastic fluctuations, leading to a significant ena
threads: Каждая сверхновая — это не просто взрыв, а дирижёр, взмахивающий палочкой из нейтрино. В холодных молекулярных облаках эта палочка касается будущих кирпичиков жизни и задаёт им асимметрию. Так рождается хиральная чистота — возможно, универсальный ключ к жизни во Вселенной. Лабораторные эксперименты с нейтрино и анализ астероидов приближают нас к разгадке нашего собственного происхождения.

title: Direct Modeling of AM CVn Spectra and Neural Network Bayesian Inference for Multimessenger Astronomy
oneliner: An analytical model for the continuous electromagnetic emission of AM CVn systems and a method for parameter inference using normalizing flows have been developed for joint analysis of data from gravitational-wave and electromagnetic observatories.
description: This work presents a new analytical model for the continuum emission of ultracompact AM CVn binary systems, linking white dwarf masses, orbital period, and accretion rate to observed spectra in X-ray, optical, and ultraviolet bands. The model accounts for disk accretion, boundary layer, direct strea
abstract: Future telescopes (NewAthena, CASTOR, AXIS) and the gravitational wave detector LISA will unveil the population of galactic ultra-compact binaries. For their joint analysis, a forward model of continuous emission from AM CVn systems has been developed, linking binary parameters to observed fluxes in X-ray, optical, and ultraviolet. The model assumes mass transfer driven by gravitational waves and accounts for accretion physics, emission geometry, absorption, and instrumental response. Together with population synthesis, it predicts that only one in 7,000 systems will be simultaneously detected by LISA, CASTOR, and AXIS. To solve the inverse problem, a convolutional neural network and normalizing flows were applied: on synthetic data, the error for the accretor mass is 0.05 M☉, donor mass 0.26 M☉, orbital period 0.1 s, distance 0.2 pc. Spearman correlation is high for all parameters except donor mass. This work lays the groundwork for studying the astrophysics of such systems and planning multi-messenger observations.
threads: 17-минутный ритм звезды AM Гончих Псов быстрее вашего любимого трека. Два белых карлика танцуют предсмертный вальс, излучая гравитационные волны. Нейросеть научилась читать их световые партитуры. Скоро LISA включит гравитационное радио Галактики.

title: Solid-State Gigahertz Gravitational Wave Detector: Hunting for Relic Stochastic Background and Primordial Black Holes
oneliner: How to turn a sapphire single crystal into a quantum antenna to catch gravitational waves from the Big Bang and mergers of Planck-scale black holes.
description: A solid-state detector is proposed, based on an array of 10³ sapphire (Al₂O₃) single crystals totaling 1 m³, capable of sensing gravitational waves (GW) at ~1–10 GHz through coherent phonon generation. A quantum-mechanical calculation incorporating the crystal’s band structure reveals a resonant boo
abstract: Reheating after inflation generates a stochastic gravitational-wave background with a non-thermal spectrum, peaking in the gigahertz range at strains around 10⁻³⁰. Experiments based on the inverse Gertsenshtein effect only reach megahertz, so a solid-state detector accumulating signal over years is proposed. The design involves a modular array of ~10³ single crystals of ultra-pure sapphire (10 cm)³, read out by cryogenic single-phonon sensors; segmentation provides thermal isolation and background suppression via coincidences. Material analysis shows diamond is more efficient per unit volume, but large crystals are unavailable. The strategy is twofold: a narrowband resonant search for the background and a broadband approach with coincident tagging for transient mergers of light primordial black holes of planetary and subplanetary masses, whose signals would hint at dark matter.
threads: Прямо сейчас сквозь нас проходят гигагерцевые гравитационные волны из новорождённой Вселенной. Чтобы подслушать этот шёпот, физики создают сапфировый камертон, где волна рождает кванты звука — фононы. Один такой фонон может прибыть из эпохи инфляции, когда пространство расширялось быстрее света. А если уловить чирп слияния первичных чёрных дыр, мы поймаем тёмную материю за руку. Возможно, через несколько лет в подземной лаборатории зазвенит первый сапфировый колокол.

title: Reflation: Redox-Driven Atmospheric Inflation of Super-Earths
oneliner: Geochemically reduced mantles of super-Earths can trigger temporary atmospheric inflation after losing primary carbon dioxide, creating an observable signature of the interior's redox state.
description: Atmospheres of highly irradiated super-Earths are prone to hydrodynamic escape, yet some planets retain thick envelopes. Through numerical modeling of coupled interior-atmosphere evolution, this work shows that reduced mantles (near the iron-wüstite buffer) initially outgas CO-dominated atmospheres.
threads: Суперземля может притворяться легче, чем она есть. На время. После того как жёсткое излучение звезды срывает с неё тяжёлую углекислую шубу, растворённый в магме водород вырывается наружу и надувает планету, как спасательный жилет, — плотность обрушивается на 60%. Это рефляция. Возможно, мы уже видели такие раздутые миры, не подозревая, что они — ключ к химии недр. Новое поколение телескопов покажет, как часто в Галактике встречаются планеты с дыханием.

title: Neutron Stars and the AI Agent NNStar: Automating Dense Matter Physics
oneliner: Artificial intelligence for the first time takes on the full cycle of neutron star modeling — from Lagrangian to mass-radius curve.
description: NNStar is introduced — an autonomous AI agent that, without human intervention, builds a relativistic model of nuclear matter, solves equations, computes the equation of state, integrates the Tolman–Oppenheimer–Volkoff equations, and performs Bayesian analysis of observational data. The agent is pac
abstract: Constraining the equation of state of dense matter requires matching models with data spanning from nuclear matter properties to neutron star radii. Manual tuning of multi-dimensional parameters is time-consuming. NNStar is an end-to-end AI agent that automates the entire pipeline: from constructing a relativistic mean-field model (from a Lagrangian) and solving field equations, to building the equation of state in β-equilibrium, matching it with the crust, integrating the Tolman–Oppenheimer–Volkoff equations, and evaluating results through Bayesian analysis of nuclear and astrophysical data. The agent is implemented as a portable 'skill' for an open-source LLM platform, combining symbolic and numerical physics engines. It autonomously reads the model, adjusts parameters, and outputs a full set of observables. NNStar creates a new paradigm of AI-driven analysis of nuclear matter and neutron stars.
threads: Нейтронная звезда величиной с город весит как Солнце. Чтобы воссоздать её недра, учёный теперь лишь задаёт «музыку взаимодействий», а ИИ-виртуоз NNStar исполняет эту симфонию в коде за минуты. Вскоре агенты займутся экзотическими кварковыми звёздами — и, возможно, найдут рецепт материи, из которой скроена Вселенная.

title: DARK-HIDE: Who Distorts the Shadow of a Black Hole — Dark Matter or Hidden Dimensions?
oneliner: New research shows that the shadow of a black hole alone cannot distinguish the effects of dark matter from the influence of extra dimensions — more subtle observables are needed.
description: A comparison of two scenarios — dark matter distribution around black holes and an effective geometry with a tidal charge from higher-dimensional theories — revealed a deep degeneracy. Even when critical curves and proxy images match exactly, the local photon escape cones retain distinctive differen
abstract: Problem: dark matter and corrections from extra dimensions can alter the observable parameters of black holes in indistinguishable ways. Within the DARK-HIDE framework, rotating metrics with radial mass profiles (Einasto, cored cNFW) and a brane metric with a tidal charge q (non-electromagnetic) are compared. Photon regions, critical curves, shadow size likelihood from EHT data, and local ZAMO escape cones were analyzed. At ε/M=0.025, the best fit to dark matter yields q/M²=–0.01917 (Einasto) and –0.01117 (cNFW) with standard deviations of 0.084 and 0.051. The caustic test failed validation and was excluded. After marginalizing over spin and angle, EHT constraints leave both dark matter models a priori dominant and weakly suppress large negative q, but are compatible with q=0. Local cones preserve a small but clear distinction. Thus, shadow size alone does not break the degeneracy, and local photon dynamics carry extra information.
threads: Одна и та же тень чёрной дыры может скрывать совершенно разную реальность: тёмную материю или скрытые измерения. Две куклы — один силуэт. Чтобы разглядеть разницу, нужен новый «свет» — более чувствительные интерферометры. Возможно, так мы нащупаем контуры теории всего.

title: Super-magnified Stars: How Gravitational Lensing Probes Dark Matter
oneliner: Gravitational lenses of galaxy clusters amplify the light of distant stars by thousands of times, and the analysis of their microlensing opens a unique window into the distribution of dark matter on small scales.
description: Gravitational lensing in massive galaxy clusters can amplify the brightness of individual stars by hundreds or thousands of times, allowing them to be observed at cosmological distances. Intracluster stars, lost by galaxies, break up the smooth caustic of the lens into a 'corrugated' network of micr
abstract: Super-enhanced stars in lensing galaxy clusters, discovered by HST and JWST, experience gravitational lensing magnification of ~1000 times, becoming visible at cosmological distances. Free-floating cluster stars create a network of microcaustics, causing frequent microlensing events. Their frequency and light curves are extremely sensitive to small-scale density fluctuations, making them a unique probe of dark matter mini-haloes. Photometric monitoring of microcaustic crossings allows spatially resolving stellar disks thanks to the limb-darkening effect. Model light curves for the first discovered source (Kelly et al., 2018) illustrate the method. The future Habitable Worlds Observatory, with its unprecedented sensitivity and resolution, will be able to perform photometry of such events, out of reach of current instruments, and directly investigate the nature of dark matter.
threads: Далёкая звезда, невидимая обычными телескопами, вдруг вспыхивает в тысячи раз ярче — это скопление галактик искривило пространство и сработало как мощнейшая линза. Но в мерцании той звезды скрыта рябь от сгустков тёмной материи размером с Солнечную систему. Мы учимся читать эту рябь, чтобы наконец увидеть невидимое.

title: Amazonian Solar Landmarks: What Geoglyphs Reveal About a Forgotten Civilization
oneliner: Analysis of 326 square and rectangular earthworks in the Brazilian state of Acre shows their orientation is not random and points to the builders' deep interest in the Sun's annual cycle.
description: Using satellite imagery and statistical methods, researchers have for the first time studied the orientation of Amazonian geoglyphs. The predominant directions align with sunrises on solstices and equinoxes, suggesting a ritual or calendrical purpose for these enigmatic structures. The findings shed
abstract: The Amazonian geoglyphs are thousands of man-made earthworks, gradually emerging from beneath the tropical forest due to deforestation. Construction dates from the 5th century BCE to the end of the 1st millennium CE, but archaeological data on the builders' culture remains fragmentary. A ceremonial function is presumed, especially for geometrically precise structures. For the first time, remote sensing and archaeoastronomy methods were employed to analyze the orientation of 326 — nearly all known — square and rectangular geoglyphs. The results show a non-random choice of orientation and intentional alignment with the Sun's annual cycle.
threads: В Амазонии 326 геоглифов указывают на Солнце в дни солнцестояний и окончания дождей. Земляные квадраты — циферблат, по которому древние сверяли год. Орбитальная съёмка вскрыла этот код, а скоро лидары и машинное обучение прочешут джунгли в поисках новых календарей, спрятанных под кронами.

title: How Polarization of Light Reveals the Spin of Black Holes
oneliner: Polarimetric observations of the event horizon using VLBI allow us to reconstruct the magnetic field structure and constrain the spin of supermassive black holes.
description: The spin of a black hole is a fundamental parameter that determines the geometry of spacetime and the energy available for jets and accretion disks. Using polarization images obtained by the Event Horizon Telescope for M87* and Sagittarius A*, scientists have identified three main channels through w
abstract: The spin of a black hole, described by the dimensionless spin parameter, gives rise to the Kerr metric and acts as an energy reservoir exchanging energy with plasma. Using Very Long Baseline Interferometry (VLBI), we have begun to resolve polarized emission on the scale of the event horizon. We distinguish between polarimetric signatures tied to photon propagation in curved spacetime and effects mediated by magnetic fields threading the horizon. So far, Event Horizon Telescope (EHT) observations more reliably constrain magnetic field geometry, variability, source orientation, magnetic flux state, and the disk-jet connection than the value or direction of spin. Future programs will need to combine complementary polarimetric diagnostics, testing whether a consistent spin-dependent interpretation holds up across independent data and realistic models.
threads: Космический волчок в центре Галактики крутится так, что его поляризационный свет меняется за минуты — в 1500 раз быстрее, чем у M87*. Поляризация работает как стробоскоп, выхватывая из тьмы детали вращения бездны. А скоро космические интерферометры вроде BHEX увидят живой пульс горизонта событий — это не фантастика, это завтрашний день астрофизики.

title: Cosmological Birth of Electron-Positron Pairs: Light Creating Antimatter
oneliner: The interaction of cosmic background photons with each other inevitably produces electron-positron pairs, whose radiation could explain the mystery of the gamma-ray background.
description: Scientists calculated the rate of electron-positron pair production resulting from the interaction of gamma-ray photons of the cosmic photon background (CPB) with itself. By decomposing the CPB into a sum of gray bodies and modeling source evolution with redshift, they showed that pair production pe
abstract: The rate of electron-positron pair production via γ-γ interactions of the cosmic photon background (CPB) with itself at redshifts z ≤ 10 has been calculated. The CPB was modeled as a sum of grey-body functions evolving according to source luminosity functions and redshift. The angle- and energy-dependent cross-section was integrated over the evolving CPB. Propagation of the produced pairs to z = 0 accounted for cosmological energy losses, and the spectrum of secondary radiation (annihilation, inverse Compton scattering, bremsstrahlung) was integrated along the line of sight to estimate the contribution to the cosmic gamma-ray background (CGB). The peak pair production rate (~1.8×10⁻³¹ cm⁻³ s⁻¹) is reached at z ≈ 2.7; the integrated pair production rate up to z = 10 is ~10⁵⁴ s⁻¹. Inverse Compton scattering of the pairs on the CPB makes a significant contribution to the CGB: in the energy range 1 MeV – 1 GeV this contribution reaches 20% of the total CGB and may noticeably reduce the discrepancy between observations and models.
threads: Вселенная пронизана невидимым световым туманом — остатком Большого взрыва и сиянием древних квазаров. В его глубине, словно капли росы на заре, рождаются пары: электрон и его антипод. Эти частицы, разогнанные до огромных энергий, окутывают космос мягким гамма-свечением. Возможно, в этом скрыта разгадка одного из главных парадоксов астрофизики — происхождения антиматерии.

title: The Helium Breath of a Rocky Planet: Atmospheric Escape from LHS 1140b
oneliner: High-resolution spectroscopy has revealed variable helium escape from the atmosphere of a rocky exoplanet in the habitable zone, changing our understanding of atmospheric retention.
description: For the first time, helium escape has been detected from the atmosphere of a rocky exoplanet, LHS 1140b, which orbits in the habitable zone of a nearby red dwarf. Observations with the WINERED spectrograph in 2024 revealed an absorption line of metastable helium at 10833 Å, indicating hydrodynamic o
abstract: Spectroscopic observations of the rocky exoplanet LHS 1140b in the habitable zone of a low-mass star revealed helium absorption in its atmosphere during transit in the near-infrared range. The signal was recorded in 2024 but absent in 2025, indicating a variable atmospheric outflow. The data are interpreted as evidence of an upper atmosphere dominated by helium and depleted in hydrogen; other volatiles remain at lower altitudes, consistent with atmospheric fractionation models. No helium was detected on the smaller, more irradiated planet LHS 1140c. These results shed light on the processes of atmospheric retention and loss for rocky worlds around red dwarfs.
threads: Гелий — не просто наполнитель для шариков. На LHS 1140b он стал термостойким плащом, который планета не сбрасывает, пока лёгкий водород уносится в космос. Эта природная дистилляция — галактический перегонный куб, где звезда играет роль огня. Пульсации утечки выдают ритм звезды: возможно, в будущем мы научимся по гелиевым 'азбукам Морзе' предсказывать судьбу водных миров.

title: Gravitational Anomaly in Wide Binary Stars Persists Despite Strict Data Control
oneliner: New research shows that even with the strictest data selection and accounting for hidden stellar companions, the anomalous boost in gravity at low accelerations remains robust.
description: An international team of astronomers has revisited the recent debates about gravity's behavior in wide binary star systems. Analyzing Gaia satellite data using three different samples, the scientists concluded: none of the proposed data 'cleaning' methods or ways of accounting for hierarchical syste
abstract: Objective: Re-examine gravitational tests in wide binaries using 2D velocities. Method: Analysis of the acceleration plane, the distribution of normalized relative velocity (ratio of measured speed to Newtonian circular speed), and its median profile. Result: Rigorous data control and realistic modeling of multiple systems do not eliminate the low-acceleration gravitational anomaly but confirm it—the boost factor γ ≈ 1.3–1.6 agrees with MOND predictions and numerical orbit calculations. Studies that denied the anomaly were erroneous due to calibration of the multiple-system fraction assuming Newtonian dynamics, biased quality cuts, or insufficient statistics. These findings strengthen modified gravity as an alternative to dark matter.
threads: Два фигуриста на бескрайнем льду. Их танец едва заметен — но что-то подо льдом разгоняет их быстрее, чем положено. Именно так ведёт себя гравитация в широких двойных звёздах: данные Gaia трижды подтвердили упрямую аномалию. Если эффект реален, тёмная материя может оказаться миражом, а учебники физики затрещат по швам.

title: How to Weigh the Invisible: Redshift Tomography of Unresolved Galaxies from Euclid and LSST Data
oneliner: Scientists have reconstructed for the first time the redshift distribution of a galaxy population that cannot be seen individually, using multi-band background maps and neural network flows.
description: A new study proposes a method to estimate the redshift distribution of unresolved galaxies directly from multi-band maps of the cosmic optical background. Using conditional normalizing flows trained on realistic image simulations from Euclid and LSST, the model achieves subpercent accuracy in determ
abstract: For unresolved galaxy populations, a methodology is proposed for estimating redshift distributions from multi-band background maps using conditional normalizing flows trained on realistic simulations. With image quality expected from the synergy of Euclid and Rubin LSST, sub-percent accuracy (mean and standard deviation of flux-weighted distributions) is achieved with statistical sample correspondence. The method is robust to photometric incompleteness through imputation. Reliability diagnostics are built in by including observational quantities as target variables. Tomography at the map level is demonstrated: pixel-level details are preserved, yielding nearly sub-percent accuracy for tomographic subsamples. This opens the way to component separation, signal interpretation, and cosmological inferences from optical background fluctuations.
threads: Тусклое свечение космического фона — не брак оптики, а хор из 90% галактик, не видимых поодиночке. Подобно чтению палимпсеста, мы научились разделять этот свет на слои времени и определять расстояние до каждого 'голоса' с точностью менее 1%. Однажды это позволит разглядеть самые первые звёзды Вселенной.

title: Strongly Mixed Worlds: How Inflation Becomes a Cosmic Collider
oneliner: Exact analytical solutions reveal extraordinarily strong signals from heavy particles in the non-Gaussianity of the cosmic microwave background, turning the early Universe into an accelerator of ultimate energies.
description: In a new study, a non-perturbative mathematical framework has been developed to calculate non-Gaussianity in two-field inflationary models with strong mixing between curvature and isocurvature modes. Using exact mode functions, the authors summed mixing effects to all orders and obtained closed-form
abstract: An analytical approach to primordial non-Gaussianity in multi-field inflation has been developed, non-perturbative in the parameter λ describing the mixing of curvature and isocurvature modes. From exact linear solutions for perturbations ζ and σ, propagators are constructed, and exact integral representations are obtained for tree-level bispectra generated by interactions of the form ζ̇²σ, ζ̇σ², and σ³. The approach sums all orders of transfer between perturbations and is applicable for any values of the entropic mass μ. In the strong mixing regime, where standard perturbation theory breaks down, the power spectrum and bispectrum are significantly enhanced, revealing new non-perturbative scaling laws for the amplitude of non-Gaussianity. These results open up possibilities for analytical description of multi-field inflation beyond weak coupling, as well as for analyzing signals of the cosmological collider, formation of primordial black holes, and loop corrections.
threads: В первые мгновения после Большого взрыва Вселенная была коллайдером с энергией, недоступной земным технологиям. Её эхо хранит следы тяжёлых частиц. Как мощный блендер, сильное смешивание полей взбило эти сигналы до гигантских амплитуд. Новый математический аппарат позволяет их уловить — и, возможно, выйти на след тёмной материи.

title: Random Walks of Dust Grains Around Black Holes and Low-Frequency X-ray Variability
oneliner: Spacetime curvature changes the probabilities of particle capture by a black hole and shapes the observed power spectrum of accreting systems.
description: In a fresh bit of research, scientists looked at how a black hole’s geometry messes with the random dance of dust specks in a churning accretion disk. Cracking the Fokker–Planck equation in the curved spacetime of a Schwarzschild–de Sitter setup, they discovered something counterintuitive: the chanc
abstract: The stochastic dynamics of a dust grain in a turbulent flow with strong gravity is described as a random walk on a Riemannian manifold, modeling the variability of accretion onto compact objects. Solving the Fokker-Planck equation in a black hole background shows that due to the stretching of radial cells near the event horizon, a particle has a higher escape probability than in flat space, since the available volume increases. Modeling the trajectories of many grains distributed on concentric shells according to the structure of a thin accretion disk revealed flux spectra through the horizon: low-frequency slopes become shallower (due to relativistic time dilation), while high-frequency slopes become steeper. The resulting spectra in the Schwarzschild metric reproduce well the observations of low-frequency X-ray variability of Cygnus X-1 in the hard state, highlighting the importance of geometric wandering in accretion.
threads: Чёрная дыра — не пылесос, а батут: кривизна статистически отбрасывает пылинки к космологическому горизонту. Это открытие меняет взгляд на аккрецию и обещает новый инструмент для проверки общей теории относительности — по временным рядам рентгеновской переменности.

title: Early Infrared Excess and the Birth of a Corona in Tidal Disruption Event 2024aepd
oneliner: Observations of a disrupted star unveil the secrets of accretion coronae and the mysterious infrared glow.
description: In the tidal disruption event 2024aepd, when a star was torn apart by a supermassive black hole, near-infrared observations revealed an unexpected excess of radiation as early as 40 days. Its spectrum—a nearly flat power-law continuum—does not match the Rayleigh-Jeans tail of ultraviolet blackbody r
abstract: We present multi-wavelength observations of the tidal disruption event TDE 2024aepd, covering primarily the first ~300 days after detection. The X-ray spectrum was initially dominated by a thermal disk component with a hard excess; starting around day 178, the spectrum became a power law and subsequently hardened, indicating rapid formation of a hot corona. An early near-infrared excess was recorded by day ~40; its nearly flat spectrum strongly differs from the Rayleigh-Jeans tail of the ultraviolet-optical blackbody emission. Although a traditional dust echo explanation cannot be entirely ruled out, free-free emission from a reprocessing photospheric shell appears more plausible. The shift in the break between UV-optical and near-IR bands, with a nearly constant density profile index, suggests evolving reprocessing conditions within a weakly changing density structure. TDE 2024aepd becomes the third event (after AT2019azh and TDE 2025abcr) to show an early IR excess; assessing the prevalence of this phenomenon requires a larger sample with near-IR observations at early epochs.
threads: В считанные недели после того, как чёрная дыра разрывает звезду, рождается горячая корона — область, где фотоны взмывают до рентгеновских энергий, словно оркестр берёт крещендо. Инфракрасный избыток, подобный низкому басу, разносит эхо переработанного излучения. Понимание этих процессов — ключ к разгадке роста сверхмассивных чёрных дыр и рождения галактик.

title: Visualization of Spontaneous Vortices in a Disordered Superconducting Nanocomposite
oneliner: Using scanning SQUID microscopy, scientists captured unusually extended and entangled spontaneous vortices emerging during a phase transition in an MgO/MgB₂ nanocomposite, demonstrating their connection to the Kibble–Zurek mechanism.
description: For the first time, detailed images have been obtained of spontaneous quantized vortices in a superconducting nanocomposite with induced (proximity-effect) superconductivity, composed of randomly distributed MgB₂ grains in an MgO matrix. Unlike conventional Abrikosov vortices induced by an external
abstract: Spontaneous symmetry breaking during a continuous second-order phase transition in superconductors was investigated, leading to the formation of topological defects — quantized vortices. Using a scanning SQUID microscope, spontaneous vortices were visualized in a superconducting nanocomposite with the proximity effect. Under near-zero field conditions, vortices with different polarities, sizes, and shapes are stochastically observed. Their field distributions are more extended and complex than those of field-induced Abrikosov vortices, and the effective penetration depth ranges from ~1 to ~10 μm. Spontaneous vortices arise upon cooling as a result of competition between Josephson coupling and thermal phase fluctuations inherent to proximity-effect systems. The vortex morphology apparently captures information about local phase differences that existed at an early stage of the transition, offering a glimpse into the process of order emergence.
threads: Космические струны — гипотетические складки пространства-времени — возможно, застыли в первые мгновения после Большого взрыва. Сегодня физики нашли их миниатюрное подобие в куске сверхпроводящей керамики. Запутанные магнитные вихри, самопроизвольно возникшие при охлаждении, — это отпечаток фазового перехода, словно фотография рождения порядка. Изучая их, мы, возможно, поймём, как Вселенная обретала структуру.

title: Boson Peak Reveals Nano-Secrets of Cement Gel
oneliner: Terahertz spectroscopy and low-temperature calorimetry have for the first time detected the boson peak in concrete's main component, linking it to elastic heterogeneity at the nanoscale.
description: Scientists have experimentally discovered the boson peak — a universal anomaly in the vibrational spectrum of disordered media — in calcium silicate hydrate (C-S-H), the primary binding phase of hardened cement. Using terahertz spectroscopy and low-temperature heat capacity measurements, they showed
abstract: The boson peak (BP), a universal vibrational anomaly of disordered media, has been systematically characterized in calcium silicate hydrate (C-S-H), the binding phase of hardened cement, for five Ca/Si ratios (0.5–1.7). Using time-domain terahertz spectroscopy and low-temperature calorimetry after Bruggeman correction for impurities, the BP is localized near 1 THz. The integrated spectral weight and the peak in Cp/T³ decrease monotonically with increasing Ca/Si, while the terahertz peak amplitude is maximum at Ca/Si = 1.0, reflecting a structural crossover between depolymerization of silicate chains and filling of interlayer space by calcium. From BP analysis, a dynamic correlation length of ~1 nm (0.3–2 nm) and an elastic heterogeneity parameter γ are obtained, decreasing from 0.98 to 0.48. The BP frequency, normalized to the Debye frequency (ν_BP/ν_D = 0.15–0.17), falls within the range of silicate glasses. The parameter γ, governing the distribution of energy barriers for local rearrangements, becomes a quantitative composition-dependent descriptor of intrinsic creep and heat transport in C-S-H, linking nanoscale dynamics to macroscopic concrete durability.
threads: Представьте барабан, натянутый неравномерно: его звук выдаёт распределение напряжений. Бозонный пик в цементе — такой же «голос» наномира: частота ~1 ТГц раскрывает флуктуации жёсткости на наномасштабе. Управляя этим гулом, мы создадим бетон, который не ползёт веками — и однажды, возможно, отправится на Марс.

title: How Curvature Turns Phonon Hall Viscosity into Angular Momentum
oneliner: Theoretically demonstrated: in curved crystal membranes, flexural vibrations generate directional phonon angular momentum thanks to Hall viscosity.
description: In a flat membrane, the fundamental flexural mode does not interact with phonon Hall viscosity. However, static curvature converts normal motion into in-plane shear strain, opening a channel sensitive to the Hall response. We show that this coupling generates in-plane phonon angular momentum, direct
abstract: In a flat crystalline membrane, the low-energy spectrum is dominated by bending modes that don't couple to the phonon Hall viscosity. Static curvature converts normal displacements into in-plane strain, opening a Hall channel. The traceless curvature directly couples to the Hall shear, while the mean curvature couples indirectly through ordinary elastic shear. Together they generate an in-plane phonon angular momentum. For a statistically isotropic gentle ripple, the time average yields a stationary odd-in-field torque proportional to the mean-square curvature, with sign governed by the Hall viscosity. An estimate based on the bulk Hall viscosity of α-RuCl₃ predicts a torque of ~10⁻²² N·m for a membrane a few atomic layers thick—within reach of existing torsion sensors. This bending-to-shear response is a direct route to measuring phonon Hall viscosity in atomically thin crystals.
threads: В крошечной изогнутой мембране из магнитного кристалла звуковые волны не просто колеблются — они начинают вращаться. Кривизна играет роль дирижёра: без неё холловская вязкость — таинственная «смазка», не создающая трения, — остаётся безмолвной. Так рождается постоянный угловой момент, измеримый теми же датчиками, что ловят гравитационные волны. Мы на пороге тепловых гироскопов без движущихся деталей — только геометрия и квантовая фаза.

title: Coloring Black Holes: Choices in Creating the First Image of the Event Horizon
oneliner: One-sentence essence: An analysis of how astrophysicists, using algorithms and data from eight radio telescopes, transformed sparse signals into a single image of a black hole's shadow, and why this image is the result of not only observations but also numerous conscious choices.
description: In 2019, the Event Horizon Telescope (EHT) collaboration unveiled the first-ever image of the shadow of a supermassive black hole at the center of galaxy M87. This achievement was a triumph for radio astronomy and computational methods, but its creation required two years of painstaking work and was
abstract: In 2019, the Event Horizon Telescope (EHT) collaboration released the first image of a black hole's shadow, obtained from observations. However, the final picture was just one of many plausible visualizations of extremely noisy and sparse data. At every processing step — from calibration to image synthesis — a choice between competing approaches or averaging of their results was required. This paper analyzes the epistemic and aesthetic decisions made by the EHT and shows how a different choice would have changed the final image. The key conclusion: the main scientific value lies not in a single canonical snapshot, but in demonstrating a constrained variability that preserves the key shadow structure intact.
threads: Когда в 2019 году показали снимок чёрной дыры, многие решили, что это фотография. На самом деле, это симфония, собранная по обрывкам партитуры. Восемь антенн по всей планете уловили лишь несколько «нот» от плазмы вокруг M87*. Алгоритмы, словно дирижёры, достроили мелодию — каждый по-своему. Итог — усреднение трёх версий. Следующее поколение добавит космические «уши», и тогда, возможно, мы услышим голос бездны в полную силу.

title: The Galaxy's Chemical Clock: How Yttrium and Magnesium Reveal Stellar Ages
oneliner: A new analysis of 736 stars shows the Y/Mg ratio works as a chemical age indicator, but its calibration depends on position in the disk and metallicity.
description: To overcome the difficulties of directly determining stellar ages, astronomers use 'chemical clocks'—element ratios that change over time. The yttrium-magnesium (Y/Mg) pair draws particular attention: magnesium is rapidly ejected by Type II supernovae, while yttrium accumulates slowly in asymptotic
abstract: Based on a sample of 736 field stars (new atmospheric parameters and Mg and Y abundances, accounting for non-LTE effects, for 528; asteroseismic ages for 307; isochrone ages for 221), spatial variations of the [Y/Mg]–age relation in the Galactic disk are explored. Two new triple and nine double spectroscopic systems are identified. Systematic differences in the [Y/Mg]–age dependence are found, reflecting an inhomogeneous history of star formation and enrichment. Overall, [Y/Mg] rises with metallicity, but at supersolar values the trend weakens and becomes flatter than for solar-metallicity stars, where young ones show lower [Y/Mg] and old ones elevated [Y/Mg].
threads: Звёздный хронометр оказался с географией: во внешнем диске Галактики химические часы на иттрии и магнии спешат, а в толстом — еле ползут. Это открытие рушит миф об универсальном методе датировки и рисует Млечный Путь как оркестр, где каждая секция играет в своём темпе. В будущем многомерные модели машинного обучения восстановят всю историю Галактики по этим разноголосым партитурам.

title: Dark Matter and Neutrinos: Record Limits from Lyman-alpha Lines
oneliner: Analysis of Lyman-alpha forest spectra rules out significant interaction between dark matter and neutrinos, setting the world's strongest limit on the coupling strength.
description: Using full hydrodynamic simulations and a neural network emulator, scientists compared model Lyman-alpha forest spectra with high-resolution data from Keck and VLT telescopes. Bayesian analysis yielded an upper limit on the interaction parameter uνχ ≤ 1.5×10⁻⁸ (95% CI) — a hundred times stricter tha
abstract: New constraints on dark matter models interacting with neutrinos are presented, derived from high-resolution Lyman-alpha forest data. A suite of full hydrodynamic simulations was performed, covering a range of interaction strengths and thermal histories. An emulator was trained on the results, and Bayesian analysis (MCMC) yields an upper limit of uνχ ≤ 1.5×10⁻⁸ (95% confidence level)—the strongest direct constraint to date. The findings rule out previous hints of non-zero interactions. Comparison with approaches that project warm dark matter constraints onto models with suppressed small-scale structures shows that such methods overestimate the predictive power for this model.
threads: Миллиарды лет свет квазаров нёс сквозь космос ноты водородной партитуры. Астрофизики прислушались, надеясь уловить дуэт тёмной материи и нейтрино. Но расслышали лишь абсолютное молчание: взаимодействие оказалось как минимум в сотню раз слабее, чем предполагали смелые гипотезы. Этот предел не просто отсекает модные теории — он заставляет по-новому взглянуть на скрытую жизнь Вселенной.

title: Spinning primordial black holes: a new look at dark matter through cosmic dust heating
oneliner: Taking spin and halo profile into account refines constraints on the fraction of primordial black holes in dark matter that heat interstellar dust.
description: Primordial black holes are intriguing candidates for dark matter. Their Hawking radiation can heat interstellar dust, offering an independent way to estimate their contribution. This new work systematically accounts for black hole spin and various dark matter halo profiles for the first time. It tur
abstract: Primordial black holes (PBHs) with masses in the range 10^15–10^18 g can heat interstellar dust through Hawking radiation. Unlike previous works, the spin of PBHs is considered, which enhances radiation intensity, and the impact of five dark matter distribution models (isothermal, Einasto, NFW, Moore, Burkert) is investigated. Full photon spectra, including primary and secondary emission, are computed. It is shown that for a fixed halo profile and mass function, higher spin values impose stricter constraints on the PBH dark matter fraction f_PBH. The tightest limits come from the isothermal profile, followed by Einasto, NFW, and Moore; the Burkert profile yields the weakest constraints. For silicate dust grains, which cool more slowly than graphite ones, the upper bound on f_PBH reaches 10^{-4} at maximal spin. Both monochromatic and log-normal mass functions are considered; for the log-normal function, increasing the width σ excludes a broader mass range, preventing massive PBHs from being the sole dark matter component. The obtained constraints are weaker than existing ones but serve as an independent check.
threads: Межзвёздная пыль — триллионы микротермометров, разбросанных по Галактике. Они чутко реагируют на малейший нагрев, выдавая местоположение испаряющихся чёрных дыр. Учёт спина показал: даже слабое вращение умножает излучение и затягивает петлю ограничений. Возможно, скоро инфракрасные карты неба станут окном в природу тёмной материи.

title: Most hot Jupiters are born beyond the water ice line
oneliner: Analysis of the atmospheric composition of nine hot Jupiters showed that at least six of them formed beyond the water snow line, pointing to the important role of dynamical interactions in their migration.
description: Scientists used planet formation simulations that included pebble and gas accretion, migration, and chemical processes in the protoplanetary disk to reproduce the carbon and oxygen content in hot Jupiter atmospheres. Comparison with observational data allowed them to constrain their birthplaces rela
abstract: The atmospheric compositions of hot Jupiters were investigated to determine their formation locations in protoplanetary disks. Using the ChemComp code, planet formation modeling was performed, including planetesimal drift, gas and dust accretion, planet migration, stellar elemental abundances, and two additional chemical processes: thermal decomposition of refractory organics and trapping of CO/CO2 in water ice. For nine observed systems, metallicities (C/H and O/H) were calculated and compared with observational constraints. The results show that observed abundances are reproduced when planets form at different positions relative to the H2O and CO2 snow lines. At least six out of nine systems are consistent with formation beyond the water snow line. A joint analysis with orbital parameters (distances, eccentricities, inclinations) indicates that many systems likely underwent dynamical scattering followed by tidal evolution.
threads: Большинство горячих юпитеров, пышущих жаром у самого лица своих звёзд, на самом деле носят ледяное прошлое. Химия их атмосфер — как клеймо на перегретом паровозе, сошедшем с рельсов: она выдает рождение далеко за снеговой чертой, где вода замерзала в лёд. Это значит, что системы пережили гравитационные катастрофы, расшвырявшие планеты к звёздам. Скоро мы сможем читать эти химические летописи для тысяч миров.

title: Sulfur Photochemistry as an Indicator of Mantle Redox States in Rocky Planets
oneliner: Photochemical reactions of sulfur-bearing molecules in exoplanet atmospheres allow remote probing of their interior geochemistry.
description: This study explores the role of photochemistry in shaping the observed spectra of rocky exoplanets and the potential use of sulfur compounds to diagnose mantle redox states. Through coupled planetary evolution and chemical kinetics modeling, it is shown that while the bulk atmosphere is controlled b
abstract: The question of what determines the composition of rocky exoplanet atmospheres—interior degassing or non-equilibrium processes like photochemistry—remains open. Using the PROTEUS computational model, coupled with FastChem and VULCAN chemical codes, evolutionary simulations were conducted for a wide range of mantle redox states, irradiation fluxes, and stellar spectra (solar-type and M-dwarfs). Comparisons were made between thermochemical equilibrium, vertical transport only, and combined transport and photochemistry. They found that even with non-equilibrium chemistry, the bulk atmosphere is controlled by the mantle's redox state and degassing history: reduced interiors lead to H₂-dominated atmospheres, oxidized interiors to CO₂-dominated ones. Photochemistry affects the upper layers, depleting neutral volatile compounds and enhancing radical concentrations, especially under high irradiation. SO₂ abundance increases significantly at intermediate and oxidized mantle states. Synthetic emission spectra reveal SO₂ absorption bands at 4 and 7.3/8.7 μm with amplitudes of ~60 and ~100 ppm, which drop to ~30 and ~50 ppm for oxidized mantles.
threads: Палимпсест атмосферы: звезда переписывает химию, но сера сопротивляется. SO₂ на экзопланетах как древняя строка, проступающая сквозь новый текст. Мантия выдыхает газы, фотохимия скраблит пергамент, а мы видим только глубокий след окисления. Так геология становится видимой в телескоп. Будущая миссия Ariel превратит это в карту недр.
